| R19-09 | §94 OAPEFLIR Loop/FSM/Assessment 深层missing陷 | P1 | `runtime-execute-bridge.ts:228-240` | Bridge 委托 runMultiStepOrchestration 内部重新规划 -- bypass OAPEFLIR Plan stage 已验证的 PlanGraphBundle | 已解决 (源码已满足, 本轮补定向testing)  | Root Cause不是 bridge 现在仍把plan降级成原始text, 而是历史implementation曾directly委托default runtime entry, 让人误以为会重新走 planner. 现行 bridge 已把输入收敛为 canonical `PlanGraphBundle.graph.nodes` serial化后交给 injected execution-plane adapter.  | 当前 `RuntimeExecuteBridge.executePlan()` 会call `serialiseOapeflirPlan(plan.graph.nodes)` 并把该结果传给 `runtimePlanExecutor`; 本轮 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/oapeflir/runtime-execute-bridge.test.ts` 已验证 executor 收到的 `request` 正是序列化后的 plan nodes, 而不是重新规划前的原始 prompt.  | 关闭range是 bridge 不再绕开已验证的 `PlanGraphBundle` contract; 下游execute器内部其他逻辑不在本条关闭range.  |

| R19-15 | §95 Truth/Routing/RSM/Transition 深层missing陷 | P0 | `transition-service.ts:500-526` | TaskTerminalTransitionService.apply() 用非 CAS 方法(updateTaskStatus 等) -- TOCTOU race; §25.3 要求 CAS+lease+fencing | 已解决 (源码复核/定向testing)  | Root Cause不是终态级联现在仍走 `updateTaskStatus` 一类非 CAS 写法, 而是复审条目停留在旧implementation; 现行 `TaskTerminalTransitionService.apply()` 已先重读 fresh state, 再分别call `updateTaskOutputCas`, `updateTaskStatusCas`, `updateWorkflowStateCas`, `updateSessionStatusCas`, `updateExecutionStatusCas`.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts:934-1000` 已逐项uses CAS/fencing token; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service-regressions.test.ts:228-283`, explicitlyassertion五个 CAS writer 都被命中且终态级联结果正确.  | 这是审计基线滞后, 不是假关闭. ; 该编号在原始 round 文档中duplicate出现 2 次, subsequentduplicate挂账均沿用本结论.  |
| R19-16 | §95 Truth/Routing/RSM/Transition 深层missing陷 | P0 | `intake-router.ts:348-402` | IntakeRouter.route() 从 raw text directly到 workflow/division -- skip RawInput→TaskDraft→ClarificationSession→ConfirmedTaskSpec→RequestEnvelope(§5.3/§4.2) | 已解决 (源码复核/定向testing)  | Root Cause不是现行 intake 仍然“raw text 直达 route decision”, 而是复审条目停留在补齐 intake pipeline 之前; 当前 `route()` 已先构建 `IntakePipelineContext`, 再order产出 `TaskDraft`, `ClarificationSession`, `ConfirmedTaskSpec`, `RequestEnvelope`, 最后才生成 `routeDecision`.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/intake-router.ts:878-1155` 可见完整四阶段流水线; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/intake-router-pipeline-context.test.ts:6-86`, 分别验证 context 透传与 ambiguity 场景下 clarification stage 真实exists.  | 属于现行implementation已到位, 复审结论未synchronous, 现关闭. ; 该编号在原始 round 文档中duplicate出现 2 次, subsequentduplicate挂账均沿用本结论.  |
| R19-17 | §95 Truth/Routing/RSM/Transition 深层missing陷 | P0 | `agent-team-service.ts:56-148` | AgentTeamService.buildPlan() 无 §19.5 协作不变量: 无 delegation depth check(max 3/global 8), 无 permission subsetting(C1), 无 risk_mode guard(C2), 无 budget propagation(C6) | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是完全“零implementation”, 而是早期implementation只补了field和局部 build lane check, 没有把真实 delegated chain depth 编进输入contract, 也没有对 review/validate/repair/release lanes 做统一的 permission subset guard; 因此复杂协作path里仍可能出现深度失真和子代理工具越权.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/agent-team-service.ts:46-52,75-108,157-336` 为 delegated plan 增加 `parentDepth`/`parentAllowedTools`, 把 lane depth 改成按真实链路计算, 并对所有 lanes 统一execute `assertDelegationDepth()` 与 `acp.permission_not_subset` check. 定向testing `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/agent-team-service-collaboration-regressions.test.ts:35-86` coveragemissing parent depth, permissionsout of bounds, 超深 delegation 三个负向场景; `agent-team-service-invariants.test.ts:47-81` 验证合法 delegated plan会保留正确的深度/预算/trace 元data.  | 这是本轮真实逻辑修复, 不是假关闭. ; 该编号在原始 round 文档中duplicate出现 2 次, subsequentduplicate挂账均沿用本结论.  |

| R20-02 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P0 | `plan-dag-validator.ts:64` | 检测到 cycle 时return原始未sort steps 作 orderedSteps(非failure) -- 下游消费无效sort | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是 validator 现在仍把原始 steps 当作sort结果return, 而是复审条目没有吸收subsequent对 cycle branch的 fail-fast 改造; 当前一旦检测到环, `orderedSteps` 会被置空并伴随 `planning.cycle_detected`.  | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/plan-dag-validator.ts:70-79` 已在 cycle 时return `orderedSteps: []`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/plan-dag-validator.test.ts:100-113`, lock定“有环时不得回传未sort fallback”这一负向场景.  | 属于真实行为已纠正, 现关闭.  |
| R20-03 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P0 | `worker-drain-protocol.ts (全file)` | Drain 为无state receipt factory -- 无 checkpoint coordination, 无 lease release, 无 RecoveryWorker 集成(§9 要求先 checkpoint 再释放) | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是现在还“完全无state”, 而是implementation停在半成品: `drainState` 已exists, 但 `coordinateCheckpoint()` 始终directlyreturn `true`, `notifyRecoveryWorker()` 为空, `releaseLease()` 只改in-memory计数, `TERMINATE` 相位也不会真的 handoff/recovery.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-pool/worker-drain-protocol.ts` 增加 `checkpointCoordinator/leaseManager/recoveryNotifier` dependencyinterface, 把 active lease/nodeRun 真实传给 checkpoint, completed/forced_handoff 都会调 lease release, 进入 `TERMINATE` 时会force handoff 并notification recovery; 新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-drain-protocol.test.ts`, 定向验证 checkpoint, lease release 与 recovery notification 三条链路.  | 关闭的是 worker drain 协调主链, 不外推 worker pool 其他投影/调度条目都已完成.  |
| R20-04 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `plan-evaluator.ts:23` | 资源估算=steps.length\*1000 天真启发 -- 无 per-step cost/tool cost/parallelism cost(§13) | 已解决 (源码复核/补定向回归)  | Root Cause不是现行 planner 仍在用 `steps.length * 1000` 的单一启发, 而是复审条目停留在 token estimator 引入前的旧implementation; 当前估算已经explicitly计入 step 数, dependency深度与parallelbranch复杂度.  | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/plan-evaluator.ts` 当前via `estimatePlanTokens()` 计算 `inputTokens/outputTokens/totalTokens/costEstimateUsd`, 并把 `dependencyDepth/maxConcurrency` 纳入公式; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/r20-planner-regressions.test.ts`, directly验证dependency深度与parallelbranch会推高 token 估算, 不再是fixed线性 `steps.length * 常数`.  | 属于旧审计结论未synchronous, 现关闭.  |
| R20-05 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `plan-evaluator.ts` | 无 parallelism limit check -- §13 要求验证parallelbranch vs worker pool capacity | 已解决 (源码复核/补定向回归)  | Root Cause不是现行 evaluator 仍完全忽略parallel度预算, 而是复审条目没有吸收subsequent `workerPoolCapacity` validation; 当前会先估算最大concurrent, 再与 assessment 中的 worker pool capacity 做explicitly比较.  | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/plan-evaluator.ts:186-189` 已在 `maxConcurrency > assessment.resourceAllocation.workerPoolCapacity` 时return `planning.parallelism_limit_exceeded:*`; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/r20-planner-regressions.test.ts`, 验证 2-way branch 在 capacity=1 时会被判定为不可execute.  | 属于parallel预算check已落实到 evaluator, 现关闭.  |
| R20-06 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `plan-builder.ts:44` | Plan outputmissing PlanGraphBundle 必须field: planGraphId/graphVersion/schedulerPolicy/budget/riskProfile/validationReport | 已解决 (源码复核/补定向回归)  | Root Cause不是现行 `PlanBuilder` 仍output legacy `Plan(steps[])`, 而是复审条目停留在 canonical graph bundle 收口前; 当前 build directlyreturn `createPlanGraphBundle(...)` 结果, 并补齐审计列出的必需field.  | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/plan-builder.ts` 现已写入 `planGraphBundleId/graphVersion/schedulerPolicy/budgetPlanRef/riskProfile/validationReport`; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/r20-planner-regressions.test.ts` 与 `tests/unit/platform/architecture/r20-reaudit-source-review.test.ts`, 分别从runtimereturn值和 source-review 两侧lock定这些 canonical fieldexists.  | 属于 PlanGraphBundle output已收敛, 现关闭.  |
| R20-07 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `projections/ (全部9file)` | processedEventIds 为无界 string[] + Array.includes() O(n) -- rebuild 长实体退化为 O(n²) | 已解决 (源码复核/补 source-review 证据)  | Root Cause不是现行 projection 仍用无界array追踪已handle事件, 而是复审条目停留在早期 `string[] + includes()` 版本; 当前 10 个 projection 都已改成有界 `Set/Map`, 并在达到upper limit时eviction最老 event id.  | `approval/artifact/dispatch/governance/incident/risk-action/tool-usage/worker-status/workflow-run/workflow-timeline` 这 10 个 projection 现都定义了 `MAX_PROCESSED_EVENT_IDS`, uses `processedEventIds.has(...)` 做 O(1) 查重, 并在 size 达upper limit时 evict oldest; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/architecture/r20-reaudit-source-review.test.ts`, 逐filelock定 `ReadonlySet/ReadonlyMap + has() + bounded eviction` 模式.  | 属于 projection idempotency index 已全面收敛, 现关闭.  |
| R20-08 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `projections/ (全部9file)` | Shallow spread 后directly修改嵌套对象 -- 破坏前 state references, replay 幂等性失效 | 已解决 (源码复核/补 source-review 证据)  | Root Cause不是现行 projection 还在对浅拷贝后的嵌套对象做原地写入, 而是复审条目没有复核后来对 top-level replacement 模式的收口; 当前这些 projection 只重建 top-level array/Set/Map/object field, 不再出现 `state.foo.bar = ...` 这类 nested mutation.  | 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/architecture/r20-reaudit-source-review.test.ts`, 逐file扫描 `approval/artifact/dispatch/governance/incident/risk-action/tool-usage/worker-status/workflow-run/workflow-timeline` 10 个 projection, lock定不exists `state.xxx.yyy =` 或 `newState.xxx[...] =` 形式的 nested mutation; 结合现行源码可见 timeline/processedEventIds 等嵌套容器均以新array/新 Set/新 Map 回填.  | 属于 replay 期referencespollutepath已在现行implementation中消失, 现关闭.  |
| R20-09 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `workflow-run-projection.ts` | 不handle workflow_run.created/completed/failed -- 无法从 run 创建/完成进入对应state | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 projection 只消费 `workflow:step_* / division:* / subtask:* / task:status_changed` 这组 legacy/旁路事件, 没有把 `workflow_run.*` 作为主生命周期事实接入; 同时初始化逻辑还会优先把 `taskId` 写进 `workflowId`, 导致即使subsequent补 handler 也会被error的default值挡住.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/workflow-run-projection.ts` 增加 `handleWorkflowRunCreated/Completed/Failed`, 并allows `workflowRunId/workflowId` coverage早先的 `taskId` placeholder值.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/workflow-run-projection.test.ts` 新增 `handles workflow_run lifecycle events` 与 `handles workflow_run.failed`.  |
| R20-10 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `governance-projection.ts:204-208` | 未知 approval/decision 事件 fallback 推断为 approval_granted -- silently将reject视为authorization | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 governance projection 还在用 `includes("approval")/includes("decision")` 猜测authorizationsuccess, 而是复审条目停留在删除前的字符串推断版本; 当前未知 decision/approval 事件只会return `actionType: null`, 并在 expired/cancelled 这类explicitlyreject语义下保持 deny.  | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/governance-projection.ts:210-252,380-463` 已去掉error的 approval_granted fallback; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/governance-projection.test.ts:157-170`, 验证 `decision:expired` 不会再被误记为authorizationsuccess.  | 属于投影语义真实收敛, 现关闭.  |
| R20-11 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `worker-drain-protocol.ts:8-14` | WorkerDrainRequest missing drainReason; Receipt missing forcedHandoffCount/cleanupResult(§9) | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是当前 worker drain contract 仍missing这些field, 而是复审条目停留在旧interface; 现行 `WorkerDrainRequest` 已要求 `drainReason`, `WorkerDrainReceipt` 已contains `forcedHandoffCount` 与 `cleanupResult`, 本轮又把 `cleanupResult` 明确放入runtimereturn对象, 避免只停留在type层.  | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-pool/worker-drain-protocol.ts:39-70,192-205,327-334` 已定义并回传这些field; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-pool/worker-drain-protocol.test.ts:24-40,74-84`, 验证 begin/advance path都带有 `drainReason` 上下文和 `forcedHandoffCount/cleanupResult` 合同.  | 该条只按“合同fieldmissing”本体关闭, 不外推为 drain 编排full完备.  |
| R20-12 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P1 | `worker-drain-protocol.ts:32` | Deadline 用 ISO string > 比较 -- 混合 timezone/format 破坏sort | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是当前 deadline 比较仍在做字符串sort, 而是复审条目停留在修复前版本; 现行 `createReceipt()` 和 `isDeadlineExceeded()` 都已把 `observedAt/requestedAt/deadlineAt` 解析成 epoch milliseconds 再比较.  | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-pool/worker-drain-protocol.ts:279-280,348-351` 已统一uses `new Date(...).getTime()`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-pool/worker-drain-protocol.test.ts:43-57`, 用 `2024-01-01T11:00:00+08:00` vs `2024-01-01T03:30:00Z` 证明数值时间比较会判定timeout, 而字符串lexicographic order不会.  | 属于时序比较逻辑真实收敛, 现关闭.  |
| R20-13 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P2 | `worker-status-projection.ts` | 不handle worker:registered/deregistered/drain_started -- pool 成员变更不可追踪 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是当前 worker status projection 仍missing少这些生命周期事件, 而是复审条目停留在onlycoverage claim/heartbeat/writeback 的早期版本; 现行 projection 已为 registered/deregistered/drain_started 三类成员变更事件写入对应state.  | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/worker-status-projection.ts:316-326` 已分别handle `worker:registered`, `worker:deregistered`, `worker:drain_started`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/worker-status-projection.test.ts:148-186`, 验证三类事件都会更新投影state且可追踪.  | 属于旧审计结论未synchronous, 现关闭.  |
| R20-14 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P2 | `tool-usage-projection.ts:224-230` | plugin:invocation_completed 不设 status="completed" -- 永远停在 "started" | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是当前 `plugin:invocation_completed` path仍停留在 started, 而是复审条目沿用了旧逻辑判断; 现行 projection 在完成事件上会把 `status` 置为 `completed`, 并synchronous累计 success/lastSuccessAt.  | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/tool-usage-projection.ts:284-291` 已explicitly写入 `status = "completed"`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/tool-usage-projection.test.ts:79-91`, directlylock定 plugin completion 的 completed/success 语义.  | 该条按审计本体已成立修复, 现关闭.  |
| R20-15 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P2 | `approval-queue-projection.ts` | 不handle decision:expired/cancelled -- expiry审批永远停在 "requested" | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是 approval queue 现在仍完全忽略 expired/cancelled, 而是复审条目没有吸收subsequentstate机branch补齐; 当前 `decision:expired` 和 `decision:cancelled` 都会更新终态并record `respondedAt`.  | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/approval-queue-projection.ts:280-317` 已coverage `decision:expired/cancelled`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/projections/approval-queue-projection.test.ts:183-199`, 验证两类事件不再停留在 `requested`.  | 属于真实投影修复, 现关闭.  |
| R20-16 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P2 | `task-decomposition-service.ts:17` | 每个 step 无条件添加 "read" 作首 tool | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 decomposition 仍对所有 step 预置 `read`, 而是复审条目停留在条件收敛前的旧implementation; 当前只有dependency前序output的 step 才会补 `read`, 补偿和output验证工具也按各自条件单独追加.  | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/task-decomposition-service.ts:12-22` 已按 `dependsOnStepIds.length > 0` 条件化insert `read`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/planner/task-decomposition-service.test.ts:100-129`, 分别验证孤立 step 不带 `read`, dependency step 才带 `read`.  | 属于implementation已修, testing证据补齐, 现关闭.  |
| R20-17 | §99 Planner/Projections/Worker Pool 深层missing陷 | P2 | `worker-registry-service.ts` | listStaleWorkers() 无周期call -- stale worker 不转 dead/不生成 incident(§9) | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是仓内完全没有 stale-heartbeat 检测逻辑, 而是检测 helper 一直悬空: `WorkerRegistryService.detectStaleHeartbeats()` 没有接入任何长生命周期生产entry, `api-server` 也没有把 `taskStore` / incident service 传给 `HttpApiServer`; 同时 stale query会把已标记 `offline` 的 worker 再次扫出来, 意味着就算硬加轮询也会duplicate打事件/incident.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-api-server.ts:21-27,125-128,174-177,192-194,220-257` 增加了 API server 生命周期内的周期 stale-worker sweep, 并在 `runWorkerHeartbeatSweep()` 中call `detectStaleHeartbeats()` 后打开 incident; `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/sqlite/repositories/worker-snapshot-repository.ts:288-296` 让 stale query排除已 `offline` 的 worker, 避免duplicate告警; `src/sdk/cli/api-server.ts:157-160,225-243` 也已把 `taskStore` 与 `IncidentCaseService` 真实接入生产启动链. 定向testing `tests/integration/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-api-server-architecture-regressions.test.ts:222-249` 已验证 stale worker 会被 sweep 为 `offline`, 且只创建 1 条 incident.  | 这是把“exists helper, 没有runtime owner”的真空state补成真实后台检测链.  |
| R20-18 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P0 | `billing-routes.ts:47-59` | Auth bypass -- 任何非空 Authorization 或 x-api-key header 即skip HMAC signature验证 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不只是历史上的 header bypass; 复核时confirmationfile里所谓“修复”仍是假修复: 它虽然不再explicitly放行 `Authorization/x-api-key`, 但只是把 `x-webhook-signature` directly和 shared secret 做字符串比较, 没有按request体计算 HMAC, 因此并不满足 webhook signaturevalidation contract.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/billing-routes.ts:35-58,60-78,95-99` 改为对原始request体execute真实 `HMAC-SHA256` validation, 并支持 `x-webhook-timestamp + payload` 的signature形式; only有 auth headers 不再构成任何放行条件. `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/billing-routes.test.ts:39-60,134-156` 已验证有效signature可via, 而携带 `Authorization/x-api-key` 但signatureerror时仍return `Webhook signature is invalid`.  | 这里明确修掉了“假 HMAC validation”, 不是只改文案.  |
| R20-19 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P0 | `billing-routes.ts:36-106` | Handler body 完整duplicate35行出现在 POST /usage 和 POST /settle 两条路由中 -- 逻辑分叉risk | 已解决 (源码复核/既有testing佐证)  | Root Cause不是当前 `billing-routes.ts` 里仍保留两段duplicate handler, 而是复审条目references了 billing route 收口前的旧file形态; 现行implementation只保留一个 `POST /v1/billing/webhooks/reconcile` 路由, 原指控里的 `POST /usage` / `POST /settle` 在该file中已不exists.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/billing-routes.ts:89-102` 当前只导出单一路由; `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-api-server.ts:662-665` 也only一次性挂载 `createBillingRoutes()`; 既有 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/billing-routes.test.ts:29-37` 已lock定 `routes.length === 1` 且path为 `/v1/billing/webhooks/reconcile`.  | 属于旧审计基线滞后, 本条按现行源码关闭.  |
| R20-20 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P1 | `incident-routes.ts` | tenantId/principal 从 header 解析后丢弃 -- incidents query无tenant隔离 | 已解决 (源码复核/既有testing佐证)  | Root Cause不是现行 incidents route 仍把 principal/tenant scope 丢弃, 而是复审条目停留在 tenant-aware facade 接入前; 当前 list/get/patch path都会先经 `requirePrincipal()` 和 `resolveTenantScope()` 收敛到tenant作用域, 再call tenant-aware incident service.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/incident-routes.ts:73-80,98-107,154-171` 已按 principal 派生 tenant scope; 既有 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/incident-routes.test.ts:91-107,155-177` 已分别验证列表隔离与跨tenant PATCH 被拒.  | 属于旧审计基线滞后, 现关闭.  |
| R20-21 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P1 | `incident-routes.ts` | total=incidents.length(slice 后)非实际总数 -- pagination contract violates | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  route 之前directly把 `listIncidents(limit)` 的returnlength当 total, 导致pagination后 `total` loss真实全集计数; tenant filter和 limit slice 混在一个interface里, 使 route 无法distinguish“结果条数”和“全集总数”.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/incident/index.ts:86-100` 拆出 `countIncidents()`, 并在 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/incident-routes.ts:78-85` 改为returnindependent total. `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/incident-routes.test.ts:110-135` 验证 `limit=2` 时仍return `total=3`.  | 这是本轮真实pagination合同修复, 不是假关闭.  |
| R20-22 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P1 | `prompt-routes.ts:62` | 404 return {bundle:null} 非统一 ErrorEnvelope 结构 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是 prompt querymissing bundle 时仍走successwrapped, 而是复审条目未吸收subsequenterrorresponse改造; 现行 missing-bundle branch已改为统一 `buildJsonErrorResponse()`, 不再把error塞进 data payload.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.ts:168-175` 已return标准error envelope; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.test.ts:191-214`, 验证 404 response体顶层为 `error.code = prompt.bundle_not_found`.  | 属于真实路由合同修复, 现关闭.  |
| R20-23 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P1 | `prompt-routes.ts:77-84` | deprecate 端点不check bundle 是否exists -- silentlysuccess | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是 deprecate 路由现在仍对missing bundle silently 200, 而是复审条目停留在未捕获 registry miss 的旧版本; 当前 `deprecateBundle()` miss 会被路由转换成 404 ErrorEnvelope.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.ts:193-200` 已在 miss 时return `prompt.bundle_not_found`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.test.ts:216-238`, 验证missing bundle deprecate return 404 而非silentlysuccess.  | 属于真实errorpath修复, 现关闭.  |
| R20-24 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P1 | `prompt-routes.ts:12` | Zod schema uses .passthrough() -- allowsarbitrary未验证field进入 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 prompt route schema 仍uses `.passthrough()`, 而是复审条目停留在 schema 收紧前; 当前 request / registration / deprecation 三个 schema 均为 `.strict()`.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.ts:11-45` 已全部uses `.strict()`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/prompt-routes.test.ts:240-267`, 验证 POST 带 `unexpected` field会被reject.  | 属于 contract 边界已收紧, 复审未synchronous, 现关闭.  |
| R20-25 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P1 | `utils.ts:167-175` | buildJsonResponse 无 X-Trace-Id header -- violates observability contract | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是当前 `buildJsonResponse()` 仍完全不支持 trace header, 而是复审条目停留在 helper 收口前; 现行implementation已经在传入 `traceId` 时附加 `x-trace-id`, errorresponse helper 也synchronous支持该 header.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/utils.ts:176-205` 显示 `buildJsonResponse()` 与 `buildJsonErrorResponse()` 都会output `x-trace-id`; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/utils.test.ts:358-361,389-395`, directly验证success/errorresponse两条path都会带 trace header.  | 该条按 helper 合同本体关闭, 不外推所有上层路由都已完整透传 traceId.  |
| R20-26 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P2 | `dashboard-routes.ts:53-96` | 每request new 5个 service 实例(无 DI) -- GC 压力 + 无stateshared | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  `createDashboardRoutes()` 之前只把 `missionControlService` 放在dependencyinjection边界内, 其余 `PlatformWorkbenchSnapshotService`, inventory/template/judge service 都在 handler 里临时 `new`, 导致request级对象抖动且无法复用injection替身.  | 本轮把 `platformWorkbenchSnapshotService`, `benchmarkInventoryService`, `deploymentInventoryService`, `projectionInventoryService`, `complianceProgramTemplateService` 和 `judgeProviderRegistryService` 全部提升为 `DashboardRouteDeps` 的可选injection项, 并在 route 构建阶段一次性instantiationdefault对象.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/dashboard-routes.test.ts` 新增 `reuses injected singleton services instead of new per request`.  |
| R20-27 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P2 | `template-engine/ (全目录)` | only16行 -- 无版本/domain/risk 感知 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root cause: 该条与前文 `R11-18` 指向同一历史 stub, 但 reaudit 行仍停留在 template engine 尚未扩展前的旧基线; 现行implementation已经有 `domainId/riskProfile/version`, 域validation, 模板推荐和参数绑定, 只是这条duplicate挂账之前没有单独补证据.  | `src/interaction/ux/template-engine/index.ts` 当前 `InteractionTemplateSchema` 已contains `domainId/riskProfile/version`, 并导出 `validateTemplateForDomain()`, `recommendTemplatesForDomain()`, `instantiateTemplate()`; 本轮在 `tests/unit/interaction/ux/template-engine.test.ts` 新增 domain/risk/version, 域validation, 推荐sort和参数绑定assertion.  | 该条按现行源码与testing关闭, 避免与 `R11-18` duplicate挂账.  |
| R20-28 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P2 | `wizard/ (全目录)` | 无 step validation/progress persistence/risk preview | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 这条原本混了三层问题: 一是旧 wizard 只有step完成布尔, 没有based on必填答案的 step validation; 二是进度persistence虽然已经有序列化/保存 API, 但 audit 没把它作为正式证据写回; 三是完全missing少risk预览结构, 前端无法在提交前知道哪些step需要额外 review.  | 当前 `src/interaction/ux/wizard/index.ts` 已在既有 `serializeWizardSession()/deserializeWizardSession()/saveWizardSession()/getWizardProgress()` 之外, 新增 `requiredAnswerKeys/riskLevel/riskHints`, `validateWizardStep()` 与 `getWizardRiskPreview()`, 并让 `canAdvanceWizard()` 受 step validation 约束.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/interaction/ux/wizard/navigation-and-session.test.ts` 新增 `validateWizardStep reports missing required answers` 与 `getWizardRiskPreview surfaces medium+ risk steps and review requirement`.  |
| R20-29 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P2 | `onboarding/ (全目录)` | sessions 存储为in-memory Map -- 重启loss所有进度 | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  `UserPortalService` 之前把 session directly写入process内 `Map`, 没有任何 repository 抽象, 因此既无法跨 service instance shared, 也无法挂到 runtime truth 做持久恢复.  | 本轮在 `src/interaction/ux/onboarding/index.ts` 引入 `UserPortalSessionRepository`, `InMemoryUserPortalSessionRepository` 与 `DurableUserPortalSessionRepository`, 并让 `UserPortalService` 改为仓储驱动; `src/interaction/ux/user-experience-orchestration-service.ts` 也开放了 portal repository injection. `tests/unit/interaction/ux/onboarding.test.ts` 新增“shared仓储跨实例can read”和“via RuntimeLifecycleRepository round-trip 恢复”两条回归.  | 关闭的是 onboarding session 的hardcodedin-memory存储问题; default仍可用 in-memory 仓储做local模式, 但不再被代码结构force绑死.  |
| R20-30 | §100 API Routes / UX missing陷 | P2 | `incident/prompt/dashboard routes` | 均无 cursor pagination -- only offset/limit 对大data集性能差 | 已解决 (源码复核/补定向回归)  | Root Cause不是现行 incident/prompt/dashboard 路由仍只支持 offset/limit, 而是复审条目停留在 cursor interface落地前; 当前三条路由都已支持 `cursor` 入参, 并在结果中return `nextCursor`.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/incident-routes.ts` 已透传 incident cursor pagination, `prompt-routes.ts` 已based on opaque cursor 做 bundle pagination, `dashboard-routes.ts` 的 `/v1/workbench/snapshot` 也已按 `approvalIndex/taskBoardIndex` 编码paginationcursor; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/api/http-server/r20-cursor-pagination-regressions.test.ts`, 分别验证三条路由都能return并消费 `nextCursor`.  | 属于路由pagination contract 已补齐, 现关闭.  |
| R20-31 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P0 | `degradation-controller.ts (routeD0)` | 递归call无 max-depth guard -- provider 链构成环时无限递归导致栈溢出 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不只是历史上missing少递归深度保护; 复核confirmation现有 guard 还把 `routeRecursionDepth` 存成实例级field, failure深度会跨requestleaks, `reset()` 也不清零, 导致subsequentindependentrequest可能error命中 `max_recursion_exceeded`, 属于“保护exists但作用域error”的真实missing陷.  | 本轮已将递归深度改为单次路由call内的局部state: `src/platform/model-gateway/degradation/degradation-controller.ts` 现在via `routeWithDepth()/routeAfterEscalation()` 传递深度, 不再跨requestshared; 新增 `tests/unit/platform/model-gateway/degradation/degradation-controller-recursion-guard.test.ts`, 验证连续两次failurerequest在 `reset()` 后都能稳定收敛到 D3, 而不会被上一次failure深度pollute.  | 这是对真实residualmissing陷的代码修复, 不是假关闭.  |
| R20-32 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P0 | `service-registry.ts (teardownAll)` | Promise.all concurrent teardown -- violates §9 要求的order drain→flush→close | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 `ServiceRegistry.teardownAll()` 还在concurrent teardown, 而是复审条目停留在早期 `Promise.all` 版本; 当前implementation已经按dependency拓扑逆序serial teardown, 保证 dependent service 先于 dependency 收口.  | `src/platform/shared/lifecycle/service-registry.ts:301-325` 现在individual `await` reverse-topological teardown, 不再concurrentcleanup; `tests/unit/platform/shared/service-registry-lifecycle-extended.test.ts:212-236` 已验证 teardown order为 `dependent -> base`.  | 属于生命周期order已真实收敛, 现关闭.  |
| R20-33 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P1 | `websocket-bridge.ts` | WS listeners 不 removeAllListeners on disconnect -- listener leak | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 `WebSocketBridge` 还完全misses断连 listener cleanup, 而是复审条目停留在 `handleDisconnection()` 未收尾的旧版本; 当前断连path已经synchronousremoval task 订阅, slow-consumer 标记和 socket listeners.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts:390-406` 已在 disconnect 时call `ws.removeAllListeners()` 并cleanup订阅/slow-consumer state; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge-coverage.test.ts:266-304`, directly验证断连后 client, task subscriber 和 slow consumer 计数都归零.  | 属于旧审计结论未synchronous, 现关闭.  |
| R20-34 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P1 | `websocket-bridge.ts (close)` | close() 无 timeout -- misbehaving client 挂起 shutdown | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是当前 `close()` 仍无限等待, 而是复审条目停留在 timeout guard 加入前; 现行 shutdown path已经设置 5 秒timeout, 并在 client 不配合时force resolve.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge.ts:633-650` 已引入 5s timeout fallback; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/websocket-bridge-coverage.test.ts:306-343`, 模拟 `wss.close()` never回调时 `bridge.close()` 仍会完成.  | 属于 shutdown 卡死path已真实封口, 现关闭.  |
| R20-35 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P1 | `stream-bridge.ts` | 无 dispose() -- per-stream maps unbounded growth | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不只是历史上missing少 `dispose()`; 复核时confirmation现有implementation虽然已经有 `dispose()`, 但只cleanup stream 级 map, 没有cleanup `clientLastSequence/clientStreamSubscription`, shutdown 后仍会residual client 侧 cursor state, 属于不完整修复.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.ts:314-340` 让 `closeStream()` synchronous删除属于该 stream 的 client cursor, 并让 `dispose()` 额外清空 `clientLastSequence/clientStreamSubscription`; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.test.ts:139-165` 已验证 `closeStream()` 和 `dispose()` 都会把 client/stream maps 清空.  | 这是把“已有 dispose 但cleanup不全”的真实residual补齐, 不是假关闭.  |
| R20-36 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P1 | `durable-event-bus.ts` | 10ms poll interval = 100次/秒/consumer 无自适应 backoff | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 `DurableEventBus` 仍fixed 10ms 轮询, 而是复审条目停留在旧implementation; 当前代码已经把基础轮询间隔提高到 100ms, 并按 queue depth / consumer count 做自适应 backoff.  | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` 已定义 `ACTIVE_SUBSCRIBER_POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 100`, 并via `calculatePollingInterval()` 在高积压时拉长轮询; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus-backpressure-2297.test.ts` 已验证基础间隔, 自适应 backpressure 计算和 runtime metrics 接线.  | 属于旧审计结论未synchronous到现行implementation, 现关闭.  |
| R20-37 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P1 | `worker-drain-protocol.ts:32` | ISO string > 比较 -- mixed timezone 破坏sort | 已解决 (同 R20-12)  | Root Cause与 `R20-12` 相同: 复审条目沿用了旧版 ISO 字符串比较结论, 现行 shutdown/drain 时序判断已经改成 epoch 毫秒比较.  | 证据同 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-pool/worker-drain-protocol.ts:279-280,348-351` 与 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/worker-pool/worker-drain-protocol.test.ts:43-57`; 混合时区场景的定向testing已via.  | duplicate挂账, 沿用同一修复结论关闭.  |
| R20-38 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P1 | `cli/api-server.ts (shutdown)` | missing DurableEventBus/WS/ServiceRegistry/ProviderPool/process-tracker cleanup | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是所有列举资源都仍未接线: 复核confirmation `HttpApiServer.stop()` 已负责 WebSocket 关闭, `getGlobalGracefulShutdown()` 也已contains `ServiceRegistry` teardown; 真实residual是 API CLI 自身创建的 `TypedEventBus` 没有在 shutdown 时 dispose, 且 `ProcessTracker` 与 model call provider / provider pool 这类globallyprocess级资源没有挂到 CLI shutdown 链路.  | 本轮在 `src/sdk/cli/api-server.ts` 新增 `typed_event_bus`, `model_call_provider`, `process_tracker` 三个 shutdown handler; 其中 `resetModelCallProvider()` 会级联触发 `ModelCallProviderService.dispose()` 和 `UnifiedChatProvider.dispose()`, 进一步释放 provider credential pools. 新增 `tests/unit/sdk/cli/api-server-shutdown-wiring.test.ts`, 验证这三条 cleanup wiring 已实际接入 CLI shutdown 代码path.  | 这是把真实missing的 lifecycle wiring 补齐后关闭, 不把已exists的 WS / ServiceRegistry path误算成“本轮修复”.  |
| R20-39 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P2 | `circuit-breaker.ts (failureTimestamps)` | 无upper limitarray -- 高吞吐场景可达 600k+ entries | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是 `failureTimestamps` 完全不 prune, 而是它只按 `monitorWindowMs` 做时间裁剪, 没有容量upper limit; 在长window高吞吐下, window内array仍可能膨胀到非常大, 造成可观in-memory占用.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/model-gateway/provider-registry/circuit-breaker.ts` 增加 `maxWindowEntries` upper limit, 并在 success/failure 两条时间window上统一call `trimWindowEntries()`; 新增 `tests/unit/platform/model-gateway/provider-registry/circuit-breaker-memory-bound.test.ts`, 验证 1000 次 success/failure 采样后两个window都被limit在configureupper limit内.  | 属于真实in-memory上界missing修复, 现关闭.  |
| R20-40 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P2 | `service-registry.ts (reset)` | clear 在 teardown 前execute -- teardown 中访问 registry 报 undefined | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是当前 `reset()` 还会先 `clear()` 再 teardown, 而是复审条目沿用了 reset 重构前的旧行为; 现行implementation直到 teardown 全部完成后才统一清空 `instances/services/initializing`.  | `src/platform/shared/lifecycle/service-registry.ts:127-159` 已把 `clear()` 挪到 teardown 循环之后; 本轮补充 `tests/unit/platform/shared/service-registry-lifecycle-extended.test.ts:258-280`, 验证 teardown execute期间dependency服务的 registration 和 initialized state 仍然可见.  | 属于 reset 生命周期order已修正, 现关闭.  |
| R20-41 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P2 | `durable-event-bus.ts (deliveryChains)` | Promise chain unbounded growth -- 长运行processin-memory线性递增 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 `deliveryChains` 仍只增不删, 而是复审条目停留在 cleanup 收口前; 当前 fan-out 链路已经在 `finally` 中删除当前 consumer 对应的 settled chain.  | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` 现在在 `this.deliveryChains.set(consumerId, chain)` 后, via `chain.finally()` only在当前 map 项仍指向同一 promise 时execute删除; 新增independenttesting `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus-delivery-chain-cleanup.test.ts`, 验证事件投递完成后 `deliveryChains.size === 0`.  | 属于implementation已收口但此前missing少干净证据, 现关闭.  |
| R20-42 | §101 Graceful Shutdown / Concurrency missing陷 | P2 | `graceful-shutdown.ts (handlers)` | 按insert逆序execute非dependency感知 -- order脆弱 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 graceful shutdown 仍完全dependency脆弱的 reverse insertion order, 而是复审条目停留在 `dependsOn` 与拓扑sort接入前; 当前 handler executeorder已经可由dependency关系explicitly建模.  | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/startup/graceful-shutdown.ts` 已引入 `dependsOn`, `topologicalSortHandlers()` 和 dependency-aware `executeShutdown()`; 新增independenttesting `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/startup/graceful-shutdown-dependency-order.test.ts`, 验证 `close -> flush -> drain` 会按dependency关系而不是单纯insertorderexecute.  | 属于 shutdown order模型已真实升级, 现关闭.  |
| R20-43 | §102 Side-Effect / Eval Gate / Static Analysis missing陷 | P0 | `side-effect-manager.ts (全file)` | 无 ReconciliationWorker/周期 side-effect sweep -- only apply 不 probe/不对账 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 旧 `SideEffectManager` 虽然能 `applyReconciliation()`, 但missing少周期性 probe entry, 导致 ambiguous / confirmable 的 side effect 只能被动接收外部 reconciliation 结果, 无法由 manager 自己组织 probe→reconciliation→nextAction 这条闭环.  | 本轮复核并补齐 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/side-effect-manager.ts` 中的 `reconciliationWorker` 与 `sweepReconciliation()`: 它会对可对账 side effect execute probe, 交给 `ReconciliationWorker.determineNextAction(...)` 生成下一动作, 再创建 `ReconciliationRecord` 并return sweep 结果; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/side-effect-manager.test.ts` 已新增并via `SideEffectManager sweepReconciliation probes ambiguous effects and confirms them` 与 `... skips non-reconcilable side effects`.  | 关闭的是 side-effect manager 自带的 probe/sweep 主链, 不外推外部 connector probe 能力或所有 reconciliation strategy都已完备.  |
| R20-44 | §102 Side-Effect / Eval Gate / Static Analysis missing陷 | P0 | `side-effect-manager.ts` | 无初始注册阶段(proposed→reserved→committing)和 pre-commit re-validation | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  runtime state machine 虽然早就定义了 `proposed/approved/reserved/committing/committed/confirming/confirmed` state, 但 `SideEffectManager` 只暴露 reconciliation/compensation API, 注册期和 commit 前再validation完全没有统一 owner.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/side-effect-manager.ts` 增加 `registerProposal/approve/reserve/startCommit/recordCommitted/startConfirmation/confirm`, 并引入 `preCommitValidator` 在进入 commit path 前统一 re-validation; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/side-effect-manager.test.ts` 已验证完整注册生命周期和每个 pre-commit 目标state都会触发再validation.  | 关闭的是 side-effect manager 的注册/预提交主链, 不外推 ReconciliationWorker 等independent条目已完成.  |
| R20-45 | §102 Side-Effect / Eval Gate / Static Analysis missing陷 | P1 | `workflow-validator.ts` | missing 5/12 contract 要求的staticanalysischeck(resource-bound, auth-scope, idempotency, timeout-budget, data-flow) | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `MinimalWorkflowStep` 已保留 `budgetIntent/sideEffectProfile/executionRoleId/nodeType` 这些丰富元data, 但 validator 一直只validation DAG 和基础field, 没有把运行前的资源边界, execute作用域, 幂等/补偿语义与 data-flow 合同真正前置.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/oapeflir/workflow/workflow-validator.ts` 新增 `step.resource_bound_missing / step.auth_scope_missing / step.idempotency_missing / step.timeout_budget_mismatch / dependency.data_flow_missing` 等check; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/oapeflir/workflow/workflow-validator.test.ts` 已定向coverage tool/llm/resource/data-flow 负例.  | 关闭的是这 5 类missing的staticanalysischeck, 不外推 contract 第 3 节所有条目都已齐备.  |

| R21-01 | §104 Multi-region / Federation / Tenant missing陷 | P0 | `cdc-replication-service.ts:97` | CDC 无conflict解决(LWW+vector clock) -- 事件复制无 merge strategy | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 真实Root cause: 复制事件模型过去没有携带权威 `sourceRegionId/vectorClock` 元data, `updateVectorClock()` 也只是local盲增, 导致 `detectConflict()` 无法based on事件因果关系判断先后或concurrent, 只能退化成弱时间sort.  | 当前 `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/cdc-replication-service.ts` 已为 `CDCReplicationEvent` 增加 `sourceRegionId` 与 `vectorClock`, 补入 `VectorClock.fromRecord()/toRecord()/withRegionSequence()`, 并把 `updateVectorClock()`, `detectConflict()`, `mergeEventsWithConflictResolution()` 改为based on事件向量clock做因果/concurrentconflict判断; `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/cdc-replication-concurrent.test.ts` 已新增并viaconcurrent复制与 conflict merge 回归.  | 关闭的是“CDC 完全没有 vector-clock merge strategy”的真实missing口.  |
| R21-02 | §104 Multi-region / Federation / Tenant missing陷 | P0 | `multi-region/ (全目录)` | 无 split-brain 检测/fencing epoch -- failover 无隔离令牌 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向回归)  | 原指控对现行代码已不成立: `split-brain-protection.ts`, `fencing-token-service.ts` 与 `failover-controller/index.ts` 早已具备 split-brain 检测, fencing epoch/token 获取与validation链; 本轮复核时额外发现 `validateFencingTokenForFailover()` 把 `regionId` 误传给 token validation entity key, 导致刚获取的 failover token 也会被误判失效, 这个真实missing口已顺手修正.  | 当前 `RegionFailoverController` 已暴露 `acquireFencingTokenForFailover()`, `validateFencingTokenForFailover()`, 并会把 epoch synchronous回 split-brain protection; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/architecture/r21-reaudit-source-review.test.ts`, 验证 failover 后既会产出 reconciliation result, 也能让新 leader 的 fencing token validationvia, 旧 leader validationfailure.  | 关闭的是“完全没有 split-brain/fencing 链路”的条目; 不外推为跨process共识system级形式化证明.  |
| R21-03 | §104 Multi-region / Federation / Tenant missing陷 | P0 | `failover-controller/index.ts:17` | 无 FailoverReconciliationJob -- resolveRegionFailover 是无state纯函数无重试/对账循环 | 已解决 (源码复核/补定向回归)  | 原审计停留在更早期快照; 现行 `failover-controller/index.ts` 已directlyinjection `FailoverReconciliationJob`, 并在 failover 决策后synchronous运行 reconciliation scan, 把未复制写入, 审批, budget, outbox gap, restricted write 等riskexplicitly附回决策结果.  | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/failover-controller/index.ts` 当前construction器持有 `reconciliationJob`, `resolve()` 中explicitlycall `runReconciliation(...)` 并return `reconciliationResult`; 既有 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/failover-reconciliation-job.test.ts` 已coverage scan 行为, 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/architecture/r21-reaudit-source-review.test.ts` directlyassertion failover decision 带有 `reconciliationResult`.  | 该条关闭basis是“job 已接到 failover 主链”, 不声称当前已经implementation后台无限重试编排器.  |

| R21-20 | §105 Ops-maturity missing陷 | P1 | `auto-stop-loss-service.ts:619` | 升级级别based on string.includes("emergency") -- 脆弱text匹配非实际严重度 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行升级级别仍via `triggerReason.includes("emergency")` 之类的脆弱text匹配决定, 而是审计停留在旧版implementation; 当前 anomaly / health entry已经explicitlyuses severity/status 映射, playbook execute事件则based on动作strategy决定 `escalationLevel`.  | `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/auto-stop-loss-service.ts` 当前在 `evaluateAnomaly()` 中via `SEVERITY_TO_ESCALATION[severity]` 做 severity 映射, 在 `evaluateHealth()` 中via `HEALTH_TO_ESCALATION[status]` 做健康态映射, 并在 `determineEscalation()` 里按动作集合 (`disable_new_tasks` / `escalate_to_human` / `pause_non_critical` / `scale_down`) 决定最终 `escalationLevel`. 本轮补强 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/auto-stop-loss-service-extended.test.ts`, 验证 `executePlaybook()` 在普通文案 `"routine warning without emergency keyword"` 下, 只要动作是 `disable_new_tasks` 仍会得到 `critical`, 证明不dependency自由text.  | 本轮不改生产逻辑, 主要回写当前explicitly映射implementation, 并补了一条directly反证“非字符串匹配”的最小回归.  |
| R21-21 | §105 Ops-maturity missing陷 | P1 | `ha-program-service.ts:186` | overallStatus 三元条件永远 true -- .some() check组件exists而非check不健康组件 | 已解决 (源码复核)  | Root Cause不是现行 `overallStatus` 仍然uses会恒为真的error三元表达式, 而是审计结论停留在早期条件写错的版本; 当前implementation已经把“关键组件未 ready”与“only非关键组件未 ready”拆成两层判断.  | `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/ha-program-service.ts` 当前先算 `allReady = components.every((component) => component.ready)`, 再算 `hasCriticalNotReady = components.some((component) => !component.ready && (component.componentId === "coordinator" || component.componentId === "postgres"))`, 最后将 `overallStatus` 收敛为 `pass/fail/warning`. `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/ha-program-service.ts` 现在只是对 tenant-platform implementation的directly re-export, 因此不再existsparallel旧implementation. 现有 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/ha-program-service.test.ts` 已coverage `pass`, `fail`, `warning` 三种path, 本轮复跑 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/ha-program-service.test.ts` 与 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/ha-program-service.test.ts` 均via.  | 本轮不改生产代码, 关闭basis是现行条件表达式与定向testing已经directlycoverage原审计描述的errorbranch.  |
| R21-22 | §105 Ops-maturity missing陷 | P2 | `data-replicator/index.ts:246` | pendingCount=events.length 而非实际failure数 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 checkpoint 仍directly把整批 `events.length` 写进 `pendingCount`, 而是审计停留在旧implementation; 当前missing口已经收敛为“需要directly回归证明 pendingCount 代表未confirmation事件而不是整批事件数”.  | 现行 `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator/index.ts` 在 flush 后用 `events.length - lastSequence` 计算 `actualPendingCount`, 并把它写入 checkpoint; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator-issues.test.ts` 回归, 验证 3 个事件中 2 个success, 1 个永久failure时, `checkpoint.pendingCount === 1` 且 `sequenceNumber === 2`.  | 本轮不改这partial生产公式, 只补了能directly证明“pendingCount 是未confirmation事件数”的最小testingbasis.  |
| R21-23 | §105 Ops-maturity missing陷 | P2 | `data-replicator/index.ts:225` | 重试success时 lastSequence 双重计数 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行重试path还会在一次事件上做两次 `lastSequence++`, 而是审计没有跟进subsequent修正; 当前implementation只在首次success时加一次, 若首次failure则only在 `retrySucceeded` 后补记一次.  | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator/index.ts` 当前在主发送successpath里加一次 `lastSequence++`, 进入 retry branch后只有 `retrySucceeded` 时再补一次, 不会双记; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator-issues.test.ts`, 验证“首发failure, 重试success”的单事件结果仍是 `lastSequence === 1`, `checkpoint.sequenceNumber === 1`.  | 本轮未再改 sequence 生产逻辑, 主要是把现行implementation的真实行为用回归testingfixed下来.  |
| R21-24 | §105 Ops-maturity missing陷 | P2 | `data-replicator/index.ts:112` | ReplicationEventBuffer timer flush return值无消费 -- 事件loss | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause真实exists: 旧 `ReplicationEventBuffer.scheduleFlush()` 在 timer 触发时会先 `flush()` 清空 buffer, 但没有把return事件交回 `DataReplicatorService` 的发送/重试/checkpoint 链路, 结果是 auto flush path会把事件从in-memory中拿走后silently丢弃. 附带问题是该 timer 还会保持事件循环活跃, blocks空闲process退出.  | 本轮在 `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator/index.ts` 给 `ReplicationEventBuffer` 增加 `autoFlushHandler`, 由 `DataReplicatorService` 在construction buffer 时injection真实 `processEvents()` 链路; timer flush 现在会把事件交给 service handle, failure时 requeue, 且 timer uses `unref()` 不再blocksprocess退出. 新增 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator.test.ts` 回归, 验证only靠 timer auto flush 就会真实 emit 事件, 更新 checkpoint 到 `sequenceNumber === 1/pendingCount === 0`.  | 这是本轮的真实生产修复, 不再让 timer flush 走“清空 buffer + no-op”的假链路.  |
| R21-25 | §105 Ops-maturity missing陷 | P2 | `region-health-check-service.ts:330` | determineStatus 用references相等比较 metrics -- 永远不匹配 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause真实exists但比原描述更具体: `determineStatus()` 旧implementation并没有directly拿到当前 region 的阈值configure, 而是尝试从历史 `healthResults` 里用 `metrics` content反推 `regionId`, 首次successcheck时拿不到 config, 导致 latency 超阈值也可能被误判为 `healthy`.  | 本轮在 `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/region-health-check-service.ts` 让 `checkRegion()` directly把当前 `RegionHealthCheckConfig` 传入 `determineStatus()`, 并directly用 `latencyMs > config.thresholds.maxLatencyMs` 判定 degraded; 新增 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/region-health-check-service.test.ts` 回归, 验证首次successcheck即使 metrics 全绿, 只要 latency 超过该 region 阈值, 也会return `degraded`.  | 这是本轮的真实逻辑修正, 不再dependency历史 metrics 匹配去indirectly寻找阈值.  |

| R21-30 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P0 | `plugin-definition.ts:144-148` | definePlugin checksignaturefieldexists但从不验证密码学signature -- 插件信任无意义 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不只是历史上missing少force验签; 复核confirmation现行 `definePlugin()` 虽然会call `verifyPluginSignature()`, 但 Ed25519/Ed448 brancherroruses `createVerify('ed25519')`, Node 实际会报 `Invalid digest`, 导致主流插件signature算法无法完成真实密码学validation.  | 本轮在 `src/sdk/plugin-sdk/plugin-definition.ts` 改为对 `ed25519/ed448` uses `crypto.verify(null, ...)` 的真实验签path, 其余算法仍走 `createVerify()`; 新增 `tests/unit/plugins/plugin-definition-security-regressions.test.ts`, 生成真实 Ed25519 密钥对和signature, 验证 `definePlugin()` 会accepts有效signature插件.  | 这是对“有验签框架但主算法验不了”的真实安全missing陷修复, 现关闭.  |
| R21-31 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P0 | `domain-model.ts` | missing canary 生命周期state -- spec 要求 draft→canary→active→deprecated→archived | 已解决 (源码复核/现有testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 `domain-model.ts` 仍missing `canary` 生命周期, 而是复审条目停留在早期 schema 未补齐之前; 当前 `DomainManifestSchema.lifecycleState` 已explicitly支持 `draft/canary/active/deprecated/archived`, 只是审计文档与testing证据没有synchronous更新.  | `src/domains/registry/domain-model.ts` 当前把 `lifecycleState` 定义为 `z.enum([\"draft\", \"canary\", \"active\", \"deprecated\", \"archived\"])`; 现有 `tests/unit/domains/registry/domain-model-schemas.test.ts` 与 `tests/unit/domains/registry/domain-manifest-resource-quotas.test.ts` 已coverage全部合法 lifecycle states, 本轮复跑confirmationvia.  | 属于 domain manifest 生命周期模型已落地, 此前missing少concentrated证据, 现关闭.  |
| R21-32 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P0 | `evidence-collector.ts` | Evidence 纯in-memory(Map),无persistence/hash chain/防tamper -- spec 要求 tamper-proof 审计证据 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | 复核后发现原指控有两层: 第一, “无 hash chain/防tamper”已经不是现状, `ComplianceEvidenceCollector` 早已有 `previousHash/hash/verifyChain()`; 第二, 真实missing口仍在persistence, 旧implementation把 evidence, schedule, last hash 全留在in-memory Map 里, process重启即loss, 导致 tamper-proof 证据链无法跨process延续.  | 本轮在 `src/org-governance/compliance-engine/evidence-collector.ts` 增加 `ComplianceEvidenceCollectorOptions.storagePath`, 磁盘 snapshot 加载/落盘, records/scheduledCollections/lastHashByFramework persistence; `tests/unit/org-governance/compliance-engine/evidence-collector.test.ts` 已新增回归, 验证重启后 evidence record与 hash continuity 可恢复, 且tamperpersistencefile后 `verifyChain()` 会识别出被pollute的 `evidenceId`.  | 这是把“in-memory链条”补成“可persistence, 可重载, 可验tamper”的真实修复, 现关闭.  |
| R21-33 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `api-client.ts:208` | RetryableApiClient 重试所有非 ok response含 4xx -- 应only重试 5xx/429/网络error | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是 response branch里完全没做state码distinguish, 而是 `request()` 在把 4xx 分类成 `BusinessError/AuthError` 之后, 又在外层 `catch` 中把这些 typed error 当成“可重试error”再次重试; 所以 GET 遇到 400/401/403 仍会发生errorreplay.  | 本轮在 `src/sdk/client-sdk/api-client.ts` 的 `catch` 块中explicitly排除 `AuthError/BusinessError/ValidationError/NetworkError`, only对 fetch 级网络异常继续走 retry; `tests/unit/sdk/client-sdk/api-client-contract-envelope-regressions.test.ts` 已验证 400 business error 只request一次, 不再被重试.  | 这是本轮发现并补掉的真实 retry 漏洞, 现关闭.  |
| R21-34 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `plugins/index.ts` | 生命周期 registered→loaded→active→inactive missing validated 和 suspended state | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行插件导出面仍只暴露 `registered/loading/active/inactive` 旧state, 而是复审条目停留在 `PluginLifecycleStateSchema` 扩展前; 当前 `src/plugins/index.ts` directly转导 `plugin-spi.ts` 的 `PluginLifecycleStateSchema`, 其中已经contains `validated` 与 `suspended`, `PluginSpiRegistry` 也implementation了 suspended 生命周期流转.  | `src/domains/registry/plugin-spi.ts` 当前定义的 `PluginLifecycleStateSchema` contains `registered/validated/loading/active/inactive/unloaded/suspended/disabled`; `src/plugins/index.ts` directly导出该 schema; `tests/unit/domains/registry/plugin-lifecycle-states.test.ts` 已coverage active/inactive→suspended, 且本轮补强 `tests/unit/domains/registry/plugin-spi-schema.test.ts` 把 `validated` 纳入正向 schema assertion.  | 属于插件生命周期state面已对齐, 此前missing少完整testing佐证, 现关闭.  |
| R21-35 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `plugin-spi.ts` | SPI type含 retriever/validator/planner 但missing tool/evaluator -- 与 plugin-sdk PluginDefinition inconsistent | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 `plugin-spi.ts` 仍missing `tool/evaluator`, 而是复审条目停留在旧版 SPI 枚举; 当前 `PluginSpiTypeSchema` 已contains `tool/retriever/validator/planner/presenter/adapter/evaluator` 七类, 只是旧testing长期未把 `tool/evaluator` 纳入正向样例, 导致证据不足.  | `src/domains/registry/plugin-spi.ts` 当前 `PluginSpiTypeSchema = z.enum([\"tool\", \"retriever\", \"validator\", \"planner\", \"presenter\", \"adapter\", \"evaluator\"])`; 本轮补强 `tests/unit/domains/registry/plugin-spi-schema.test.ts` 与 `tests/unit/domains/registry/plugin-spi-types.test.ts`, 明确assertion `tool/evaluator` 可被 schema accepts.  | 属于implementation已对齐, 此前missing少directlytesting证据, 现关闭.  |
| R21-36 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `escalation/index.ts:158` | only匹配首条规则 -- 无多级升级链/无审批steptimeout | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | 复核后发现原指控有两层: 第一, “只有首条规则”已经不是现状, 当前implementation早已是 panic_stop → takeover → approval → none 的分层升级链; 第二, 本轮最小定向testing又暴露了一个真实missing陷: `triggerPanicStop()` 之前把 `requiredApprovers: []` 传给 `PlatformPanicService.activate()`, 触发 dual-approver invariant, 导致 critical+production pathdirectly抛 `panic.required_approvers_minimum_not_met`, 连 panic decision 都无法落地. 审批timeoutstrategy本身则一直已在 approval request 中建模为 `timeoutPolicy: \"reject\"`.  | 本轮已在 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/escalation/index.ts` 与 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/escalation/index.ts` 增加 `buildRequiredApprovers()`, 确保 panic stop auto带上双人审批人列表; `createApprovalRequest()` 继续explicitly写入 `timeoutPolicy: \"reject\"`. `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/escalation.test.ts`, `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/escalation/index.test.ts` 本轮新增/修正了 panic stop, approval request 创建, 审批timeoutstrategy, `costThresholdUsd` coveragedefault阈值等回归.  | 关闭的是“无多级升级链/无审批timeout”的原指控, 并同时修复了本轮复核中发现的真实 panic pathmissing陷; 不外推成“已具备arbitrary可configure N 级规则引擎”.  |
| R21-37 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `admin-sdk/index.ts` | 极薄 wrapper -- missingtenantmanage/strategymanage/域生命周期/rollout 控制 | 已解决 (源码已满足, 本轮补证据)  | Root Cause不是当前 `AdminSdk` 仍只有少量 pass-through wrapper, 而是复审条目停留在 SDK 扩容之前; 现行 `src/sdk/admin-sdk/index.ts` 已containstenant CRUD/停复用, strategy CRUD/挂载解绑, 域生命周期控制, rollout 控制与 bulk operations.  | 当前 `AdminSdk` 已implementation `listTenants/getTenant/createTenant/updateTenant/deleteTenant/suspendTenant/resumeTenant`, `listPolicies/getPolicy/createPolicy/updatePolicy/deletePolicy/attachPolicy/detachPolicy/listPolicyAttachments`, `activateDomain/deactivateDomain/suspendDomain/resumeDomain/getDomainStatus`, `listRollouts/getRollout/createRollout/updateRollout/pauseRollout/resumeRollout/cancelRollout/getRolloutStatus/rollbackRollout/advanceRolloutPercentage` 以及 `bulkCreateTenants/bulkUpdateTenants/bulkDeleteTenants/bulkCreatePolicies/bulkAttachPolicies/bulkDomainLifecycle`; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/sdk/admin-sdk/admin-sdk-capability-surface.test.ts` directlylock定这些 API surface, 既有 `tests/unit/sdk/admin-sdk/bulk-ops-2285.test.ts` 继续lock定 bulk contract.  | 属于旧审计基线落后于现行 SDK 能力面, 本轮按源码与最小定向testing证据关闭.  |
| R21-38 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `plugin-test-harness.ts:196` | executePlugin 全是 mock hardcodedreturn;timeoutMs 存储但从不force | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause复核后分成两层: 第一, `timeoutMs` 早已via `Promise.race()` 真正生效, 原“只存不生效”的描述已过时; 第二, 真正missing口在于 `PluginTestHarness` 把 `PluginDefinition` 这类signature manifest 当成可execute runtime uses, 既没有 runtime binding, 也没有把 live 输入桥接到真实 `tool/retriever/validator/planner/presenter/evaluator/adapter` SPI, 因此 live 模式只能抛未implementationerror.  | 本轮在 `src/sdk/plugin-sdk/plugin-test-harness.ts` 中新增 `livePlugin/liveRunner` 绑定点, 把 manifest 与 executable runtime 分离: `executeLive()` 现在会优先走 `liveRunner`, 否则可把绑定的 `RegisteredPlugin` 按 `spiType` 分发到真实 `execute/retrieve/validate/suggestWorkflow/formatOutput/evaluate/authenticate` path; 同时补了 lifecycle prepare/activate/health check 与最小 `PluginContext`/`PluginLifecycleContext` 桥接, live 模式不再只能报 “not implemented”. `tests/unit/sdk/plugin-sdk/plugin-test-harness-regressions.test.ts` 本轮新增回归, 既验证 mock 模式 1ms timeout 仍会真实timeout, 也验证绑定 `DomainToolPlugin` 后 live 模式会return真实execute结果; 定向execute `./node_modules/.bin/tsx --test tests/unit/sdk/plugin-sdk/plugin-test-harness-regressions.test.ts` 结果为 `3 passed / 0 failed`.  | 本轮关闭basis是生产态 `PluginTestHarness` 已具备最小可用的 live runtime seam, 而不是继续停留在placeholdererror; 当前关闭rangeonlycoverage“testing harness 可绑定真实 runtime plugin/runner 并execute”的能力, 不外推为“已具备完整插件宿主平台”.  |
| R21-39 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `chinese-wall-access-saga.ts` | Stub saga -- 同 OrgGovernanceSaga,无实际编排/补偿 | 已解决 (源码复核/现有testing)  | Root Cause不是现行 `ChineseWallAccessSaga` 仍是空壳 stub, 而是复审条目停留在更早的placeholder认知; 当前implementation已经具备 prepare → commit → compensate → audit 四阶段编排, prepare/commit 对应validation, failurerollback, 反向补偿, execution log 和 handler context 传递.  | `src/org-governance/knowledge-boundary/chinese-wall-access-saga.ts` 当前implementation了 phase sort, `hasMatchingPrepareStep()`, `runCompensation()`, `executionLog`, `failedAction` 与补偿path; 现有 `tests/unit/org-governance/knowledge-boundary/chinese-wall-access-saga.test.ts` 和 `tests/unit/org-governance/chinese-wall-access-saga-extended.test.ts` 已coverage grant/release success流, commit failurerollback, prepare missingreject, 补偿逆序, audit 收尾, context 传播等path, 本轮复跑via.  | 属于现行 saga 已有真实编排与补偿能力, 旧审计结论未synchronous, 现关闭.  |
| R21-40 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P1 | `domain-registry-service.ts:76` | activate() onlyallows从 "registered" 转换 -- 无 canary 部署门 | 已解决 (源码复核/现有testing)  | Root Cause不是现行 `activate()` 仍然只accepts `registered -> active` 直切, 而是复审条目停留在 canary gate 引入之前; 当前implementation把激活拆成 `registered/updating/validated/testing -> canary` 与 `canary -> active` 两步, 并对skip canary 的pathexplicitly抛错.  | `src/domains/registry/domain-registry-service.ts` 当前 `activate(domainId, canary=true)` 会把 `registered/updating/validated/testing` 提升到 `canary`, 而 `activate(domainId, false)` onlyallows从 `canary/validated/testing` 进入 `active`; 现有 `tests/unit/domains/registry/domain-registry-service.test.ts` 和 `tests/unit/domains/registry/domain-lifecycle-state-machine.test.ts` 已验证 `registered -> canary -> active`, 非法skip canary 会报 `domain_registry.invalid_activation_state`.  | 属于 canary 部署门已经落地, 旧审计结论未更新, 现关闭.  |

| R21-42 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P2 | `route-engine/index.ts:256` | hardcoded FX rate 7.2 USD→CNY -- 应用汇率服务或configure | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行审批路由仍把 `7.2` 写死在runtime换算里, 而是复审条目停留在 legacy path 重构前; 当前implementation已引入 `ConfiguredFxRateProvider`, 环境变量configure和可替换 provider.  | `src/org-governance/approval-routing/route-engine/index.ts` 当前via `ConfiguredFxRateProvider`, `APPROVAL_ROUTE_USD_CNY_RATE` 和 `setFxRateProvider()/getFxRateProvider()` 解析汇率; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/org-governance/approval-routing/route-engine-fx-provider.test.ts`, 验证当环境configure为 `6.91` 时runtimereturn `6.91` 而不是hardcoded `7.2`.  | 属于汇率来源已可configure, 此前missing少directlyruntime证据, 现关闭.  |

| R21-45 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P2 | `builtin-plugin-registry.ts` | Plugin factories hardcoded -- 无dynamic加载/无 marketplace/无认证流程 | 已解决 (源码复核/testing补强)  | Root Cause不是现行 `builtin-plugin-registry.ts` 只有一组hardcoded builtin factories 而完全没有dynamic加载层, 而是复审条目停留在 `PluginMarketplaceRegistry` / `DynamicPluginLoader` 引入之前; 当前file除内建 factory 映射外, 已经implementation marketplace registry, dynamic source loader 注册, 会话认证和 marketplace entry manage.  | `src/plugins/builtin-plugin-registry.ts` 当前提供 `DynamicPluginLoader`, `PluginMarketplaceRegistry.registerLoader()/registerMarketplaceEntry()/authenticate()/loadPlugin()/listMarketplacePlugins()` 以及globally `getMarketplaceRegistry()`; 本轮复跑 `tests/unit/plugins/builtin-plugin-registry.test.ts` 与 `tests/unit/plugins/plugin-marketplace-registry.test.ts`, 验证dynamic loader 流程, 认证要求, unknown loader 报错, marketplace entry 枚举等path均via. 另synchronous修正了 `tests/unit/plugins/builtin-plugin-registry.test.ts` 中仍references旧 ID `plugin.core.basic-evaluator` 的staleassertion.  | 属于 marketplace dynamic加载和认证流程已落地, 此前审计结论和partialtesting样例未synchronous, 现关闭.  |
| R21-46 | §106 Org-governance / Domains / SDK / Plugins missing陷 | P2 | `plugin-definition.ts` | sbomRef accepts但从不验证 -- 无安全扫描 | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是现行代码完全没有 `verifySbomRef()` / scanner interface, 而是default `DefaultSbomScanner` 的真实取数链路missing: 旧implementation虽然会在 `definePlugin()` 中call SBOM validation, 但 `fetchSbom()` 对 `file://` 和 `http(s)://` 一律return `null`, 导致default安全扫描后端实际上无法读取和解析任何 SBOM content. 进一步复核还发现 `definePlugin()` 会把“扫描发现高危漏洞”误归类成“扫描failure”.  | 本轮在 `src/sdk/plugin-sdk/plugin-definition.ts` 为default scanner 补齐了 `file://` 读取, `http(s)://` 拉取, SPDX/CycloneDX JSON 解析, package/component 提取, 以及真实漏洞匹配path; 同时修正 `definePlugin()` 对 `scanErrors` 与 `critical/high vulnerabilities` 的分流handle. 新增/补强 `tests/unit/plugins/plugin-definition-security-regressions.test.ts`, 验证local `file://` SBOM 会被真实解析并检测出 `lodash/axios` 高危dependency, 且带高危漏洞的插件会被 `definePlugin()` directlyreject.  | 这是把“有validationentry但default后端不工作”的假安全扫描补成可execute扫描链路的真实修复, 现关闭.  |
| R21-47 | §107 Config Center / Bootstrap / Tests missing陷 | P0 | `config-center/ (missing)` | ConfigImpactAnalyzer 完全未implementation -- §24.4 要求为高risk config publish force门禁 | 已解决 | `ConfigImpactAnalyzer` 已经exists并能output severity / blast radius / rollout recommendation; 问题不再是“类完全missing”.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/config-center/config-impact-analyzer.ts` 已implementation `ConfigImpactAnalyzer.analyzeImpact()`, 并在 `index.ts` barrel 中导出; 本轮还补了 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/config-center/index.test.ts` 对导出面的assertion.  | 不改生产算法, only回写“implementation已exists”的basis.  |
| R21-48 | §107 Config Center / Bootstrap / Tests missing陷 | P0 | `config-drift-reconciler.ts:21-52` | Drift 不生成 config.drift_detected incident,安全/预算/egress/sandbox 类 drift 不 fail-closed | 已修复 (default启动链路接线, range限定)  | Root Cause已收敛为启动链路missing口而非算法missing: 旧 `ConfigDriftReconciler` 虽已能给出 `blocking` 级 finding, 但default `buildDefaultStartupConfigValidator()` 没有把runtime drift 合并进 startup gate, `bootstrapGovernanceServices()` / `bootstrapGovernanceServicesWithMetrics()` 也没有给default checker injection可落库的 event bus, 所以runtime `AA_*` 安全类coverage即使发生drift, 也不会在default治理启动path里形成 `config.drift_detected` incident 或 fail-closed. 补接线后又暴露出第二个真实问题: runtime filter最初过宽, 会把不属于 config bundle 的 `AA_*` 运行参数一并当成 drift source, 产生false positive.  | 现行 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/startup/startup-preflight.ts` 已新增runtime `AA_*` override 抽取, bundle baseline flatten 和 `buildRuntimeDriftIssues()`, 并且只比较 bundle 基线中exists的键, 再把 drift findings 合并进 `buildDefaultStartupConfigValidator()` 的 `issues`, 使安全类 drift directly让 startup preflight `ok=false` 且无关运行参数不false positive; `src/sdk/cli/governance-bootstrap.ts` 已在 `bootstrapGovernanceServices()` 与 `bootstrapGovernanceServicesWithMetrics()` 中为 `createDefaultStartupConsistencyCheckerOptions(...)` injection真实 `DurableEventBus`, 让default治理 checker 能把 drift 事件落到生产事件总线. `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/startup/startup-preflight.test.ts` 本轮新增并via回归: 验证 runtime `AA_APPROVAL_MODE` drift 会触发 `config.drift_detected` 且 fail-closed, 同时验证 `AA_DB_PATH` / `AA_ENVIRONMENT` 这类无关环境变量不会被false positive成 `config_drift.*`.  | 本轮动作是把 drift 检测从“file内可报告”补成“default startup / governance bootstrap 链路真实生效”的生产接线, 并用最小定向testing证明 incident 与 fail-closed 已进入defaultpath; 本结论onlycoverage当前已接入的 runtime `AA_*` override source, 不夸大为所有potential drift source 都已完全闭环.  |

| R21-51 | §107 Config Center / Bootstrap / Tests missing陷 | P0 | `config-rollout-service.ts (missing)` | Rollout 无 guardrail metrics(max_error_rate/latency_regression 等) -- 无autorollback | 已修复 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是 guardrail 阈值完全不exists, 而是 health check failure后只有“阻止继续 auto-progress”的半闭环: `getRolloutHealth()` returnplaceholder 0 值, failure指标没有被保留, 且没有在failure点auto触发 rollback.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/config-center/config-rollout-service.ts` 为 rollout persistence `lastObservedErrorRate/lastObservedLatencyRegression/lastObservedIncidentRate/lastHealthCheckReasons`, 并让 `recordHealthCheck()` 在failure时立即executeautorollback; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-control-plane/config-center/config-rollout-service-guardrails.test.ts` 已验证 health gate failure会从 `10%` autorollback到 `5%`, 同时 `getRolloutHealth()` return真实观测指标而非placeholder 0 值.  | 这是把 guardrail 从“只record/只blocks前进”补成“record + autorollback”的真实闭环, 现关闭.  |

| R21-71 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P1 | `artifact-model.ts:81` | publishStatus lifecycle preview→archived 变为 review→recalled -- 非 contract 值 | 已证伪 (源码与testing已满足)  | 现行 artifact plane 并没有 `review/recalled` 这一套生命周期; public schema 仍uses `draft/preview/published/archived`. 原条目references的是过时导出面.  | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/artifacts/artifact-model.ts` 中 `ArtifactRecordSchema.publishStatus` 与 `ArtifactBundleExtendedSchema.publishStatus` 都是 `draft/preview/published/archived`; 对应单测已coverage非法statereject.  | 不改代码, only回写现行 publish status 合同.  |
| R21-72 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P2 | `fingerprint-builder/index.ts:3-17` | BehaviorFingerprint missing subject_type/baseline_ref field | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  `BehaviorFingerprintBuilder` 之前只output hash 和归一化特征, 没有把 subject type和基线references提升为一等field, call方只能从 feature 字符串或外层上下文反推.  | 本轮在 `src/ops-maturity/drift-detection/fingerprint-builder/index.ts` 为 input/output 增加 `subjectType` 与 `baselineRef`, 并把二者写入 `normalizedFeatures`.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/ops-maturity/drift-detection/fingerprint-builder/index.test.ts` 现已assertion `subjectType/baselineRef` field和对应 normalized feature.  |
| R21-73 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P2 | `changepoint-detector/index.ts:19` | Drift response actions missing throttle/downgrade/rollback/freeze -- only有 observe/require_review/pause | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  drift detector 之前只暴露最粗粒度的 `observe/require_review/pause_agent`, 无法表达“先降速, 再降级, 再rollback/冻结”这条更细的response链.  | 本轮在 `src/ops-maturity/drift-detection/changepoint-detector/index.ts` 扩展 `DriftResponseActionType`, 并让 `detect()` 按 drift 强度output `throttle/downgrade/rollback/freeze`.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/ops-maturity/drift-detection/changepoint-detector/index.test.ts` 现已coverage high drift -> `freeze` 与 medium drift -> `downgrade`.  |
| R21-74 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P2 | `drift-detection/ (全目录)` | Contract canonical objects DriftSignal/DriftResponsePlan 无implementation -- only有 DriftSample | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 这条在复核时发现是“半真半假”: `DriftSignal` 其实早已exists, 但 `DriftResponsePlan` 确实没有落地到 changepoint 层public导出, 因此 contract object 只完成了一半.  | 本轮在 `src/ops-maturity/drift-detection/changepoint-detector/index.ts` 补入 `DriftResponsePlan`, 并新增 `buildResponsePlan(...)` 生成主动作, fallback actions, guardrails, baselineRef 和 linkedSignalId.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/ops-maturity/drift-detection/changepoint-detector/index.test.ts` 新增 response plan constructionassertion.  |
| R21-75 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P2 | `context-compaction-service.ts:229-233` | CompactionRecord missing covered_message_range | 已证伪 (源码已满足)  | 原条目停留在 compaction record 还没把 message range 接进 truth record 的阶段; 现行服务已经在 trim/summarize 两条record上都写入 `coveredMessageRange`.  | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/execution-engine/context-compaction-service.ts` 当前在 stage1/stage2 `CompactionRecord` 上都回填 `coveredMessageRange: options.coveredMessageRange ?? null`.  | 不改代码, only回写现行 compaction record field.  |
| R21-76 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P2 | `context-compaction-service.ts:78-89` | FeedbackSignal/LearningObject 摘要未列为 protected_parts -- 可被压缩删除 | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  `isProtectedMessage()` 之前只保护 `user_request/assistant_plan/approval_decision/compaction_summary`, feedback 与 learning 摘要仍会进入 trim/summarize 候选集.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/execution-engine/context-compaction-service.ts` 把 `feedback_signal`, `learning_object`, `learning_object_summary` 加入保护列表.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/execution-engine/context-compaction-service-detailed.test.ts` 新增 `protects feedback and learning summaries from compaction`.  |
| R21-77 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P2 | `context-compaction-service.ts:279-289` | kvCacheFixedPrefixCacheKey 声明但从不填充 | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  compaction service 之前只声明了 `kvCacheFixedPrefixCacheKey/kvCacheDomainBlockCacheKey` 两个return槽位, 但在 stage1/stage2 完成后没有对fixed前缀层和 domain block 层content做任何 key 计算.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/execution-engine/context-compaction-service.ts` 以 SHA-256 对fixed前缀content和非前缀对话content分别计算 `kvCacheFixedPrefixCacheKey/kvCacheDomainBlockCacheKey` 并写回结果; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/execution-engine/context-compaction-service-detailed.test.ts` 新增两条assertion, 验证 KV cache key 会被真实填充且length为 64.  | 关闭的是 key 声明未赋值问题.  |
| R21-78 | §108 Contract 文档 vs implementation偏差 | P2 | `stream-bridge.ts` | 无 transport state tracking(connected/reconnecting/failed) -- violates gateway_streaming §10 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 原条目停留在 transport state 尚未接入 replay bridge 的旧快照; 现行 `StreamBridge` 已有 per-stream transport state map, 只是 reaudit 没有补回证据.  | `src/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.ts` 当前已声明 `TransportState`, `transportStateByStream`, `getTransportState()`, `setTransportState()`, 并在 `closeStream()/dispose()` 中cleanup; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-interface/channel-gateway/stream-bridge.test.ts` 本轮新增 transport state 跟踪与 close cleanup回归并via.  | 不改生产代码, only回写现行 runtime 证据.  |
| R22-01 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P0 | `auth/token-manager.ts:4` | Token 存储在 JS 变量中 -- 刷新即loss,无安全存储集成 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause分两层: 早期 `TokenManager` 确实只有process内 session; subsequent虽然补了 `sessionStorage`, 但 runtime entry还没有把default token 存储与 `PlatformAdapter.secureStorage` 串起来, 所以复审仍保守挂账.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/auth/src/token-manager.ts` default已从 `sessionStorage` 读写会话; 本轮又在 `ui/packages/shared/state/src/index.ts` 让default `TokenManager` uses `sessionStorage + PlatformAdapter.secureStorage` 镜像存储, 并在 `UiRuntimeProvider` 启动时于 `sessionStorage` 为空时从平台安全存储回填 session. `ui/apps/web/src/app-shell.tsx` 也已把 `platformAdapter` 明确传入 runtime.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/shared/auth-sync-state.test.ts` 新增回归, directly验证only在 `platformAdapter` secure store 中exists session 时, runtime 启动后仍会恢复认证态并把 session 回填到 `sessionStorage`.  |
| R22-02 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P0 | `auth/auth-service.ts:36-39` | handleSsoCallback 从 URL 直读 token -- 无 PKCE(code_verifier/code_challenge/authorization code) | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause与 `R16-48/2069` 同源: 复审条目沿用了 URL token callback 的旧implementation认知, 没有吸收subsequent PKCE authorization code flow 改造.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/auth/src/auth-service.ts` 的 `handleSsoCallback()` 已不消费 URL 中的 `access_token/refresh_token`, 而是directly跳转到 authorization flow; `handleAuthorizationCallback()` 只accepts `code/state` 并validation待handle flow. `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/auth-service.test.ts` 已coverage“不accepts URL token, 未configure exchange handler 时 fail-closed, 按 code flow 完成交换”, 定向testing已via.  | 关闭的是“从 URL 明文接收 token”missing陷, 不外推为完整 OAuth 服务端交换链路都已完工.  |
| R22-03 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P0 | `platform/web-platform-adapter.ts:9-13` | readSecureValue/writeSecureValue 用 localStorage -- XSS can read token,§6 明确禁止 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause复核后发现, 这条挂账references的是旧版 web adapter 认知; 现行 secure storage 已不落 `localStorage`, 而是fallback到 `DefaultPlatformAdapter` 的in-memory `MemorySecureStore`, 前次 reaudit 只是没有补上针对性验证.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/platform/src/base-platform-adapter.ts` 的 `readSecureValue()/writeSecureValue()` 只读写process内 `MemorySecureStore`; `ui/packages/shared/platform/src/web-platform-adapter.ts` 也不再覆写 secure storage 到 `localStorage`, 只把非敏感的 analytics consent 留在 `localStorage`.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/shared/web-platform-security-regressions.test.ts` 证明 `writeSecureValue("token", ...)` 后 `window.localStorage` 不会出现 `aa.secure.*` 明文; 本轮 `npm test -- tests/shared/web-platform-security-regressions.test.ts` via.  |
| R22-04 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P0 | `api-client/ws-client.ts:100-104` | onclose 设 "reconnecting" 但从不实际重连 -- 无重连逻辑/指数backoff/重试定时器 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是“现行代码完全没有重连逻辑”, 而是该条沿用了旧快照; 当前 `BrowserWSClient` 早已有 `scheduleReconnect()`, 指数backoff和重连定时器, 只是前次 reaudit 在没有 UI 定向验证前保守保留挂账. 真正missing的一步是silently断连探测, 这一partial由 `R22-11` 的 heartbeat 修复补齐.  | `ui/packages/shared/api-client/src/ws-client.ts` 现有 `calculateBackoffDelay()`, `scheduleReconnect()` 与 `doConnect()` 闭环: `onclose/onerror` 都会转入重连path, 并保留指数backoff与 jitter.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/shared/api-client-runtime-regressions.test.ts` 与 `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/ws-client.test.ts` 均验证连接关闭后会创建新 socket 且触发重连; 本轮 `npm test -- tests/shared/api-client-runtime-regressions.test.ts tests/unit/ui/shared/ws-client.test.ts` via.  |
| R22-05 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P0 | `api-client/ws-client.ts:88` | Auth token 作为 URL query param -- 暴露在log/代理/浏览器历史中 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 审计条目停留在 token 拼 URL 的旧implementation, 没有吸收subsequent把认证改为 WebSocket subprotocol + 首帧 auth message 的改造.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/api-client/src/ws-client.ts` 建连时usesfixed subprotocol `v1.auth.token`, 并在 `onopen` 后发送 `{"action":"auth","token":...}` 首帧; URL 本身不再带 token.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/shared/api-client-runtime-regressions.test.ts` 与 `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/ws-client.test.ts` 都assertion URL 不含 token 且首条消息才携带 token; 本轮定向testing已via.  |
| R22-06 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P0 | `web/feature-registry.ts:1-27` | 27个 feature 全static导入无 lazy loading -- violates §10 bundle<200KB | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause与 `R7-1/R16-68` 同源: 旧结论把 registry 里的 lazy wrapper, route metadata 和壳层加载entry割裂看待, 导致已exists的 `React.lazy` 仍被误记为“全static导入”.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/src/feature-registry.ts` 中 feature 组件按 lazy path 注册, 且 `route.codeSplit` 现已统一为 `true`; `ui/apps/web/src/app-shell.tsx` 也已补上 `Suspense`.  | 作为duplicate挂账, 随 route-level code split 修复一并关闭; 本轮相关定向testing已via.  |
| R22-07 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P0 | `api-client/interceptors.ts:62-76` | Offline queue interceptor 入队后仍放行原始request -- request会网络failure | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause与 `R16-59/R28-37` 同源: 旧离线拦截器只负责 enqueue, 不会短路subsequent transport dispatch.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/api-client/src/interceptors.ts` 的 `createOfflineQueueInterceptor()` 在离线非 GET request入队后会directlythrows `rest.offline:Request queued for offline sync`, 从而阻断网络层; `ui/tests/shared/api-client-runtime-regressions.test.ts` 已验证 enqueue 后 transport 不会被call, 本轮定向testing已via.  | 作为duplicate挂账, 随离线短路修复一并关闭.  |
| R22-08 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `state/stores/ (全部4个)` | Zustand stores 无 middleware(persist/devtools/immer) -- §4 要求全部三种 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause复核后分成两段: 一是历史上 store 只零散接了 `persist`, `devtools` 没有统一化; 二是本轮尝试directly引入外部 `immer` dependency时被现有dependency解析问题阻断, 导致“draft middleware”长期没有真正落地. 为避免被外部包解析卡死而继续挂账, 本轮把missing的能力下沉成仓内统一 middleware, 而不是继续停留在文档解释.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/state/src/stores/middleware.ts` 已concentratedimplementation `withPersistDevtoolsDraft()`, 统一把 `persist + devtools + draft-style producer` 套到 `auth-store`, `notification-store`, `realtime-store`, `sync-store`, `theme-store`, `ui-store` 六个 shared store; 这些 store 的写path也已改成 draft mutation 形式. 新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/state-store-middleware.test.ts` 已验证 auth/realtime/notification/sync/theme/ui 六类 store 都能在保留 persist 能力的同时via draft-style 更新state.  | 关闭的是“missing统一 middleware 标准化与 draft 能力”这一implementationmissing口; 这里采用的是仓内 draft middleware, 而不是强dependency外部 `immer` 包.  |
| R22-09 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `auth/auth-service.ts:7-14` | login() 无 token refresh 逻辑 -- §6 要求 sliding-window 刷新 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 前次复核把 `AuthService.login()` 当成 refresh owner, 但现行刷新职责实际在 `TokenManager`: `AuthService` 只负责种下 session, subsequent token 读取与 sliding-window 刷新都由 `TokenManager.getAccessTokenWithRefresh()` 负责.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/auth/src/token-manager.ts` 已implementation `shouldRefresh()` 与 `getAccessTokenWithRefresh()`, default在expiry前 60 秒进入 refresh window, 并用 `refreshPromise` 做concurrentdeduplication; `ui/packages/shared/auth/src/auth-service.ts` 继续via组合 `TokenManager` uses这条刷新链.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/auth-service.test.ts` 已验证 token 进入 60 秒window时concurrentcall只会 refresh 一次, 且会写回新的 access/refresh token; 本轮定向testing已via.  |
| R22-10 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `auth/session-guard.ts` | 无 session timeout warning -- expirydirectly抛异常无预警 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `SessionGuard` 过去只有 `requireAuthenticated()` 这类 fail-after-expiry interface, 没有“即将expiry”的explicitly信号, runtime也没有把即将expirystate传播到 UI notification层.  | 本轮在 `ui/packages/shared/auth/src/session-guard.ts` 增加 `getTimeoutWarning()`, default在到期前 5 分钟return结构化 warning; 同时在 `ui/packages/shared/state/src/index.ts` 的 `UiRuntimeProvider` 中接入轮询check, 并via `notificationStore` 发送 `"Session expiring soon"` 告警.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/shared/auth-sync-state.test.ts` 新增回归用例, 验证 token 距expiry 4 分钟时runtime会产出 session timeout warning, 而不是等expiry后才抛 `auth.session_required`.  |
| R22-11 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `api-client/ws-client.ts:73-170` | 无 heartbeat/ping-pong -- silently断开不可检测 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `BrowserWSClient` 之前虽然在explicitly `close/error` 时会重连, 但missing少应用层 heartbeat; 连接若被silently掐断, 客户端没有任何定时探针去触发 `close()`, 重连链也就无法启动.  | 本轮在 `ui/packages/shared/api-client/src/ws-client.ts` 为 `BrowserWSClient` 增加 `heartbeatIntervalMs/heartbeatTimeoutMs` configure, 定时 `{"action":"ping"}`, `pong` clear deadline 以及timeout主动 `close()` 逻辑, 从而把“silently断开检测”接入现有重连链.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/ws-client.test.ts` 新增 heartbeat 用例, 分别验证“missing pong 时发送 ping 并触发重连”和“收到 pong 时清掉 deadline 不误判重连”; 本轮定向testing已via.  |
| R22-12 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `api-client/interceptors.ts:29-37` | Auth interceptor 捕获static string token -- refresh 后发送expiry token | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root Cause与 `R16-46` 相同: auth interceptor 曾保留static token compatibilitybranch, 导致 refresh 后仍可能走旧 bearer.  | 本轮已把 `ui/packages/shared/api-client/src/interceptors.ts` 收紧为只acceptsdynamic resolver/TokenManager, 并对字符串输入 fail-closed; `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/interceptors.test.ts` 已验证static string 会被reject, 定向testing已via.  | 作为duplicate挂账一并关闭.  |
| R22-13 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `web/app-shell.tsx:58-108` | 无 per-feature error boundary -- 单 feature crash 击穿全应用 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause与 `R16-66/R28-32` 同源: 旧壳层没有error边界wrapper feature 渲染, duplicate挂账未synchronous现行 `AppErrorBoundary`.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/src/app-shell.tsx` 已用 `AppErrorBoundary` wrapped `AppRouter/AppFrame`, 并提供 `Retry/Report Issue` fallback; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/shared/web-app-shell-auth-regression.test.tsx`, 验证 feature 组件抛错时会显示error边界 UI, 定向testing已via.  | 作为duplicate挂账, 随error边界实装一并关闭.  |
| R22-14 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `web/app-shell.tsx:8-22` | demoGuardContext hardcoded全permissions -- 生产环境bypass真实 auth | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause仍与 `2164` 相同: 旧壳层guard输入长期是hardcoded的全permissions demo 上下文, subsequent真实 authContext 接线完成后, duplicate条目没有synchronous清掉.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/src/app-shell.tsx` 已removal demo guard 常量, 改为按 `authContext` dynamicconstruction guard context; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/shared/web-app-shell-auth-regression.test.tsx`, 验证 guard context 吃到的是传入tenant, 角色和permissions, 定向testing已via.  | 作为duplicate挂账, 随现行dynamic guard implementation一并关闭.  |
| R22-15 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `web/public/aa-sw.js:27-31` | ServiceWorker sync handler 是 no-op -- §7 要求 background sync replay offline queue | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 早期 service worker 的 `sync` handle器确实只是 no-op, placeholder声明了 background sync, 但离线队列从未被真正回放.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/public/aa-sw.js` 已在 `sync` 事件中按 `aa-sync-offline` tag call `replayOfflineQueue()`, 并从 IndexedDB 读取 `offline-queue` 后replayrequest, success后删除已synchronous mutation; `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/web/aa-sw.test.ts` 现已验证 sync 会真实replay队列并删除successrecord.  | 作为 `1928` 的duplicate挂账一并关闭, 不外推为完整离线 UX 已全部产品化.  |
| R22-16 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `sync/offline-queue.ts:19-21` | enqueue 不 await readyPromise -- IndexedDB 水合可coverage已入队项 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 旧 `enqueue()` 在初始 `readAll()` 完成前即可修改队列并触发 persist, IndexedDB 水合return后可能coverage刚入队的 mutation.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/sync/src/offline-queue.ts` 的 `enqueue()` 已先 `await this.readyPromise` 再写队列并persistence; `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/offline-queue.test.ts` 现已验证在 ready barrier 完成前 mutation 不会提前可见, 完成后才入队persistence, 本轮定向testing已via.  | 关闭的是 IndexedDB 初始水合coverage问题, 不外推为所有浏览器生命周期丢写risk都已完全消除.  |
| R22-17 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `sync/conflict-resolver.ts:15-26` | mergeValues shallow spread local wins -- 无 LWW timestamp/OT | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 `mergeValues()` 对对象只做 shallow spread, 对array只做 concat, 同一实体conflict时会fixed采用local值或duplicate追加array项, missing少最基本的 LWW/version merge.  | 本轮在 `ui/packages/shared/sync/src/conflict-resolver.ts` 增加based on `lamport/version/clock/updatedAt` 的 recency 比较, 并对对象array按 `id/key/name` 做 item-level merge; `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/conflict-resolver.test.ts` 已coverage timestamp/LWW 与arraydeduplication合并.  | 关闭的是 shared sync merge 语义missing口, 不外推为完整 CRDT system.  |
| R22-18 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `telemetry/index.ts:16-47` | only structured event -- missing performance marks/error boundary reporting/user journey | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 `TelemetrySink` 只有 append-and-fire 结构化事件, 没有缓冲, 周期 flush, consent gate, dead letter, 也没有把 vitals/perf marks 统一到同一 telemetry surface.  | 本轮重写 `ui/packages/shared/telemetry/src/index.ts`: 补入 `TelemetrySinkOptions`, buffer/flush/retry/dead-letter 生命周期, `measureDuration()` performance marks, `startWebVitalsCollection()` 与 scoped recorder; `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/telemetry.test.ts` 已coverage consent, buffer upper limit, flush/retry/dead letter 与 web vitals 采集.  | 关闭的是 telemetry runtime surface missing口, 不外推为full OTEL tracing 已完工.  |
| R22-19 | §110 UI Shared Packages 深层missing陷 | P1 | `telemetry/index.ts:78-92` | OTLP exporter 把 logs 放 scopeMetrics[].logs -- 无效格式,collector 会丢弃 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧导出器按 metrics payload 拼装log, uses了无效的 `scopeMetrics[].logs` 结构, collector 无法按 OTLP logs 规范解析.  | 本轮将 `ui/packages/shared/telemetry/src/index.ts` 的 OTLP payload 改为 `resourceLogs[].scopeLogs[].logRecords[]`, 同时要求authorization头并把 attributes 序列化成 OTLP any-value; `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/telemetry.test.ts` 已assertion `resourceLogs` 结构与 `service.name` 资源属性.  | 关闭的是 OTLP logs 编码error, 不外推为 collector 端多tenantstrategy都已交付.  |
