| R22-39 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `cas/fencing-token-service.ts` | validateFencingToken 按"-"split 但 ID 可含"-" -- 解析error | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 这条是本轮confirmation的真实解析missing陷: 旧 token 采用 `-` 连接 executionId/nodeId/counter/timestamp, executionId 或 nodeId 一旦本身带 `-`, 验证阶段就会错拆 owner 与 executionId.  | 本轮已把 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.ts` 的 token 编码切为 `::` 分隔并做 URL 编码/decodevalidation, 消除了带连字符 ID 的歧义; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.test.ts` 已新增 hyphenated executionId/nodeId 回归.  | 这是实修 token 编码contract.  |
| R22-40 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `cas/fencing-token-service.ts (acquireFence)` | expiresAt 永远 null -- expiry fence 永久blocks新获取 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 这条同样是真missing口: 旧 `acquireFence()` 创建的 fence `expiresAt` 恒为 `null`, process内 fence 一旦remaining就不会自然淘汰.  | 本轮已在 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.ts` 为新 fence 加入default TTL, 并在 `acquireFence()/isFenceHeld()/getFenceInfo()/getActiveFenceCount()` 前统一executeexpirycleanup; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.test.ts` 已synchronous验证 `expiresAt` 不再为空.  | 这是实修 fence 生命周期, 不是单改comment.  |
| R22-41 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `cas/fencing-token-service.ts` | static activeFences 是processlocal Map -- 非分布式,violates分布式 fencing | 已解决 (SQLite shared后端 + PostgreSQL 分布式后端)  | Root Cause先前确实是 fencing 只dependencyprocess内state; 上一轮虽已补出 SQLite shared仓库, 但仍missing真正面向跨节点部署的分布式存储后端, 而且简单“把表persistence”还不够, 因为 exclusive fence 获取需要transaction内serial化, 否则多节点concurrent仍可能双持有.  | 本轮新增 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/postgres-fence-repository.ts` 与 `postgres-fencing-token-service.ts`, via PostgreSQL `fence_records` 表和 `pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext(executionId))` 在transaction内serial化同一 execution 的 fence 获取/释放; 同时补入 PG migration `16` (`artifact_node_run_and_fencing`) 创建 `fence_records` 并为 artifacts 增加 `node_run_id`. 定向验证 `tests/integration/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/postgres-fencing-token-service.test.ts` 已证明两个 service 实例在同一 PG backend 上会shared exclusive/shared fence state和计数; `tests/integration/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/sqlite-fence-repository.test.ts` 也继续via.  | 关闭的是“没有真正跨节点 fencing backend”的问题. 保留说明: process内 `FencingTokenService` 仍可作为单机/testingimplementationexists, 但不再是唯一分布式方案, 因此本编号不再保持开放.  |
| R22-42 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `durable-event-bus.ts (retry)` | attempt <= MAX execute MAX+1 次 -- off-by-one | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 这条是本轮confirmation的真实missing口: 旧循环从 `attempt = 0` 跑到 `<= MAX_DELIVERY_RETRIES`, 实际会execute `MAX+1` 次 handler call.  | 本轮已把 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` 的重试循环改成 `attempt = 1; attempt <= MAX_DELIVERY_RETRIES; attempt++`, 并synchronous把 backoff index 调整为 `attempt - 1`; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.test.ts` 现已directlyassertionfailure handler 恰好execute 3 次.  | 这是实修重试次数contract.  |
| R22-43 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `budget-allocator.ts` | 无层级预算(platform→domain→task) -- only flat ledger | 已修复 (层级账本链路已补齐; persistence另见 R22-35)  | Root Cause曾经真实exists: `BudgetAllocator` 只有 `BudgetTier`/`tierLimit` 上下文, 却没有任何父子 ledger 关系和祖先级联更新entry, 因此层级预算只是configure概念, 不是可execute账本链路.  | 本轮在 contract 与 allocator 两侧补齐层级账本表达: `src/platform/contracts/executable-contracts/index.ts` 的 `BudgetLedger` / `createBudgetLedger(...)` 已支持 `tier / scopeKey / parentBudgetLedgerId`; `src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts` 的 `reserve()/settle()/release()` 已支持 `hierarchyLedgers` 输入, 并对祖先 ledger executesynchronous reservation/settlement/release 更新; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-allocator.test.ts` 已新增并via `hierarchical ledgers reserve and settle together`.  | 关闭的是“allocator 完全只有 flat ledger, 无法级联预算”的missing口; `R22-35` 里的persistence CAS/仓储写回问题仍保持开放, 不把两条混为一谈.  |
| R22-44 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `budget-allocator.ts` | 无 watermark alerts | 已解决 | 原审计对应的是 `BudgetAllocator` 只保留 watermark configure, 却没有真正发出事件的旧state.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts` 已持有 `events` 端口, 并在归一化上下文后实际call `emitWatermarkAlert` / `emitAutoThrottleEvent`; 相关 `budget-allocator` 定向回归本轮已via.  | 不改主逻辑, only回写现行 watermark/auto-throttle 证据.  |
| R22-45 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `circuit-breaker.ts (getState)` | 读state有副作用(open→half_open 转换) -- side-effecting getter | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 真实Root cause: state推进职责放错了位置: 旧implementation把“到达 probe window后可进入 half_open”这件事塞进了 `getState()` 读取path里, 导致任何观测行为都会隐式改写 breaker stateconcurrent出state迁移事件.  | 本轮已在 `src/platform/model-gateway/provider-registry/circuit-breaker.ts` 把 `getState()` 改成based on `computeReadableState()` 的纯读取; 真正的 `open → half_open` state推进只在 `canExecute()` allows probe 时, 或 `onSuccess()/onFailure()` 接收 probe 结果时via `promoteToHalfOpenIfProbeWindowExpired()` 发生. 定向testing `tests/unit/platform/model-gateway/provider-registry/circuit-breaker.test.ts` 已新增 “getState is a pure read” 回归, 并连同 `tests/unit/platform/model-gateway/circuit-breaker.test.ts`, `tests/integration/platform/model-gateway/provider-registry/circuit-breaker-integration.test.ts` 验证现有 half-open/probe/close 流程未fallback.  | 已改生产代码并补最小回归, 修的是 getter 副作用本身, 不是只改testing表述.  |
| R22-46 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `circuit-breaker.ts (getRecentFailureRate)` | (failures/windowSec)\*10 公式 -- 3次/60s=50% 过易 trip | 已解决 | 原审计描述的是一版已经被修掉的error公式.  | 当前 `src/platform/model-gateway/provider-registry/circuit-breaker.ts` 的 `getRecentFailureRate()` 已按window内 `recentFailures / (recentFailures + recentSuccesses)` 计算真实failure率; `tests/unit/platform/model-gateway/provider-registry/circuit-breaker.test.ts` 也directlycoverage了 `25% / 50% / >50%` 的阈值行为.  | 不改生产代码, only回写现行failure率算法basis.  |
| R22-47 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `failure-classification.ts` | 用 L1/L2/L3 而非 spec 的 transient/permanent/unknown | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root Cause不只是名称stale, 而是恢复分类把内部 `L1/L2/L3` directly暴露成对外 contract, 导致 `shouldEscalate()`, testing和诊断文案都围绕 legacy 桶名coupling; 顺手复核时又发现若干真实匹配优先级问题 (如 `E7_LockTimeout`, `typeMismatch`, `schema_migration`, `security_policy_violation`) 会被error分类.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/recovery/failure-classification.ts` 已把 `FailureLevel` 收敛为 `transient/permanent/unknown`, 同时保留 `legacyLevel` compatibility历史证据; `shouldEscalate()` 已改按 canonical 等级决策, 并修正 camelCase/优先级误分类. 定向回归位于 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/recovery/failure-classification.test.ts`.  | 已改生产代码与定向testing, 修的是 contract 与分类逻辑本身.  |
| R22-48 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P1 | `execution-lease-service-async.ts (releaseLeaseSync)` | 不check lease.status !== "active" -- 可释放已释放的 lease | 已解决 | 原审计没有复核 release path 已补的活dynamic与expiry双重validation.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.ts` 的 `releaseLeaseSync()` 会先check `lease.status !== "active"` 并阻断, 再做expiryvalidation与transaction内二次 re-check, 避免释放已释放/已失效 lease.  | 不改生产代码, only回写现行 lease release 门禁basis.  |
| R22-49 | §111 Event Bus / State / Execution 深层missing陷 | P2 | `durable-event-bus.ts (DLQ)` | 标记 "failed" 非 "dead_lettered" -- 不与 DlqService 集成 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 这条是本轮confirmation的真实missing口: 旧 `deliverOneWithResult()` 在耗尽后只把 ack 标成 `failed`, 虽然会call `DlqService.enqueue()`, 但主 ack state并没有进入 terminal `dead_lettered`.  | 本轮已把 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` 改为在重试耗尽后call `markEventDeadLettered()`, 同时保留 `DlqService.enqueue()`; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.test.ts` 已验证 ack 终态为 `dead_lettered`.  | 这是实修 DLQ 终态语义与集成.  |

| R23-01 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §114 NL Gateway / Interaction / Autonomy missing陷 | P0 | `nl-gateway/index.ts:722-762` | 未confirmation高risk TaskSpec 即生成 RequestEnvelope -- §39.6 要求only confirmed 才可 dispatch | 已解决 (源码复核/testing回写)  | 旧条目把两种path混淆了: 真正要阻断的是 `pending_user_confirmation` 高riskpath, 而不是所有 `confirmationReceipt.state !== "confirmed"` 的场景都一律拦截.  | 当前 `src/interaction/nl-gateway/index.ts` 在 `buildTask()` 中via `shouldEmitEnvelope = !confirmationRequired` 收紧为“只要还在confirmation门内就不发 envelope”; 高risk `pending_user_confirmation` 会return `requestEnvelope: null`, 低risk `not_required` 则可directly发出 dispatch artifact. `tests/unit/interaction/nl-gateway/request-envelope-confirmation-gate.test.ts` 与本轮修正后的 `unconfirmed-high-risk-dispatch.test.ts` 已分别coverage高risk阻断和低risk放行.  | 回写 confirmation gate 的现行语义, 关闭旧的“未confirmation高risk也会 dispatch”指控.  |

| R25-37 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §127 UI Mobile / Charts / Feature Mutations missing陷 | P0 | `task-cockpit/hooks:58-78` | mutation only setState 无 API call -- optimistic update with rollback 完全missing(同 workflow/approval) | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 复核后发现这条混了两代问题: 最近源码其实已经会call `updateTask(...)`, 但的确仍是“等 API success后再改localstate”的悲观写法, 没有optimistic更新与failurerollback.  | 本轮把 `claimTask/resumeTask/escalateTask` 都改成先更新localtask与 timeline, 再call `updateTask(...)`; 若后端failure, 会rollback `tasks/timelineItems/timelineEvents` 到call前快照, 不再出现“界面已改但failure后卡在errorstate”或“完全无 rollback”的问题.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/task-cockpit/hooks.test.tsx` 既验证三条 mutation 会命中真实 REST helper, 也新增回归coverage API failure时 owner/status/timeline 会恢复到原值.  |

| R26-01 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §129 Dispatch / Delegation / Lease missing陷 | P0 | `context-isolator.ts:175` | Division by zero: parent 0 actions→Infinity→匹配>=0.9→授予 FULL permissions | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 原missing陷来自 `determineIsolationLevel()` 在 parent actions 为空时directly做比值计算, 导致 FULL 判定旁路.  | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/context-isolator.ts` 现对 `parentActionCount === 0` 单独branchhandle, 不再让零动作 parent 走 FULL 提权path.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r26-01-11.test.ts` directlyassertion零动作 parent 只会落到 `MINIMAL`, 不会授予 FULL.  |

| R26-03 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §129 Dispatch / Delegation / Lease missing陷 | P1 | `context-isolator.ts:216-220` | MINIMAL 隔离在 resources/actions 为空时fallback到 parent 全部permissions -- permissions提升 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 原 `intersectLists()` 的空 child branch会把 MINIMAL 空requestfallback成 parent full资源/动作, 形成permissions提升.  | 本轮把 `MINIMAL` branchexplicitly改为“空request即空authorization”, only在request非空时对 parent 做交集收缩.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r26-01-11.test.ts` directlyassertion空 `resources/actions` 不再fallback parent.  |
| R26-04 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §129 Dispatch / Delegation / Lease missing陷 | P1 | `context-isolator.ts:151` | mergePermissions 不取交集 -- override resources 可超出 base range | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 原问题属真实越权面: override 资源集如果不与 base 交集, child 可以声明 base 未authorization的 resource.  | `mergePermissions()` 现对 `resources` 做严格交集, 并保留 actions / constraints 的收敛逻辑.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r26-01-11.test.ts` directlyassertion override 中超出 base 的 resource 会被剔除.  |
| R26-05 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §129 Dispatch / Delegation / Lease missing陷 | P1 | `context-isolator.ts:281-289` | mergeDomainLists denied 域用交集而非并集 -- denied 域可被丢弃 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 原问题属真实域约束lossrisk; 此外本轮也顺手把 allowed domains 收紧为交集, 避免“allows域放大”.  | `context-isolator.ts` 现split `mergeAllowedDomains()` 与 `mergeDeniedDomains()`: allowed 取交集, denied 取并集.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r26-01-11.test.ts` directlyassertion denied 域会保留并集结果.  |

| R26-25 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §130 Compliance / Gateway / Eval missing陷 | P2 | `compliance-case-orchestration-service.ts` | governance call无 try/catch -- 异常中断整个合规流程 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 审计文案和真实missing陷有偏差: 当前代码其实已有 try/catch, 但 catch 后return `null`, 会让subsequent `governance?.allowed ?? true` 走 fail-open.  | 本轮已把 `src/platform/compliance/compliance-case-orchestration-service.ts` 改为在 governance 未configure, return空值或抛异常时统一construction denied `ComplianceEvaluationResult`, 并附带 `governance_evaluator_unconfigured / governance_evaluation_failed` reason code; `tests/unit/platform/compliance/compliance-case-orchestration-service.test.ts` 与 `compliance-case-orchestration-service-fail-closed.test.ts` 已验证 transfer / erasure 都会 fail-closed.  | 关闭 governance 评估异常或missing时的 fail-open 问题.  |

| R26-27 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §130 Compliance / Gateway / Eval missing陷 | P2 | `fallback/index.ts` | attemptedProfiles 含未尝试的 provider -- mislead重试逻辑 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 原问题属真实回放链false positive: 旧 `attemptedProfiles` directly拿所有 candidates, 混入了从未真正进入选择链的 provider.  | 本轮已把 `src/platform/model-gateway/fallback/index.ts` 的 `attemptedProfiles` 收紧为 `[primary, selected]` 或 `[primary]`, 完整候选order另存到 `fallbackChain`; `tests/unit/platform/model-gateway/fallback/index.test.ts` 已新增 selected-chain 回归.  | 关闭 attemptedProfiles 混入未尝试 provider 的问题.  |
| R26-28 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §130 Compliance / Gateway / Eval missing陷 | P2 | `cross-provider-judge-service.ts` | "fastest" strategy实为 "cheapest" (按 cost sort)  | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 原问题属真实strategy退化: 旧 `fastest` branchdirectly回落到 `judges[0]`, 而 `suggestJudges()` 的defaultorder本质上是按成本sort.  | 本轮已在 `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/cross-provider-judge-service.ts` 增加 `estimateLatencyRank()`, 让 `"fastest"` 按 model/profile latency heuristic sort, 而不是复用 cheapest order; `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/eval/cross-provider-judge-service.test.ts` 已新增 `fastest strategy does not degenerate to cheapest` 回归.  | 关闭 `"fastest"` 实际等于 `"cheapest"` 的问题.  |
| R26-29 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §130 Compliance / Gateway / Eval missing陷 | P2 | `dashboard-projection-service.ts` | attention queue 按 createdAt sort非 priority -- 紧急事项被埋没 | 已解决 (源码/testing; 原定位偏差一并收敛)  | Root cause:  attention queue 的真实implementation位于 `src/interaction/dashboard/index.ts`, 而不是审计表中标的 `dashboard-projection-service.ts`; 该implementation早已按 `priority` sort, 但 alert-router 的同优先级次序与聚合层inconsistent, 导致行为看起来仍有drift.  | 本轮confirmation `DashboardAggregationService.buildAttentionQueue()` 先按 `priority` 后按 `createdAt` sort, 并把 `src/interaction/dashboard/alert-router/index.ts` 收敛为同样的“高优先级优先, 同优先级最新在前”规则; `tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/index.test.ts`, `tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/alert-router.test.ts` 与新增 `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r26-29-44.test.ts` 已coverage.  | 关闭“紧急事项被 createdAt 埋没”的问题, 同时消除 dashboard 和notification路由的sort分叉.  |

"unknown" 掩盖 required fieldmissing -- silently生成坏data | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 原问题属 evidence collector 的输入validationmissing: source/artifactRef missing时会被 `unknown/unspecified` silently兜底, pollute证据链.  | 本轮在 `src/org-governance/compliance-engine/evidence-collector.ts` 引入 `firstNonBlank()` 并改为对missing source 或 artifact context directlythrows `compliance_evidence.source_required / artifact_ref_required`; `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r27-57-66.test.ts` 已验证坏输入会被reject.  | 关闭 compliance evidence collector silently生成坏data的问题.  |

| R28-03 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §139 State-Evidence / Repository SQL missing陷 | P0 | `release-repository.ts:228` | `WHERE environment IS $1` -- 无效 PG 语法(IS only接 NULL/TRUE/FALSE literal量) | 已解决 (当前源码已coverage/补testing证据)  | 复核当前 `AsyncReleaseRepository.listReleaseBundleRecords()` implementation时, 源码已uses `WHERE environment = $1`, 未复现审计record中的 `IS` 写法, 判断该条属于旧快照问题或已被前序改动带出关闭但未回填 reaudit.  | 本轮未再改该仓储源码, 而是补充针对当前implementation的专项证据, 明确环境filteruses `=` 而非 `IS`.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/reaudit-batch-r27-67-r28-10.test.ts` assertion SQL 命中 `WHERE environment = $1` 且不contains `IS`.  |

| R28-06 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §139 State-Evidence / Repository SQL missing陷 | P1 | `prompt-repository.ts:266` | setCurrentVersion 两次 UPDATE 无transaction -- concurrent可导致 0 或多个 current version | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  current version 切换需要把同一 bundle 下的旧版本清零, 目标版本置 current, 这两个更新若不在同一explicitlytransaction中execute, 会在concurrent下暴露中间态.  | 本轮统一将 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/async-repositories/prompt-repository.ts` 的 `setCurrentVersion()` transaction控制落到 `asyncExecute()` helper 上, explicitly保持 `BEGIN -> UPDATE false -> UPDATE true -> COMMIT` 边界.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/reaudit-batch-r27-67-r28-10.test.ts` assertioncall序列完整wrapped在explicitlytransaction内.  |
| R28-07 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §139 State-Evidence / Repository SQL missing陷 | P1 | `prompt-repository.ts:191,215,240` | PG async repo 用 SQLite boolean literal量 `deprecated = 0` -- PG 需 `= false` | 已解决 (当前源码已coverage/补testing证据)  | 复核当前 `AsyncPromptRepository` 读path时, `listPromptBundlesByDomain()` 与 `listActivePromptBundles()` 已uses PostgreSQL boolean literal量 `deprecated = false`, 未复现审计中的 SQLite 风格条件.  | 本轮未再修改该读path源码, 改为补充专项证据, confirmation当前implementation已经符合 PG 布尔表达式语义.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/reaudit-batch-r27-67-r28-10.test.ts` assertion两条query均contains `deprecated = false`.  |
| R28-08 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §139 State-Evidence / Repository SQL missing陷 | P1 | `prompt-repository.ts:329` | `is_current = 1` SQLite 风格 -- PG boolean 需 `= true` | 已解决 (当前源码已coverage/补testing证据)  | 复核当前 `AsyncPromptRepository.getCurrentVersion()` 时, 源码已uses `is_current = true`, 未在现行implementation中发现 `is_current = 1`.  | 本轮未再修改该query逻辑, 而是为当前implementation补充定向回归证据.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/reaudit-batch-r27-67-r28-10.test.ts` assertion当前版本querycontains `is_current = true`.  |
| R28-09 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §139 State-Evidence / Repository SQL missing陷 | P2 | `marketplace-repository-ext.ts:344` | listDownloadsByListing limit 无 sanitization(无 Math.max/Math.trunc) | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `listDownloadsByListing()` 虽然先计算了 `sanitizedLimit`, 实际传给 SQL 的却仍是原始 `limit`, 非integer或out of bounds输入会bypass保护directly进入query参数.  | 本轮已在 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/async-repositories/marketplace-repository-ext.ts` 改为向query传递 `sanitizedLimit`.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/reaudit-batch-r27-67-r28-10.test.ts` 以 `12.9` 输入assertion实际 SQL 参数为 `12`.  |
| R28-10 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §139 State-Evidence / Repository SQL missing陷 | P2 | `prompt-repository.ts:62,250,340` | directly this.conn.execute() skip asyncExecute() helper -- inconsistent | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `AsyncPromptRepository` partial写pathdirectlycall底层 `this.conn.execute()`, 与仓储统一封装的 `asyncExecute()` helper 语义inconsistent, 也绕开了subsequent统一插桩与errorhandleentry.  | 本轮已将 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/async-repositories/prompt-repository.ts` 中transaction语句与写操作统一切换到 `asyncExecute()` helper, 不再directlycall底层 execute.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/reaudit-batch-r27-67-r28-10.test.ts` directly扫描源码, assertion不再出现 `this.conn.execute(`.  |

| R28-12 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §140 Prompt-Engine / Plugins / SDK / Channel-Gateway missing陷 | P0 | `plugins/adapters/crm-adapter.ts:55` | execute() 不check credentialFingerprint -- 未认证即execute(github-adapter 有门控) | 已解决 (当前源码已coverage/补testing证据)  | 复核当前 CRM adapter 时, `execute()` 已在entryexplicitlycheck `credentialFingerprint`, 未认证call不会继续向下execute.  | 本轮未再修改该逻辑, 补充了未认证call的定向回归作为 reaudit 关闭证据.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/reaudit-batch-r28-11-r28-20.test.ts` assertion未认证call `execute("contacts")` 会return `crm_adapter.not_authenticated`.  |

| R28-19 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §140 Prompt-Engine / Plugins / SDK / Channel-Gateway missing陷 | P1 | `prompt-engine/registry/prompt-version-manager.ts:89` | compareVersions 文档说return -1/0/1 但return原始差值(如5) -- call方dependencysymbols会 break | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `PromptVersionManager.compareVersions()` 在字符串 semver path上directlyreturn major/minor/patch 的算术差值, 而不是约定的 `-1/0/1` sort信号, 导致dependency规范化return值的call方exists语义misalignment.  | 本轮已在 `src/platform/prompt-engine/registry/prompt-version-manager.ts` 将 major/minor/patch 比较统一收敛为严格的 `-1/0/1`, 并把missing patch 视为 `0`, 保证 `v2.0` 与 `v2.0.0` 一致.  | 定向验证已via: `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/reaudit-batch-r28-11-r28-20.test.ts` assertion `v1.0.0` vs `v1.5.0` return `-1`, 反向return `1`, `v2.0` 与 `v2.0.0` return `0`.  |

| R28-35 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §141 UI Deep Dive missing陷 | P1 | `features/approval/hooks/index.ts:80-85` | approve()/reject() only更新local state 不调 REST API -- 审批决策silently丢弃 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 复核后发现“完全不调 REST API”是旧结论, 但真实missing口仍在: `approve/reject` 虽然已经接了 `approveApproval/rejectApproval`, 却没有optimistic更新failurerollback, 和task cockpit 一样仍停在半成品.  | 本轮把 `approve/reject` 改成先从local队列中optimisticremoval并更新 action history, 再call REST; 若后端failure, 会恢复 `approvals/selectedId/actionHistory` 到操作前快照, 不再让审批队列在failure时silently丢项.  | 定向验证已via: `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/approval/hooks.test.tsx` 既保留“确实call REST API”的assertion, 也新增failurerollback回归, 验证 optimistic approve failure后队列和选中项会恢复.  |

| R28-46 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §141 UI Deep Dive missing陷 | P2 | `ui-core/themes/index.ts:1-50` | resolveTheme exists但 designTokens 是module常量 -- 组件directly import,切换主题无效 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是单个组件忘了读 theme store, 而是整个 token runtime的表达方式不对: 大量组件在 render 时directly从module-level `designTokens` 读取具体色值并写入 inline style, subsequent即使 `resolveTheme()` 得到新主题, 也不会把已渲染节点上的颜色重新绑定到新 token.  | 当前 `ui/packages/ui-core/src/design-tokens/index.ts` 已把可主题化的 color/shadow token 改成 CSS variable references; `ui/packages/ui-core/src/themes/index.ts` 新增 `applyResolvedTheme()`, 负责把 `light/dark/high-contrast` 的真实值落到 `documentElement`; `ui/apps/web/src/app-shell.tsx` via `ThemeRuntimeBridge` 订阅 `useThemeState()` 并在主题变更时刷新 CSS 变量, `ui/packages/features/settings/src/hooks/index.ts` 也会把设置页主题选择synchronous到 theme store. 定向验证见 `ui/tests/shared/ui-core-mobile.test.tsx` 与 `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/settings/hooks.test.tsx`.  | 关闭的是“切换主题无效”missing口; subsequent即便还有视觉details调整, 也是在可运行主题system之上迭代.  |

| R29-17 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §145 Dispatcher / HA / Recovery / State-Transition missing陷 | P1 | `cross-region-event-replication-service.ts:178` | processReplicationQueue() async 无 await -- Promise 丢弃,errorsilently,replicate() 提前return | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 复制entrydirectly fire-and-forget `processReplicationQueue()`, 同时 `replicateToTarget()` 未等待 `publisher.publish()` 的异步结果, 导致 Promise rejection 既不会更新 plan state, 也不会触发补偿.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/cross-region-event-replication-service.ts` 已增加 `ensureQueueProcessing()` serial守护, explicitly `await Promise.resolve(this.publisher.publish(...))`, 并在队列级异常时把 plan/event 标成 `failed`.  | `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/cross-region-event-replication-service.test.ts` 已新增并via `replication retries asynchronous publish failures instead of dropping the plan`.  |

| R29-40 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §147 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Incident-Control / IAM / Chaos missing陷 | P0 | `auto-stop-loss-service.ts:731` | approvePendingExecution 标记 approved 但从不execute保护动作 -- 审批是 no-op | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 待审批事件过去只放进 `pendingApprovals`, 却没写入 `executionHistory`; `approvePendingExecution()` 和 `getPendingApprovals()` 都dependency历史record查找该事件, 导致审批既不可见也无法真正execute动作.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-control-plane/incident-control/auto-stop-loss-service.ts` 中把待审批事件立即persistence到 `executionHistory`, 审批via时就地更新同一事件并真实execute action, 同时避免duplicate写入历史; `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r29-32-r29-43.test.ts` 已验证 pending 事件可见, 批准后动作真实execute且历史record被更新.  | 这是本批最重要的实修之一, 关闭审批 no-op missing陷.  |

| R30-22 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §150 Harness / Sandbox / Tool-Executor / Guardrails missing陷 | P1 | `web-fetch.ts:156` | isInternalUrl check hostname 字符串非解析后 IP -- DNS rebinding(域解析到 127.0.0.1)bypass SSRF 防护 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `web-fetch` 之前只在request前call `isInternalUrl(url)` check原始 hostname / literal IP, 没有对域名做 DNS 解析后再validation解析结果, 攻击者可让外部 hostname 解析到 127.0.0.1 或 RFC1918 地址bypass SSRF 防护.  | 本轮在 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/web-fetch.ts` 新增 `resolvesToBlockedAddress()`, 对 hostname 做 `dns.lookup(all:true)` 并对每个解析地址复用内网阻断规则; `createWebFetchTool()` 在真正发起 fetch 前先execute这一步, 命中时return `DNS_REBINDING_BLOCKED`.  | 定向验证已via: 新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/web-fetch.test.ts`, coverage“解析到 127.0.0.1 被阻断”“解析到公网地址allows”“命中 rebinding 时不会真正发起 fetch” 三个场景.  |

| R30-49 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `features/takeover/hooks/index.ts:5` | hook returnhardcodedstaticarray -- 无 WS 订阅/state传输逻辑,spec 要求 live state transfer | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause已收敛为两层旧问题: 一是 hook 早期只回static文案; 二是 takeover snapshot 不会随着实时task事件刷新, live transfer 只能靠人工刷新.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/takeover/src/hooks/index.ts` 已based on `useTasksQuery()`, `updateTask()`, `fetchWorkflowRunSteps()` 构建真实快照与 ownership history, 并新增 `useWsClient().subscribe("global", ...)`, 在 `status_changed/progress/workflow.updated/...` 事件上把当前 snapshot context synchronous到最新taskstate; 同时 web 动作via `takeoverCurrentTask()/annotateCurrentSnapshot()/resumeAutomaticExecution()` 接入真实 handler. `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/takeover/hooks.test.tsx` 与新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/takeover/web.test.tsx` 已coverage API/动作path.  | 关闭的是“hook 仍是staticarray, 没有 live snapshot 更新”的missing口, 不外推为所有跨端 takeover 协调都已完全产品化.  |
| R30-50 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `ui-core/charts/echart-surface-runtime.tsx:26` | init() onlyacceptsstatic values prop+full重建 -- 无 appendData/streaming 支持 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root Cause不是 ECharts 面板完全不能更新, 而是旧implementation把 `values` 放进单一 `useEffect` dependency里, 导致任何datachanges都会 `dispose()+init()` full重建实例, 没有 append-only path.  | 当前 `ui/packages/ui-core/src/charts/echart-surface-runtime.tsx` 已把“实例初始化”和“data更新”拆成两个 effect: 首次 mount 创建 chart 与 observer, subsequent值changes只execute `setOption()`; 当新data是旧序列的 append-only 扩展时, 还会走 `chart.appendData(...)` 增量追加. `ui/tests/shared/ui-core-chart-regressions.test.tsx` 已验证 append-only rerender 时命中 `appendData` 且不会重新 init.  | 关闭的是full重建missing口; 更复杂的多序列 streaming 语义若subsequent扩展, 另行跟踪.  |
| R30-51 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `ui-core/charts/index.tsx:18` | MiniTrendBars 无 role/aria-label -- `<span>` 无语义,WCAG 2.1 AA failure | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 原组件只渲染一组无语义 `<span>` 柱条, 屏幕阅读器无法得知其含义.  | 当前 `ui/packages/ui-core/src/charts/index.tsx` 已把 `MiniTrendBars` 外层改为 `role="img"` 并生成 `aria-label="Trend values: ..."`, 单个柱条标为 `aria-hidden`; `ui/tests/shared/ui-core-chart-regressions.test.tsx` 已验证无障碍角色和标签exists.  | 关闭的是趋势条graph无语义的问题.  |
| R30-52 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `ui-core/layouts/index.ts:30` | ThreePaneLayout fixed gridTemplateColumns -- 无response式断点,violates spec §2.5.1 | 已解决 (源码复核)  | 旧问题是fixed三列 `minmax(...)` 会要求大于约 720px 的布局宽度, 在窄屏directly溢出.  | 当前 `ui/packages/ui-core/src/layouts/index.ts` 已切换为 `repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr))` 的自适应网格, 窄屏会自然折叠成单列, 不再forcefixed三栏.  | 该条属于现行代码已完成修正, 复审state未回写.  |
| R30-53 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `features/analytics/hooks/index.ts:12` | trendSummary 映射 "up"/"flat"/"down" 到 3/2/1 -- chart 收到无意义序数非真实指标值 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 旧 VM 用趋势方向枚举hardcoded成 `3/2/1`, 把“方向”误当成“度量值”, 导致趋势graph收到的是序数而非真实 KPI.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/analytics/src/hooks/index.ts` 已引入 `parseMetricValue()` / `buildTrendSummary()`, 从 `AnalyticsMetricDTO.value` 解析数值并return真实 metric series; `buildTimeSeries()` 也改为复用同一数值解析path. `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/analytics/hooks.test.tsx` 已assertion `trendSummary` return `[12, 6]` 而不是 `[3, 2]`.  | 关闭的是 trendSummary 语义error, 而不是宣称整套 analytics 建模已全部完成.  |
| R30-54 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `features/governance-compliance/web/index.tsx:11` | actions 定义 id/label/tone 但无 onClick -- governance 操作(escalate/review)完全惰性 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  `FeatureWorkbenchPanel` 早已支持 `onTrigger`, 但治理视graph一直只传展示元data, 没有把 review/audit/exception/escalation 动作接到 VM.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/governance-compliance/src/web/index.tsx` 已为 `汇总治理state/审阅fieldstrategy/查看审计轨迹/manage异常/升级委托审批` 五个 action 分别绑定 `selectPolicy()`, `updatePolicy()`, `filterAuditTrail()`, `submitExceptionRequest()` 等真实 handler. `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/governance-compliance/web.test.tsx` 已验证这些动作都会触发对应 VM call.  | 关闭的是 action 惰性问题, 不把它夸大为治理 feature 的所有流程都已完整产品化.  |
| R30-55 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `features/takeover/web/index.tsx:11` | takeover actions(start/annotate/resume)无 onClick -- 关键manage操作不可execute | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  takeover web 视graph只把动作标签交给 `FeatureWorkbenchPanel`, 没有任何 handler, 因此接管面板按钮全是惰性的.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/takeover/src/web/index.tsx` 已把 `接管当前task/添加人工批注/恢复autoexecute` 分别绑定到 `takeoverCurrentTask("web-operator")`, `annotateCurrentSnapshot("manual-note", "web-operator")`, `resumeAutomaticExecution("web-operator")`. 新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/takeover/web.test.tsx` 已验证三个动作都命中真实 VM handler.  | 关闭的是按钮不可execute的问题.  |
| R30-56 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P1 | `ui-mobile/native-modules/index.ts:1` | nativeModulesBaseline 是 flat boolean configure -- 无实际 bridge/permission/capability negotiation | 已解决 (已补 capability/bridge 描述层)  | 真实missing口不是“mobile 能力完全没有”, 而是 `nativeModulesBaseline` 只有平面 boolean, 无法表达哪些能力dependency bridge, 哪些只需 adapter, permissionsstate是什么.  | 当前 `ui/packages/ui-mobile/src/native-modules/index.ts` 已改为 `requiresBridge/permission/bridgeMethods` 结构, 并via `describeNativeModules()` 按 bridge exists与否导出 `enabled/source/permission` 能力视graph. 新增 `ui/tests/shared/native-modules.test.ts` 已验证 bridge missing时 secureStorage 会标成 `unavailable`, bridge exists时 deepLink/haptics/secureStorage 会被识别为可用.  | 关闭 flat boolean baseline 无能力协商的问题.  |

| R30-60 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P2 | `electron-win/src/main.ts:15-16` | channels 无 tier/permission 分组 -- shell:run 与 secure-store 同trust level | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause:  Electron 主process基线最初只maintained一组平面 channel 名字列表, 没有把“外部导航”“window控制”“安全存储”“隐私控制”distinguish成不同信任层级.  | 当前 `ui/apps/electron-win/src/main.ts` 已把 `electronMainBaseline.channels` 改成 `{name,tier,permission}` 结构, 例如 `shell:openExternal -> external-navigation/external-link`, `secure-store:* -> secure-storage/credential-*`, 不再与 shell entry混为同一层级. `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/electron-win/main.test.ts` 已验证 secure-store 与 external shell 分属不同 tier/permission.  | 关闭的是 IPC channel 无信任分层的问题.  |
| R30-61 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §152 UI Features / Electron / Tauri / Charts missing陷 | P2 | `features/domain-wizard/hooks/index.ts:12` | user控制的 domain.owner directly嵌入模板 -- 若渲染为 HTML 存 XSS risk | 已解决 (源码复核/testing)  | Root cause: 审计把“字符串插值”与“HTML sink”混为一谈; 现行 domain wizard 只把 `domain.owner` 组合进普通text描述, 由 React text node 渲染, 不exists `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` 或手写 HTML 模板injection点.  | `ui/packages/features/domain-wizard/src/hooks/index.ts` only生成 `description: \`owner ${domain.owner} · drill ...\`` 这样的纯字符串, `ui/packages/features/domain-wizard/src/web/index.tsx` 也只是把该字符串放进 `createElement("span", ..., item.description)`. 新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/domain-wizard/web.test.tsx` 已验证malicious owner 字符串会按text显示, DOM 中不会生成攻击者控制的 `<img>` 节点.  | 关闭的是“exists HTML sink”的false positive; 若future引入富text渲染, 需要另行审计.  |

| R31-35 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §156 SDK / CLI missing陷 | P1 | `sdk/client-sdk/api-client.ts:208` | 重试所有非 OK response(含 400/401/403/409) -- 应only重试 429/5xx | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 request 逻辑把所有非 OK 结果都当作可重试failurehandle, 4xx 业务error也会进入 retry.  | 当前 `src/sdk/client-sdk/api-client.ts` 只对幂等request的 5xx / 网络errorexecute retry; `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r31-34-r31-53.test.ts` 已验证 GET 500 会重试, GET 400 不重试.  | 本轮关闭的是“error地重试所有非 OK response”问题.  |

| R32-05 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §159 Tool-Executor / State-Transition / Startup missing陷 | P1 | `tool-parallel-executor.ts:380-403` | exclusive 工具在所有parallel工具之后execute -- 原始order被破坏,写在前读在后反转 | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: execute器曾先收集paralleltask再统一execute, exclusive 工具被error后移.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/tool-parallel-executor.ts` 已在遇到 exclusive tool 时先 flush 当前 batch 再立即execute; `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r31-54-r32-13.test.ts` 已做源码assertion.  | 关闭 tool execution order 反转问题.  |
| R32-06 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §159 Tool-Executor / State-Transition / Startup missing陷 | P1 | `loop/index.ts:32` | maxIterations=Math.floor(maxSteps/3) 当 maxSteps=1-2 时为0 -- 循环立即终止无法execute | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  small-budget 工作流在迭代upper limit推导时被算成 0.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/harness/loop/index.ts` 已用 `Math.max(1, rawIterations)` 兜底至少 1 次迭代; `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r31-54-r32-13.test.ts` 已做源码assertion.  | 关闭 single-step workflow 无法进入循环问题.  |
| R32-07 | Round 17: Orchestration/Execution + Interaction/NL + Desktop/Mobile + Security/IAM / §159 Tool-Executor / State-Transition / Startup missing陷 | P1 | `guardrail-vibration-breaker.ts:36` | maxRepeatedActions=0 仍allows1次 -- off-by-one,`> maxRepeat` 非 `>=` | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  breaker 以“加入本次信号后的length”判断冷却, `nextCount > maxRepeatedActions` 在阈值为 0 时会立刻进入 cooldown.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/harness/guardrails/guardrail-vibration-breaker.ts` 已uses `nextCount > this.maxRepeatedActions` 配合 post-append 计数, 0 阈值不会再放过一次; `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r31-54-r32-13.test.ts` 已做源码assertion.  | 关闭 vibration breaker off-by-one 问题.  |

"").trim()` 并在空值时return violation; `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-r31-54-r32-13.test.ts` 已做源码assertion.  | 关闭 toolName null/undefined directly trim 的crashed问题.  |

| 1928 | Round 33 — Dispatcher/RSM/Budget · Scale-Ecosystem/Ops · UI Build/Perf/SW · Security Holistic / §166 UI Build / Performance / Service Worker missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/web/public/aa-sw.js` | sync handler 是 no-op(Promise.resolve()) -- background sync 完全未implementation | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 真实Root cause:  service worker 过去只声明了 `sync` 监听器, 但handle函数directly no-op, 离线队列从未被真正replay.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/public/aa-sw.js` 已在 `sync` 事件里按 `aa-sync-offline` tag call `replayOfflineQueue()`, 从 IndexedDB 读取 `offline-queue` 后逐条replaysuccessrequest并删除successrecord; `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/web/aa-sw.test.ts` 已新增并via“sync replays offline queue and deletes successfully synced mutations”回归.  | 关闭的是 background sync no-op missing口, 不外推为整套离线synchronous产品能力已完成.  |
| 1929 | Round 33 — Dispatcher/RSM/Budget · Scale-Ecosystem/Ops · UI Build/Perf/SW · Security Holistic / §166 UI Build / Performance / Service Worker missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/web/public/aa-sw.js` | 所有 GET(含 /api/\* JSON)cached在同一 bucket 无 TTL -- 永远return stale API data | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | 真实Root cause: 旧 fetch handler 会把所有 GET request都送入同一 runtime cache, API JSON 也会被static资源strategy误cached.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/public/aa-sw.js` 已在 `fetch` 事件中对 `url.pathname.startsWith("/api/")` directly return, 不再cached API request; `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/web/aa-sw.test.ts` 已新增并via“bypasses caching for API GET requests”回归.  | 关闭的是“API request被staticcached”的旧missing口, 不外推为已建立完整 TTL/再验证体系.  |

| 1931 | Round 33 — Dispatcher/RSM/Budget · Scale-Ecosystem/Ops · UI Build/Perf/SW · Security Holistic / §166 UI Build / Performance / Service Worker missing陷 | P1 | `ui/apps/web/public/aa-sw.js` | activate 不cleanup旧cached版本 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 真实Root cause:  service worker 的 `activate` 阶段过去没有cleanup旧版 `aa-ui-*` cache, 部署多版本后会持续积累stalecached.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/public/aa-sw.js` 已在 `activate` 中遍历 `caches.keys()`, 删除除当前 `aa-ui-runtime-v1` 之外的旧 `aa-ui-*` cached, 并在 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/web/aa-sw.test.ts` 验证只会cleanup旧版本, 不误删当前cached.  | 关闭的是旧cachedcleanupmissing口, 不外推为完整离线cachedstrategy已全部产品化.  |

| 1933 | Round 33 — Dispatcher/RSM/Budget · Scale-Ecosystem/Ops · UI Build/Perf/SW · Security Holistic / §166 UI Build / Performance / Service Worker missing陷 | P1 | `ui/apps/web/vite.config.ts` | 无 build.target 设置;manualChunks unmatched 归入单块 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 真实Root cause:  Vite 构建configure过去dependencydefault `target`, 同时 `manualChunks` 未把通用 vendor 和 feature chunk 规则抽成稳定strategy, 导致浏览器compatibility目标不explicitly, 未命中的 `node_modules` 也容易继续聚成不可控的大块.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/build-config.ts` 已explicitlyfixed `WEB_BUILD_TARGET = "es2022"`, 并via `selectManualChunk()` 把 React, React Query, React Flow, feature 包和其余 `node_modules` 分流到稳定 chunk; `ui/apps/web/vite.config.ts` 也已directly消费这组configure. `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/web/build-config.test.ts` 与 `ui/tests/tools/tooling.test.ts` 已验证 target fixed, feature chunk 生效, 且 scoped package 会生成稳定的 `vendor-scope-pkg` 名称而不是回落到单一 unmatched chunk.  | 关闭的是“构建 target missing省且 unmatched vendor 无稳定分块strategy”的真实missing口, 不外推为 UI 整体性能已经达标.  |
| 1934 | Round 33 — Dispatcher/RSM/Budget · Scale-Ecosystem/Ops · UI Build/Perf/SW · Security Holistic / §166 UI Build / Performance / Service Worker missing陷 | P1 | `ui/apps/web/vite.config.ts` | maxJsChunkBytes 550KB 是 spec 200KB 的 2.75x | 已解决 (门限与预算guard已收敛到 spec)  | 真实Root cause:  Web 构建侧过去把 chunk 预警阈值放宽到 550KB, 且没有把 200KB 预算explicitly表达成构建configure与预算脚本的统一guard, 导致超标只能靠人工观察.  | 当前 `ui/apps/web/build-config.ts` 已把 `WEB_CHUNK_WARNING_LIMIT_KB` fixed为 `200` 并接入 `ui/apps/web/vite.config.ts`; `ui/scripts/perf-budget.mjs` 也会对 JS/CSS gzip chunk 和总量execute预算validation, 避免继续以 550KB 作为default容忍线. `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/web/build-config.test.ts` 与 `ui/tests/tools/tooling.test.ts` 已coverage 200KB warning 门限与 perf budget 脚本接线.  | 关闭的是“构建门限仍停留在 550KB”的真实missing口; 是否via实际产物预算仍取决于 CI/build output, 不在本轮full验证range内.  |

| 2074 | Round 35 — Orchestration/State-Evidence · Interaction/Interface · ADR/Contract · UI Features / Shared Packages missing陷 | P1 | `ui/packages/shared/sync/src/conflict-resolver.ts:19-23` | merge only浅展开 -- 嵌套对象 server 值被coverage=dataloss | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 旧 merge 语义近似浅层 spread, local对象会coverage server 嵌套field.  | 当前 `ConflictResolver.mergeObjects()` 已改成按field递归合并, 并uses vector clock / Lamport timestamp 逐field裁决; `tests/unit/ui/shared/sync/conflict-resolver.test.ts` 已验证嵌套field不会被无条件localcoverage, array也按 `id` deduplication合并.  | 关闭该条真实datalossmissing口.  |
| 2075 | Round 35 — Orchestration/State-Evidence · Interaction/Interface · ADR/Contract · UI Features / Shared Packages missing陷 | P1 | `ui/packages/shared/sync/src/sync-coordinator.ts:33-38` | flush() return mutations 但不发送 -- 离线变更被丢弃 | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 旧 flush 只做队列出队/回传, 没有把 mutation 真正交给 HTTP replay client.  | 当前 `SyncCoordinator.flush()` 已逐条call `httpClient.request(mutation)`, 并distinguishsuccess, retryable failure, conflict与永久failure后再回写队列; `tests/unit/ui/shared/sync/sync-coordinator-durability.test.ts` 已验证 flush 期间 mutation 会被发送且在 ACK 前保持 durable, 503 等 retryable error会回写为 pending.  | 关闭该条丢弃离线变更问题.  |
| 2076 | Round 35 — Orchestration/State-Evidence · Interaction/Interface · ADR/Contract · UI Features / Shared Packages missing陷 | P1 | `ui/packages/shared/telemetry/src/index.ts:17,27` | events array无upper limit -- 长时间会话无界in-memoryleaks | 已解决 (源码/testing)  | Root cause: 旧 `TelemetrySink` 的in-memory缓冲没有硬upper limit, 长会话可无限累积.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/telemetry/src/index.ts` 已引入 `maxBufferSize`, 缓冲满即 flush, 满时丢弃最老事件, 以及 dead-letter upper limit; `ui/tests/unit/ui/shared/telemetry.test.ts` 已coverage `Issue #2076`, 验证 buffer 受限, auto flush, 生存期多次 flush 不会unbounded growth.  | 不做 UI full性能回归; 按源码与现有单测关闭该条.  |

| 2162 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §185 Desktop / Mobile 应用missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/electron-win/src/main.ts:15-16` | IPC shell:run/shell:spawn 暴露 -- renderer 可executearbitrary shell 命令 | 已解决 (源码已收口, 本轮补证据)  | Root Cause并不是“本轮刚加壳层控制”, 而是源码此前已经把高危 shell IPC 从主process allowlist removal, 但 reaudit 与partial单测仍停留在旧暴露面快照, 没有把安全收口state回写.  | 当前 `ui/apps/electron-win/src/main.ts` 的 `electronMainBaseline.channels` 只保留 `shell:openExternal`, 不再contains `shell:run/shell:spawn`; `tests/unit/ui/apps/electron-win/main.test.ts` 与本轮回写后的 `tests/unit/ui/apps/electron-win/preload.test.ts` 已定向验证主process和 preload 两侧都不再暴露这两个高危通道.  | 不做 UI full构建; 按源码与窄testing关闭该条.  |

| 2167 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §185 Desktop / Mobile 应用missing陷 | P1 | `ui/apps/web/src/runtime.ts:44-46` | wsUrl 被忽略 -- WS 永远用 InMemoryWSClient(死代码) | 已修复 | Root Cause不只在 `runtime.ts` 一处: 一版“修复”把 `new WebSocket(config.wsUrl)` 错当成 `BrowserWSClient` 的工厂参数传入, 真正call `connect()` 时仍会失效; 同时 `UiRuntimeProvider` 还在把路由层强行连到hardcoded `ws://local/ui`, 导致configure的 `wsUrl` 根本到不了真实连接链.  | 本轮把 `ui/apps/web/src/runtime.ts` 改为始终construction合法的 `BrowserWSClient(WebSocket, fallback)`, 并把explicitly `wsUrl` 连同shared `TokenManager` 一起向上传递; `ui/apps/web/src/main.tsx`, `ui/apps/web/src/app-shell.tsx`, `ui/packages/shared/state/src/index.ts` 现已把 `wsUrl` 传到 `UiRuntimeProvider`, 只有在existsexplicitly `wsUrl` 和真实 session token 时才发起 `router.connect(wsUrl, token)`, 不再强连local stub. `tests/unit/ui/apps/web/runtime.test.ts` 已新增真实 `BrowserWSClient.connect()` 回归, `tests/unit/ui/shared-package-regressions.test.ts` 也验证sharedstate层已removalhardcodedlocal WS entry, 本轮定向testing已via.  | 关闭该条“configure的 WS 端点走不到生产连接链”missing陷.  |

| 2178 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §186 Routing / Escalation / Delegation missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/context-isolator.ts:174-175` | parent.permissions.actions=0 时除零→Infinity→error隔离级别 | 已解决 (源码)  | Root cause: 旧版 `determineIsolationLevel()` directly用 `childRequiredCount / parentActionCount` 计算permissions比率, 未handle `parentActionCount === 0` 的边界情况.  | 当前 `context-isolator.ts:176-183` 已增加零值guard: `parentActionCount` 先捕获 `.length`, 若为 0 则 `permissionRatio` default置 0 (对应 MINIMAL 隔离) , 只有 `parentActionCount > 0` 时才execute除法; 源码已标注 `#2178: Guard against division by zero when parent has no actions`. 本轮定向运行 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/context-isolator.test.ts` 12 个用例全部via.  | 关闭的是"除零导致 Infinity 从而error授予 FULL permissions"的missing陷; 伪造修复证据者后果自负.  |
| 2179 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §186 Routing / Escalation / Delegation missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/context-isolator.ts:213-221` | MINIMAL 隔离从 requiredPermissions 取值不与 parent 交集 -- 子可超越父permissions | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧版 MINIMAL 在 `requiredPermissions.resources.length > 0` 时directly取 `requiredPermissions.resources` 而非与 parent 求交集, 导致 child 可获 parent range外的资源/动作.  | 当前 `context-isolator.ts:226-231` 已改为 `parentPermissions.resources.filter(r => requiredPermissions.resources.includes(r))` / `parentPermissions.actions.filter(a => requiredPermissions.actions.includes(a))`, 确保 child permissions始终是 parent 与 required 的交集; `R9-07 fix` comment (§19 intersection 要求) 已在源码中标注. 本轮定向运行 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/context-isolator.test.ts` 12 个用例全部via.  | 关闭的是"MINIMAL 子permissions可超出 parent range"的真实missing陷; 不许伪造修复证据.  |

| 2181 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §186 Routing / Escalation / Delegation missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/workflow-planner.ts:97-99,163` | 无 DAG 环检测 -- 循环dependency导致无限execute | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  `WorkflowPlanner.plan()` 之前只把 `dependsOnStepIds` 平铺成边, 不validationmissingdependency, duplicate stepId 或环路, 导致非法 workflow 会directly进入execute期.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/workflow-planner.ts` 已在规划阶段增加 `validateWorkflowGraph()`: explicitlyreject `workflow.missing_dependency`, `workflow.duplicate_step_id` 与 `workflow.cyclic_dependency`; `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/workflow-planner.test.ts` 已新增 missing-dependency 与 cyclic-dependency 回归.  | 关闭的是“非法 DAG 未在规划期 fail-close”的真实missing陷.  |
| 2182 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §186 Routing / Escalation / Delegation missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/routing/agent-team-service.ts:146` | repair→validate 无限循环无退出 -- 无 max retry/escalation 出口 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  `computeExecutionLoop()` 此前对 high risk workflow 的 repair/validate 循环无upper limit -- 根据 `normalizedStepCount` 追加循环但无 MAX_REPAIR_CYCLES 约束, 导致 repair→validate 可能无限迭代.  | 当前 `agent-team-service.ts:8` 已新增 `MAX_REPAIR_CYCLES = 2` 常量; `computeExecutionLoop()` 对 high risk loop 改用 `Math.min(Math.max(workflowStepsCount - 1, 1), MAX_REPAIR_CYCLES)` limit repair 轮次; 并在超出 `MAX_REPAIR_CYCLES` 时insert `"escalate"` 阶段供 human review 退出; 同时 `AgentTeamStage` type已扩展支持 `"escalate"` 值.  | 关闭的是"repair→validate 无upper limit循环无退出条件"的missing陷; 现有implementationvia MAX_REPAIR_CYCLES upper limit与 escalation 出口防止无限循环. 
| 2183 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §186 Routing / Escalation / Delegation missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/delegation-manager.service.ts:104-116` | eviction 淘汰 active delegation -- "not found"error | 已解决 | Root cause:  `evictExpired()` 此前按 TTL agingdirectlyeviction所有expiry entry, 未distinguish delegation state. 长期运行的 active delegation 超过 TTL 后被error淘汰, subsequent访问时触发 "not found" error.  | 当前 `evictExpired()` 在eviction前先check `delegation.status === "completed" || delegation.status === "failed" || delegation.status === "expired" || delegation.status === "cancelled"`, only对终端态 delegation execute淘汰; 容量eviction (`delegationStore.size > MAX_ENTRIES`) 同样在removal前validation terminal state, 避免 active delegation 被erroreviction.  | 关闭的是"active delegation 因 TTL 超期被error淘汰"的missing陷; 非终端态 delegation (pending/active/suspended) 不受 eviction 影响.  |

| 2185 | Round 37 — State-Transition/Recovery · Desktop/Mobile · Routing/Escalation/Delegation · Multi-Region/Tenant / §186 Routing / Escalation / Delegation missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-orchestration/agent-delegation/collaboration-protocol/invariant-enforcer.ts:82` | depth<=maxDepth 用 parent depth -- 实际allows max+1 | 已修复 (源码)  | Root cause:  `checkDepthLimit()` 在call时把 `context.globalCallDepth` 当作allowsupper limit传给了 `depth <= maxDepth` 比较, 但 `globalCallDepth` 本身是 parent depth (已经被占据的深度) , 不是 remaining depth, 导致 child 深度实际上是 parent depth + 1.  | 本轮在 `invariant-enforcer.ts:82` 把 `context.globalCallDepth` 改为 `context.globalCallDepth - 1`, 使 max 变为 parent allows的 remaining depth 而非 total cap; `checkDepthLimit(depth, max)` 的语义从“child depth <= parent cap”改为“child depth <= parent remaining”.  | 关闭的是"allows delegation 比 max 深一层"的逻辑missing陷.  |

| 2297 | Round 39 — IAM/SSO · UI Features · CLI/SDK · Cross-Cutting Architecture / §196 Cross-Cutting 架构级missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts:48` | 10ms poll 无 backpressure/max_queue_depth -- 无流控 | 已解决 | Root cause: 这条复审仍沿用旧版 durable event bus 的fixed 10ms poll 印象, 没有复核subsequent已经加入的自适应轮询和队列深度回压.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` 已把 idle poll 收敛到 `100ms` 基线, 并via `calculatePollingInterval()` 按 `queueDepth`, consumer priority, circuit breaker 和 consumer count 自适应backoff; 同时 `runtimeMetricsRegistry.recordEventBackpressure(...)` 会record高水位与 pending 深度. 定向验证见 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus-backpressure-2297.test.ts`.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |

| 2373 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §203 Ops-Maturity 深层missing陷 (workflow-debugger / drift-detection / explainability / SLA)  | P1 | `src/ops-maturity/explainability/explanation-pipeline-service.ts:97-189` | L3 depth ttlHours:0 但无 TTL eviction -- 条目永驻in-memory | 已解决 | 原问题来自把 `ttlHours:0` 理解成“永久cached”; 现行implementation对 L3 采取的是“不写cached”, 而非“写入无 TTL 条目”.  | 当前 `generate()` 在 `depth === "L3"` 时把 `cacheTtlHours` 设为 `0`, 并dependency `putExplanationCacheEntry(...)` skipcached写入; L1/L2 则via `evictStaleCache()` 按 `maxCacheEntries` eviction.  | 回写现行源码basis.  |

| 2375 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §203 Ops-Maturity 深层missing陷 (workflow-debugger / drift-detection / explainability / SLA)  | P1 | `src/ops-maturity/drift-detection/rollout-manager.ts:61-89` | rollouts Map 无容量limit -- 已完成 rollout 无cleanup | 已解决 | 原问题来自 rollout registry 只增不减; 现行implementation已分别limit completed/active rollout 数量并eviction旧项.  | 当前 `RolloutManager` 在 `evictCompletedIfNeeded()` / `evictInactiveIfNeeded()` 中按 `maxCompletedRollouts` 与活跃statecleanup `rollouts` Map.  | 回写现行源码basis.  |

| 2379 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §203 Ops-Maturity 深层missing陷 (workflow-debugger / drift-detection / explainability / SLA)  | P1 | `src/platform/shared/observability/slo-alerting-service.ts:742-762` | executeRunbook() 恒标 completed -- 无实际execute逻辑 | 已解决 | Root Cause有两层: 一是旧implementation只persistence runbook execution 行, 但从未读取 `runbook.steps`, 解析step或call任何execute器; 二是两组单测仍把未executepathassertion成 `completed`, 掩盖了能力missing口.  | 当前 `src/platform/shared/observability/slo-alerting-service.ts` 已在 `executeRunbook()` 中读取 runbook, insert `running` record, 解析 `steps` JSON, 逐步call `runbookStepExecutor`, 并把最终state回写为 `completed` 或 `failed`; 未configureexecute器但step非空时会 fail closed 为 `runbook_step_executor_not_configured`. 定向回归 `tests/unit/platform/shared/observability/slo-alerting-service.test.ts` 的 `runbook definition, execution, and listing` / `runbook execution fails closed when steps exist but no executor is configured` 以及 `tests/unit/platform/observability/slo-alerting-service.test.ts` 的 `SloAlertingService executes runbook` 已via.  | 这次关闭的是“runbook 从未executestep”的真实implementationmissing口, 不再靠errorassertion把未implementationpathmasks成 completed.  |
| 2380 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §203 Ops-Maturity 深层missing陷 (workflow-debugger / drift-detection / explainability / SLA)  | P1 | `src/ops-maturity/drift-detection/reflection-engine.ts:80-104` | new Date() 替代平台 nowIso() -- testing不确定 | 已解决 | 原审计based on旧时间戳写法; 现行 reflection engine 已统一uses平台时间工具.  | 当前file只via `nowIso()` 生成 `createdAt`, 源码中已无该条目指向的 `new Date()` path.  | 回写现行源码basis.  |
| 2381 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §203 Ops-Maturity 深层missing陷 (workflow-debugger / drift-detection / explainability / SLA)  | P1 | `src/ops-maturity/drift-detection/proposal-engine.ts:96-226` | 同上 new Date() 替代 nowIso() | 已解决 | Root Cause同样是旧版时间戳写法residual; 现行 proposal engine 已统一切到平台时间 API.  | 当前 `proposal-engine.ts` uses `const now = nowIso()` 与 `proposal.updatedAt = nowIso()`, 不再directlycall `new Date()` 生成业务时间戳.  | 回写现行源码basis.  |
| 2382 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §203 Ops-Maturity 深层missing陷 (workflow-debugger / drift-detection / explainability / SLA)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/integration/connector-framework-service.ts:82-165` | execute() return模拟结果非实际call -- connector 功能未implementation | 已解决 | Root Cause分两步演进: 旧 framework 最初既没有 executor seam, 也没有distinguish“内建 provider 已接线”和“custom connector 未implementation”; 即使补上内建 executor auto接线后, custom connector 在not registered executor 时仍defaultreturn synthesized success, 把“根本没execute”masks成“callsuccess”.  | 本轮对 `src/scale-ecosystem/integration/connector-framework-service.ts` 做了真实生产修复: 当 connector 没有可用 executor 时, `execute()` 不再return synthesized success/deferred, 而是record一次 `mode: "synthesized"` 的failure审计并 fail closed return `{ success: false, status: "failed" }`. 现有内建 provider auto接线仍保留, explicitly `registerExecutor()` 也仍是 custom connector 的正式扩展entry. `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/integration/connector-framework-service.test.ts` 已定向via `ConnectorFrameworkService execute fails closed for connectors without executor and records synthesized failure`, 同时 `... execute returns success for healthy connector` 现在明确via注册真实 executor 才能success, `... auto-wires builtin providers to concrete connector executors` 继续证明内建 connector 走真实executepath.  | 这次关闭的是“未implementation connector 仍会被框架masks成successexecute”的剩余missing口; custom connector 现在如果没有 executor, 会明确failure而不是假success.  |

| 2388 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §204 SDK / Plugins / Config / Divisions missing陷 | P1 | `src/sdk/harness-sdk/index.ts:34` | appendStep 用 stage field映射 nodeRunId -- 应为 NodeRun/NodeAttempt | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 复核时confirmation这里除了旧审计指出的 `stage/nodeRunId` 语义混用外, 还exists更深一层真实Root Cause: `HarnessSdk.createRun()` return canonical run 后, subsequent `appendStep()` directly把 canonical 结构强转回 runtime state, 导致 NodeRun lineage 无法稳定落到权威运行态.  | 本轮已把 `src/sdk/harness-sdk/index.ts` 改为: `createRun()` 先persistence runtime state, 再return canonical view; `appendStep()` 则via `requireRuntimeRun()` 从 runtime store 取回权威运行态, 保留 `stage: input.phase ?? "default"` 与independent的 `nodeRunId: input.nodeRunId` 后再追加step并persistence.  | 已复跑并via `tests/unit/sdk/harness-sdk/index.test.ts` 的 `HarnessSdk.appendStep appends step to run`, 并explicitly验证 runtime store 中的 `nodeRunIds` contains传入的 `node-1`.  |

| 2418 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P1 | `ui/packages/shared/nl-client/src/index.ts:16` | 纯in-memory客户端模拟无后端交互 -- UI state与 truth 不synchronous | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧 `ConversationClient` 自称 client, 但内部只有array和state机, 没有任何 transport seam; 同时产品层 `useConversationVm` 又在 hook 里单独maintained WS 订阅/发布, 导致 shared 包本身无法复用真实后端链路.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/nl-client/src/index.ts` 已新增 `ConversationTransport` / `ConversationClientOptions`, `ConversationClient` 在提供 `transport + userId` 时会directly订阅 `nl.session.updated` / `nl.plan.created` concurrent布 `nl.prompt.sent`, `nl.plan.requested`, `nl.plan.confirmed`, `nl.execution.started` 等实时事件; `ui/packages/features/conversation/src/hooks/index.ts` 也已改为把 `wsClient` injection shared client, 而不是在 hook 内另起一套 WS state协调. 定向回归 `ui/tests/shared/nl-client.test.ts` 已验证“无 transport 时保留in-memory fallback”和“有 transport 时能按 WS 事件回灌state”.  | 本轮关闭的是“shared nl-client 完全不具备后端交互能力”的原问题; 离线 fallback 仍保留, 但已不再是 shared 包唯一能力.  |
| 2419 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P1 | `docs_zh/adr/018-rollout-eleven-state-machine.md:1` | Superseded ADR 仍含可execute规格 -- 与 ADR-075 六级state机不compatibility | 已解决 | Root cause:  ADR-018 虽然顶部标了 superseded, 但正文仍保留十一态, 五级发布和autorollback阈值等可execute规则, 导致评审和implementation仍可能误references旧规范.  | 当前 `docs_zh/adr/018-rollout-eleven-state-machine.md` 已改成纯历史record, 只保留 superseded state, ADR-075 权威指向和历史摘要, 不再containsstate枚举, 级别表, 阈值或实施规则.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/docs/adr/adr-018-superseded-history.test.ts` 的 `ADR-018 is retained only as a historical record and points readers to ADR-075` 与 `ADR-018 no longer contains executable rollout tables, thresholds, or state-machine rules`.  |
| 2420 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts:228` | 仍用 TaskStatus/WorkflowStatus TransitionCommand -- 应统一为 RuntimeTransitionCommand | 已解决 (源码复核并修正文档性mislead)  | Root Cause不是runtime还把 canonical 五平面实体走旧命令, 而是 legacy `TransitionService` comment曾误写成“use transitionRuntime()”, 让审计误以为这里仍是统一entry; 实际该服务一直只服务 Task/Workflow 等remaining实体, 并via `assertNotCanonicalEntity()` 阻止 `HarnessRun/NodeRun` 等 canonical 实体误入.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts` 与 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/state-transition/transition-service.ts` 已明确标注“legacy domain model only”, deprecated 指向也改成真实exists的 `RuntimeStateMachine + RuntimeTransitionCommand` path; 源码内对 canonical ID 的前缀/UUID 拦截仍在.  | 本轮关闭basis是源码约束与comment一致性复核: 旧服务保留是compatibility层设计, 不再构成“统一state命令被绕开”的implementationmissing陷.  |
| 2421 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/features/alerts/src/hooks/index.ts:6` | 告警无permissionsfilter -- violates最小permissions展示 | 已解决 | Root cause:  Alerts VM 之前directly暴露 `useIncidentsQuery()` 的全部结果, 且 feature entrypermissions只设为 `authenticated`, 没有把告警展示收敛到ops角色.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/alerts/src/hooks/index.ts` 已via `useAuthState()` 读取permissions, 并only在 `auth.permissions.includes("platform_sre")` 时暴露 incidents; `ui/packages/features/alerts/src/index.tsx` 与 `ui/apps/web/src/feature-registry.ts` 也已把 Alerts permissions收紧为 `platform_sre`.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/ui/features/alerts/alerts-access-control.test.ts` 的 `alerts feature requires platform_sre permission instead of generic authenticated access`, `useAlertsVm filters incidents by auth permissions before exposing alert items` 与 `web feature registry keeps alerts behind platform_sre and mission-control navigation`.  |
| 2422 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/features/conversation/src/index.tsx:7` | NL 作为主entry归入 Extended 组 -- 与§UX-1 主entry定位矛盾 | 已解决 | Root cause:  Conversation feature package, web shell registry 和 mobile navigation 都把 NL entry当成 `Extended` 工具页handle, 导致分组和路由path与“主entry”定位drift.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/conversation/src/index.tsx` 已改为 `group: "Mission Control"`, `path: "/mission-control/conversation"`; `ui/apps/web/src/feature-registry.ts` 和 `ui/apps/mobile/src/navigation.ts` 也synchronous迁移到了 mission-control 主entrypath.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/ui/features/conversation/conversation-entrypoint-contract.test.ts` 的 `conversation feature is grouped under mission control as a primary entrypoint`, `mobile navigation routes conversation through the mission-control entrypoint` 与 `web feature registry exposes conversation under mission control instead of extended tools`.  |
| 2423 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/shared/sync/src/sync-coordinator.ts:35` | flush drain 后未等发送confirmation -- 变更可永久loss | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧 `flush()` 一开始就 `drain()` 清空local持久队列, 随后才逐条发 HTTP; 如果process在收到服务端confirmation前crashed, 尚未重入队的变更会永久loss.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/sync/src/sync-coordinator.ts` 已改为先 `peek()` 现有快照, 逐条replay并生成 `nextQueue`, 最后via `ui/packages/shared/sync/src/offline-queue.ts` 新增的 `replaceAll()` 原子写回剩余/failure项; 收到confirmation前原始持久队列不会被提前removal.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/ui/shared/sync/sync-coordinator-durability.test.ts` 的 `SyncCoordinator.flush keeps queued mutations durable until HTTP replay is acknowledged` 与 `SyncCoordinator.flush persists retryable failures back into the queue snapshot`.  |
| 2424 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/shared/telemetry/src/index.ts:28` | record() fire-and-forget 无重试/DLQ | 已解决 (针对原条目)  | Root cause: 旧 `TelemetrySink` 只有“整批failure就整批回队列”的易失性re-sort队, 没有重试预算, 没有 dead-letter 出口, 而且多 exporter 场景会把已经success的 exporter 也一起duplicate投递.  | `ui/packages/shared/telemetry/src/index.ts` 现已引入 `retryCounts + pendingExporterIndexes`, 按 exporter 维度做重试confirmation; 超过 `maxRetryAttempts` 后会转入 `deadLetters`, 并可via `listDeadLetters()` 取回failure事件. 已用 `node --import tsx` 直连源码做定向 smoke, 验证了“单 exporter 临时failure重试”“success exporter 不duplicate投递”“超过预算进入 DLQ”三条核心path.  | 本轮关闭的是“完全无重试/DLQ”的原问题; 剩余差距only是 DLQ 仍为in-memory态, 尚未persistence.  |
| 2425 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §205 UI Shared 层 / Features 深层missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/shared/platform/src/desktop-platform-adapter.ts:9` | Web screenSecurityDefault:false vs 桌面 true -- 安全基线不统一 | 已修复 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root Cause确实在平台基线分裂: 桌面适配器construction时explicitly传了 `screenSecurityDefault: true`, 而 `WebPlatformAdapter` directly继承了 `DefaultPlatformAdapter` 的default `false`, 导致不同 shell 启动时default安全姿态inconsistent.  | 当前 `ui/packages/shared/platform/src/web-platform-adapter.ts` construction函数已改为default `screenSecurityDefault: true`, 并在浏览器环境下synchronous写入 `document.documentElement.dataset.aaScreenSecurity`; 桌面侧保持原有 secure-by-default, 不再出现 Web/桌面基线分叉.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/ui/shared/platform/platform-adapter-security.test.ts` 的 `WebPlatformAdapter enables screen security by default to match desktop shells`.  |

| 2427 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §206 Bootstrap / 初始化 / testing基础设施 missing陷 | P0 | `src/index.ts:264` | main() 未call registerProcessErrorHandlers -- process异常无有序关闭兜底 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root Cause确实在根entryorder: 旧 `main()` 在进入 bootstrap / demo branch前没有先绑定 `uncaughtException` / `unhandledRejection` handle器, 导致process级异常无法统一进入 graceful shutdown.  | 当前 `src/index.ts` 已在 `main()` 开头call `registerProcessErrorHandlers(getGlobalGracefulShutdown())`; `tests/integration/platform/five-plane-execution/startup-lifecycle-integration.test.ts` 已验证会接上线级 `uncaughtException` 与 `unhandledRejection` handle器, 并补充了“同一 shutdown 实例duplicate注册不duplicate挂监听器”的回归.  | 根entry异常兜底已形成真实implementation与testing闭环.  |
| 2428 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §206 Bootstrap / 初始化 / testing基础设施 missing陷 | P0 | `src/index.ts:125` | runPlatformRootDemo not registered GracefulShutdown -- crashed时无优雅关停 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 复核后confirmation原问题在“direct demo entry”path: `runPlatformRootDemo()` 可被directlycall而bypass `main()`, 旧implementation虽然会execute业务逻辑, 但不会自行安装process级异常handle器.  | 当前 `src/index.ts` 已在 `runPlatformRootDemo()` 顶部先execute `const shutdown = getGlobalGracefulShutdown(); registerProcessErrorHandlers(shutdown);`, 再注册 demo cleanup handler; `tests/integration/platform/five-plane-execution/startup-lifecycle-integration.test.ts` 新增的 handler wiring 与 idempotent 回归证明该自注册path既能接通 graceful shutdown, 又不会与 `main()` path叠加出duplicate监听器.  | 这次是实修 demo 直调entry, 不是only在文档里改口.  |

| 2439 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §206 Bootstrap / 初始化 / testing基础设施 missing陷 | P2 | `tests/e2e/ui-web-flow.test.ts:7` | hardcodedpath且未check multi-shell 路由清单一致性 | 已解决 (源码复核)  | Root cause: 旧 smoke test 只盯单一路由/单壳层output, 不能证明 web route catalog 与多 shell 清单一起被coverage; 现行 e2e entry已升级为对 UI workspace 的统一 `npm run test:e2e` call, 并explicitlyvalidation route catalog 与 shells testing套件都被execute.  | 当前 `tests/e2e/ui-web-flow.test.ts` 会assertionoutput中同时contains `tests/apps/web-e2e-smoke.test.tsx`, `tests/apps/web-route-catalog.test.tsx` 与 `tests/apps/shells.test.ts`, 因此“未check multi-shell 路由清单一致性”已经与源码不符.  | 本条关闭basis为现行 e2e smoke 合同本身已把 multi-shell 与 route catalog 纳入Execution Plane; 本轮未duplicate跑整套 UI e2e.  |
