| 2443 | Round 41 — 深度补充审计 (ops-maturity / scale-ecosystem / SDK / plugins / config / UI-shared / bootstrap)  / §206 Bootstrap / 初始化 / testing基础设施 missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/startup/startup-consistency-checker.ts:16` | 硬dependency DispatchReconciliation construction -- 增加启动coupling | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧implementation曾在construction器内directly `new ExecutionDispatchReconciliationService(db, store)`, 把 startup checker 与 dispatch repair 具体implementation强coupling; 现行源码其实已经支持via `options.dispatchReconciliation` injection替身, 只是之前没有一条回归把这件事钉死.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/startup/startup-consistency-checker.ts` construction器会优先采用 `options.dispatchReconciliation`, only在missing省时才fallback到default实例; 本轮新增testing已证明injection的 mock reconciler 会directly驱动 `orphan_queue_claim` finding.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/startup/startup-consistency-checker.test.ts` 的 `StartupConsistencyChecker uses injected dispatch reconciliation service`.  |
| 2444 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/prompt-engine/rollout/prompt-rollout-stage.ts:1` | 渐进阶段 canary_5/partial_25/50/75 与 spec 定义的 canary(5%)/canary(20%) inconsistent | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 审计record停留在旧阶段naming, 旧implementation曾uses `canary_5/partial_25/50/75` 一组非规范枚举; 现行implementation已收敛到 contract 要求的 canonical 阶段名, 但此前missing少一条最小回归把旧枚举彻底钉死.  | 当前 `src/platform/prompt-engine/rollout/prompt-rollout-stage.ts` 的 `PROMPT_ROLLOUT_STAGES` 已定义为 `["canary(5%)", "canary(20%)", "stable", "rolled_back"]`, `isPromptRolloutStage()` 也只accepts这组 canonical 值.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/rollout/prompt-rollout-stage-audit-regressions.test.ts` 的 `PROMPT_ROLLOUT_STAGES uses the canonical canary(5%)/canary(20%) progression`, directly验证旧值 `canary_5`, `partial_25` 不再被accepts.  |
| 2445 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/prompt-engine/rollout/prompt-rollout-stage.ts:24` | nextStage() allows stable→rolled_back order推进 -- stable 应为终态 | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧推进逻辑把 `stable` 当作普通中间态, allows继续顺推到 `rolled_back`; 现行implementation已经把 `stable` 与 `rolled_back` 都收敛为终态, 但此前missing少directlycoverage `stable -> null` 的回归testing.  | 当前 `src/platform/prompt-engine/rollout/prompt-rollout-stage.ts` 的 `nextPromptRolloutStage()` 对 `stage === "stable" || stage === "rolled_back"` directlyreturn `null`, 不再allows `stable→rolled_back` 的伪前进.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/rollout/prompt-rollout-stage-audit-regressions.test.ts` 的 `nextPromptRolloutStage treats stable as a terminal state`, directly验证 `stable` 与 `rolled_back` 都不会再推进.  |
| 2446 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.ts:348` | runAbTest() hardcoded 0.85/0.90 分数 -- A/B testing结果完全虚假 | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧implementation曾把 control / treatment 结果近似写死为fixed阈值语义, 导致 A/B 结果脱离真实 case 评分; 现行implementation已改成按 case 相似度 / evaluator 实分计算, 并统一usesconfigure阈值, 但此前missing少一条directly证明“不会再退回hardcoded 0.85/0.90”的最小回归.  | 当前 `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.ts` 的 `runAbTest()` 已先计算 `passThreshold = config.significanceThreshold ?? 0.8`, 然后对 control / treatment 两侧都uses真实 `score >= passThreshold` 判定, 不再distinguish 0.85/0.90 两套hardcoded阈值.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.test.ts` 的 `LlmEvalService.runAbTest uses config significanceThreshold as the pass threshold for both arms`, directly验证阈值来自 `config.significanceThreshold` 且两侧同时failure, 不会出现旧implementation那种fixed阈值放行.  |
| 2447 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.ts:308` | verdict 不distinguish critical case -- only用 80% 阈值, critical_case_pass==100% 未implementation | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 verdict 计算只看整体via率, critical case failure时仍可能被非阻断阈值掩盖; 现行implementation已经在聚合阶段explicitly识别 `riskLevel === "critical"` 的failure case, 并force verdict 进入 `fail`, 但missing少最小回归钉住这一门禁.  | 当前 `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.ts` 的 `completeRun()` 会遍历failure结果的 `metadata.riskLevel`, 一旦发现 critical failure 就设置 `hasCriticalFailure = true` 并directlyoutput `verdict = "fail"`; 只有“无 critical failure 且via率 ≥ 95%”时才allows `degraded`.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.test.ts` 的 `LlmEvalService.completeRun fails when any critical case fails even if pass rate remains above 95%`, 验证 19/20 via但 1 个 critical case failure时仍会 fail, 而不是被高via率掩盖.  |
| 2448 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.ts:525` | detectRegression missing latency_regression≤120% 和 cost_regression≤150% 门禁 | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 regression 检测只看 score delta, 没有把延迟和成本恶化纳入回归门禁; 现行implementation已经补入 latency / cost 聚合与阈值判定, 但此前missing少分别命中 120% 与 150% 门槛的最小回归.  | 当前 `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.ts` 的 `detectRegression()` 已分别计算 `currentLatencyMs / previousLatencyMs` 与 metadata 中的平均 cost, 并在 `> 1.20` / `> 1.50` 时置位 `latencyRegression`, `costRegression`; return值里的 `hasRegression` 也已合并这两类门禁.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/eval/llm-eval-service.test.ts` 的 `LlmEvalService.detectRegression flags latency regression above 120% of baseline` 与 `LlmEvalService.detectRegression flags cost regression above 150% of baseline`, 分别验证两条门禁已真实生效.  |
| 2449 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/prompt-engine/conversation-template-service.ts:374` | next() 对已注销 template call registry.get() 抛异常而非return null | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | 真实Root Cause不是“现行 next 仍会抛异常”, 而是审计条目停留在旧implementation印象. 当前 `buildTemplatedConversation()` 在 `registry.get()` 取不到模板时已经return `null`, `next()` 再via `result ?? conversation` fail-closed return原会话, 不会因模板中途missing而crashed.  | 当前 `src/platform/prompt-engine/conversation-template-service.ts` 的 `next()` 会先call `buildTemplatedConversation(...)`, 后者在模板missing时directly `return null`, `next()` 则return原 `conversation` 而不是抛错.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/prompt-engine/conversation-template-service.test.ts` 的 `ConversationTemplateExecutor.next returns the existing conversation when template is no longer available mid-flow`, directly验证 `registry.get()` return `undefined` 时不会抛异常.  |
| 2450 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts:82` | settle() in-memory计算 ledger -- 无 SQL CAS 原子操作, concurrent settle 余额inconsistent | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧结论based on `BudgetAllocator` 只有process内state机, 没有权威 SQL CAS 写entry的时期; 现行implementation已补出可injection的原子仓储边界.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-allocator.ts` 已引入 `BudgetAtomicRepository`, 并在 `settle()` / `release()` 中优先call `settleAtomically()/releaseAtomically()` execute SQL 级 CAS 更新; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/reaudit-batch-2009-2517.test.ts` 已定向验证 atomic repository path会被call并return原子更新后的 ledger.  | 关闭预算结算missing SQL CAS 原子提交的问题.  |
| 2451 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/runtime-state-machine.ts:322` | assertAuditRef 不validation null -- requiresAudit=true 时转换可不提供 auditRef | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 早期 `assertAuditRef()` 只coverage空字符串语义, 没有把 `null/undefined` 作为missing值一并reject; 现行implementation已经收敛为explicitly `command.auditRef == null || trim().length === 0` check, 但missing少independent的最小回归.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/runtime-state-machine.ts` 的 `assertAuditRef()` 已在 requires-audit 场景下对 `null`, `undefined` 和空白字符串统一throws `runtime_state_machine.audit_ref_required`.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/runtime-state-machine-audit-regressions.test.ts`, directly验证 `HarnessRun created -> admitted` 且 `auditRef: null` 会被reject.  |
| 2452 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/memory/memory-decay-service.ts:161` | access boost 指数增长致 freshness 恒=1.0 -- 高频记忆never衰减violates 6 层模型 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  access boost 公式长期missing少稳定的“衰减率抑制”模型: 早期加法式 boost 会把 freshness 往 `1.0` 顶满, 而现行中间implementation虽然removal了加法饱和, 却又把 boost 乘进 decay rate, 反而让高频记忆衰减更快. 两种implementation都不满足 6 层模型要求的“高频访问减缓衰减, 但仍会继续衰减”.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/memory/memory-decay-service.ts` 的 `calculateFreshness()` 已改为先计算 `accessBoostMultiplier = 1 + accessBoostFactor * log(1 + hitCount)`, 再用 `(decayRate * decayRateMultiplier) / accessBoostMultiplier` 抑制衰减率; `calculateDecay()` 也synchronousreturn与实际计算一致的 `effectiveDecayRate`, 不再出现高 hitCount 加速衰减或 freshness 饱和到 `1.0`.  | 本轮via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/memory/memory-decay-service.test.ts` 的 `calculateFreshness with hitCount applies access boost` 与新增的 `calculateFreshness slows decay for frequently accessed memories without pinning freshness to 1.0`, 分别验证高 hitCount 会提高 freshness, 且不会把 freshness lock死在 `1.0`.  |
| 2453 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/cas-service.ts:46` | CAS 纯in-memory Map -- 多节点无一致性保证 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root Cause不是“只有没接 SQLite”这么简单, 而是上一版修复只把 `CasService` 抽象成 repository injection, 却没有把 compare-and-swap 真正下沉到存储层原子语句; `SqliteCasRepository` 之前仍是 `get()` + `set()` 两步, 等于把in-memory竞态原样搬到了 SQLite 外围.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/cas-service.ts` 已把 `compareAndSwap/compareAndSet` 完全委托给 repository 原子原语; `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/sqlite-cas-repository.ts` 也已改成 `INSERT ... WHERE NOT EXISTS` 与 `UPDATE ... WHERE value/version = ?` 的单语句 CAS, 不再走 `get()+set()` 两步. 定向回归 `tests/integration/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/cas-and-truth-services.test.ts` 新增的 `CAS service: SQLite-backed instances share durable state and reject stale compare-and-set` 已验证两个 `CasService(SqliteCasRepository)` 实例shared同一 SQLite file时, 后写实例能读到前写值, 旧版本 CAS 会被正确reject.  | 现行implementation已同时补齐“shared持久存储”和“存储层原子 compare-and-set”两层missing口; `createInMemoryCasService()` only保留为testing helper, 不再是权威implementation.  |
| 2454 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-reservation-sweeper.ts:31` | expiresAt 格式异常时 Date.parse return NaN -- 孤儿 reservation never释放 | 已解决 (源码复核)  | Root cause: 旧implementationdirectlyuses `Date.parse(reservation.expiresAt)` 参与比较, 遇到非法时间串会得到 `NaN`, 从而skip释放条件; 现行implementation已经把非法 `expiresAt` 视为应立即cleanup的坏data.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-reservation-sweeper.ts` 在 `Number.isNaN(expiresAtMs)` 时directlyreturn `true`, 把非法时间格式的 reservation 纳入释放列表.  | 现有 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/budget-reservation-sweeper.test.ts` 的 `sweep() handles invalid date format (NaN) by expiring immediately` 已directlycoverage该行为; 本轮定向回归再次via.  |
| 2455 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/redis-lock-adapter.ts:97` | fencingCounter 实例级 -- 多 pod 各自从 0 递增, 无globallymonotonic性 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧implementation把 fencing token 计数器保exists适配器实例内, 导致不同 pod / 不同 adapter process各自从 0 起步, 无法满足分布式lock fencing token 的globallymonotonic性要求.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/redis-lock-adapter.ts` 的 `acquireAsync()` 与 `forceStealAsync()` 都已改为 `await this.redis.incr("lock:fencing_counter")` 从 Redis 侧统一发号, 实例field只cached最后一次结果, 不再承担globally计数职责.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/distributed-lock-audit-regressions.test.ts` 的 `RedisLockAdapter shares a Redis-backed monotonic fencing counter across adapter instances`, directly验证两个 adapter 实例与一次 steal 会得到 `1/2/3` 的globally递增 token.  |
| 2456 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/redis-lock-adapter.ts:130` | extendAsync Lua 不更新 JSON.ttlMs -- inspect returnexpiry值 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 Lua 延期path只修改 Redis 键的实际 TTL, 没有synchronous回写序列化 `LockData` 里的 `ttlMs`, 导致subsequent `inspect` / `get` 读到的元data与真实expiry时间drift.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/redis-lock-adapter.ts` 的 `extendAsync()` Lua 已先写入 `data.ttlMs = newTtl`, 再用 `redis.call('set', KEYS[1], cjson.encode(data), 'PX', newTtl)` 原子更新content与 TTL, 不再留下旧 `ttlMs`.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/distributed-lock-audit-regressions.test.ts` 的 `RedisLockAdapter extendAsync writes back updated ttlMs and preserves a PX TTL update path`, directly验证脚本contains `data.ttlMs = newTtl` 且uses `PX` 更新path.  |
| 2457 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/redis-lock-adapter.ts:182` | forceSteal SET XX -- 原 lock expiry被 Redis 删除后 steal failure | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 steal 语义dependency `SET ... XX`, 只有旧 key 仍exists时才能coverage; 一旦原 lock 已因 TTL 被 Redis 清掉, force-steal 反而failure. 现行implementation已经改为无 `XX` 的directly写入, 但此前missing少最小回归证明“旧 key 不exists也能 steal”.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/redis-lock-adapter.ts` 的 `forceStealAsync()` uses `this.redis.set(key, JSON.stringify(lockData), "PX", String(Math.ceil(ttlMs)))`, 不再附带 `XX` 条件.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/distributed-lock-audit-regressions.test.ts` 的 `RedisLockAdapter forceStealAsync no longer depends on XX and succeeds when the old lock is already absent`, directly验证missing旧 key 时仍能success steal, 且 `set` 参数里不含 `XX`.  |
| 2458 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/pg-advisory-lock-adapter.ts:31` | lockKey hash only 32-bit -- collision概率高 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 advisory key 推导只落在 32-bit 空间, 长尾 lock key 在多tenant/多 workflow 场景下collision概率过高; 现行implementation已切换到 64-bit FNV-1a 并压到正 63-bit range, 但此前missing少专门回归证明不会再退回 32-bit truncated.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/pg-advisory-lock-adapter.ts` 的 `lockKeyToAdvisoryKey()` uses FNV-1a 64-bit 累积, 并在return前execute `hash & BigInt("0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF")`, 把 key 保持在 PostgreSQL advisory lock 可accepts的正 63-bit 空间.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/distributed-lock-audit-regressions.test.ts` 的 `PgAdvisoryLockAdapter lockKeyToAdvisoryKey is not truncated to a 32-bit hash`, directly验证生成值大于 `0xFFFFFFFFn` 且不超过 `0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFn`.  |
| 2459 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/pg-advisory-lock-adapter.ts:66` | extend() return inspect() 恒 null -- 扩展silentlyfailure | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧synchronous `extend()` path把“不支持的 PostgreSQL advisory lock 续租”masks成 `inspect()/null` return, call方会把silentlyfailure误判成普通未命中, 而不是能力不支持. 现行implementation已改为 fail-closed 抛错, 但此前missing少单独回归.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/pg-advisory-lock-adapter.ts` 的 `extend()` 已directlythrows `lock.pg_async_required`, 明确要求call `extendAsync()`, 不再return `null` 掩盖failure.  | 本轮修正并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/distributed-lock/pg-advisory-lock-adapter.test.ts` 的 `PgAdvisoryLockAdapter extend() throws pg_async_required`, directly验证synchronous续租现在会explicitlyfailure.  |
| 2460 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.ts:58` | activeFences static Map 但 tokenCounter 实例级 -- 不同实例可生成相同 token | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧implementation确实exists“static fence 表 + 实例private counter”的拆裂设计; 现行代码已经把 token counter 收敛为process级 `globalTokenCounter`, 但missing少directly证明“跨实例仍monotonic递增”的最小testing.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.ts` 已把计数器改为 `private static readonly globalTokenCounter`, `generateFencingToken()` 不再从实例private计数器取值.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.test.ts` 的 `FencingTokenService shares a monotonic counter across service instances`, 验证两个 service 实例生成的 counter 仍严格递增.  |
| 2461 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.ts:100` | split("-") 解析 -- executionId/nodeId 含 "-" 时解析error | 已解决 (源码复核)  | Root cause: 旧 token 格式曾按 `"-"` 解析, 遇到 UUID 或多段 hyphenated ID 会把 executionId/nodeId 错拆. 现行implementation已经统一改用专用分隔符 `::` 并对 executionId/nodeId 做 URL 编码.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.ts` uses `FENCING_TOKEN_SEPARATOR = "::"` 生成 token, 并在 `validateFencingToken()` 中按 `token.split(FENCING_TOKEN_SEPARATOR)` 解析.  | 现有 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/cas/fencing-token-service.test.ts` 已coverage UUID executionId, 多段 `-` executionId 和error owner 等场景; 本轮定向回归再次via.  |
| 2462 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/ops-maturity/explainability/explanation-pipeline-service.ts:80` | L3 TTL=0 条目仍写入cached -- 审计解释不可检索 | 已解决 (源码复核)  | Root Cause不是 L3 解释现在仍然写cached, 而是 reaudit 沿用了修复前印象. 现行implementation已经把 L3 cached TTL fixed为 `0`, 并viacached写entry在 `ttlHours === 0` 时directlyskip写入, 只是missing少把“L3 不进入cached”单独回写到审计表.  | 当前 `src/ops-maturity/explainability/explanation-pipeline-service.ts` 在 `depth === "L3"` 时设置 `cacheTtlHours = 0`, `src/ops-maturity/explainability/explanation-cache/index.ts` 的 `putExplanationCacheEntry()` 又在 `entry.ttlHours === 0` 时directlyreturn原 cache, 不会写入 L3 条目.  | 已复跑并via `tests/unit/ops-maturity/explanation-pipeline-service.test.ts` 的 `ExplanationPipelineService preserves facts across depths and redacts unauthorized evidence`, 其中explicitlyassertion `service.getCached(audit.cacheKey) === null`, directly验证 L3 不cached.  |
| 2463 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §208 Compliance / Model-Gateway / Prompt-Engine 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/prompt-model-policy-governance-service.ts:162` | reviewRequired=false directly approved -- skip staging eval gate | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧注册path确实曾把 `reviewRequired=false` directly映射成已批准state, 导致 release 可能bypasssubsequent staging eval gate; 现行implementation已经统一收敛到 `review_required`, 但仓内还residual一条旧assertion把这种bypass当成正确行为.  | 当前 `src/platform/prompt-engine/eval/prompt-model-policy-governance-service.ts` 的 `registerPromptRelease()`, `registerModelRelease()`, `registerPolicyBundleRelease()` 都explicitly写入 `status: "review_required"`, 不再让 `reviewRequired=false` directly变成 `approved`.  | 本轮修正并via `tests/integration/platform/prompt-engine/eval/prompt-model-policy-governance-service-integration.test.ts` 的 `governance service getRelease keeps newly registered releases at review_required even when reviewRequired=false`, directly验证注册后state仍是 `review_required`.  |
| 2464 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-inner.ts:353` | renewLeadership return currentLease.ttlMs 而非 fencing token -- 续约后 stale-write validation失效 | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 早期synchronous版 `renewLeadership()` 的return值contract确实曾把 TTL 暴露成 `fencingToken` 语义, subsequentimplementation已改为从最新 leadership epoch 读取 fencing token, 但 reaudit 表没有跟进, 且missing少一条directly钉死“不能把 ttlMs 当 token return”的最小回归.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-inner.ts` 在续约后会call `getLatestEpoch()`, 并explicitlyreturn `fencingToken: latestEpoch.fencingToken`, 不再return lease TTL.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-inner.test.ts` 的 `renewLeadership returns epoch fencing token instead of ttlMs`; 同轮还把 `verifyWriteAuthority` 的旧testingassertion改成与现行 “presented token 必须大于 current token” 语义一致, 保证这组 HA fencing 回归证据可用.  |
| 2465 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts:228` | 异步版同样return ttlMs 作为 fencing token | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root Cause与synchronous版相同: 问题原本在旧implementation中真实exists, 但当前 async 版本已经在续约时读取最新 epoch fencing token; remainingmissing口是没有directlyassertion该return值与 epoch token 一致, 且不等于 `ttlMs`.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts` 在 `renewLeadership()` 内先call `getLatestEpoch()`, 随后更新 `cachedFencingToken`, 并return `fencingToken: latestEpoch.fencingToken`.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.test.ts` 的 `renewLeadership returns epoch fencing token instead of ttlMs`, 与synchronous版单测一起形成最小闭环证据.  |
| 2466 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-inner.ts:701` | fencingTokenCounter in-memory变量 -- 重启归零可复用旧 token | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧synchronous版确实dependency过实例内 fencing counter; 现行implementation已经改成从持久 epoch 表读取 `MAX(fencing_token)+1`, 但 reaudit 条目没有更新, 而且原单测 mock 也没有implementation `SELECT MAX(fencing_token)` 聚合, 导致这条修复missing少可信的最小回归证据.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-inner.ts` 的 `nextFencingToken()` 已改为query `leadership_epochs` 的 `MAX(fencing_token)` 再加一, 不再dependencyprocess内 counter, 因此重启后仍从持久 token 空间继续递增.  | 本轮补齐 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-inner.test.ts` 的 mock `MAX(fencing_token)` 支持, 并新增 `fencing token remains monotonic across service instances sharing the same DB`, 验证两个 service 实例shared同一 DB 时 token 仍monotonic递增.  |
| 2467 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts:510` | 异步版 counter 各节点independent递增 -- 无globally唯一性 | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 async service 的 fallback path 曾被审计为“节点各自maintained counter”; 现行implementation已经不保存节点private fencing 计数, 而是via repo 的 latest epoch 推导下一个 token, atomic repo path 则directly在后端transaction里分配 fencing token. remaining问题是没有一条跨 service 实例的最小回归证明这一点.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts` 的 fallback `nextFencingToken()` based on `getLatestEpoch().fencingToken + 1`, 而 atomic path 会委派给 repo `acquireLeadershipAtomically()` 在shared后端内生成 token; 因此 token 来源已经收敛到shared epoch state, 而不是实例private变量.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.test.ts` 的 `fencing token remains monotonic across service instances sharing the same repo`, 验证两个 async service shared同一 repo 时 token 仍按globally epoch monotonic递增.  |
| 2468 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts:102` | acquireLeadership 无transaction -- concurrent可同时获得 leadership 脑裂 | 已修复 | Root cause: 旧 async service 自己串联 `getCurrentLeader/getLatestEpoch/insertLease/upsertNode/insertEpoch` 多次异步 repo call, 既没有单transaction边界, 也没有 PostgreSQL 侧 advisory lock, 因此两个竞争者可能同时读到同一 epoch 和空闲 leadership 视graph, 最终各自写入新 lease/epoch.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts` 已优先委派到 repo 原子entry `acquireLeadershipAtomically()`; `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-repository-sqlite.ts` 现在把 leader demote, 旧 lease 失效, 新 lease/epoch/failover decision 写入包进同一个 `db.transaction(...)`; `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-repository-postgres.ts` 则在 `db.transaction(...)` 内先拿 `pg_try_advisory_xact_lock` 再execute同一批state迁移, 不再由 service 在transaction外拼接写链.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.test.ts` 的 `acquireLeadership delegates to atomic repo path when available`, `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-repository-sqlite.test.ts` 的 `acquireLeadershipAtomically rotates leader state in one transaction`, `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-repository-postgres.test.ts` 的 `acquireLeadershipAtomically uses xact lock and rotates leader state`.  |
| 2469 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.ts:387` | getExpiredLeases dependency getActiveLease(只return未expiry) -- 永远找不到expiry租约 | 已解决 | Root Cause不是 reclaimer 现在仍从 `getActiveLease()` 倒推expiry租约, 而是 reaudit 条目停留在旧implementation: 早期版本确实只看“当前 active lease 视graph”, 导致真正已expiry的租约永远进不了 reclaim cycle; 现行implementation已经改成directlyquery expired lease rows, 只是文档和assertion没synchronous.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.ts` 的 `getExpiredLeases()` 已directlycall `coordinator.getExpiredLeaseRows()`, 不再dependency `getActiveLease()` 这种只暴露未expiry租约的视graph. 本轮补强 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.test.ts` 中的 `expired lease detection` 用例, 明确验证expiry租约会被识别, `reclaimedCount === 1`, 并且对应 lease state被改成 `expired`.  | 回写真implementation状与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2470 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.ts:415` | expireLease only打log不executestate变更 -- expiry租约无法回收 | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧 `expireLease()` 只有log侧效果, 没有把 lease status 从 `active` 推进到 `expired`; subsequentimplementation已补上 coordinator state写入, 但 reaudit 仍沿用漏洞时期结论.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.ts` 的 `expireLease()` 已directlycall `coordinator.expireLease(lease.leaseId)`, `expireLeaseForNode()` 也会在 stale-node 场景下实际推进state. 本轮补强 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.test.ts` 的 `reclaimOnce() processes expired lease after grace period`, 验证回收后 `coordinator.mockState.leases.get("node-1")?.status === "expired"`, 不再只是“跑过流程”.  | 回写真implementation状与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2471 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/recovery/runtime-recovery-service.ts:298` | findStaleExecuting 用 now+threshold 而非 now-threshold -- 所有execute被判 stale | 已解决 | Root Cause不是当前 stale-execution query仍把阈值方向算反, 而是 reaudit 停留在旧implementation; 现行 `findStaleExecuting()` 已按 `Date.now() - thresholdMs` 计算 stale 上界, 只是旧文档和testing没有把这个边界真正assertion出来.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/recovery/runtime-recovery-service.ts` 已uses `const staleBefore = new Date(Date.now() - thresholdMs).toISOString()`, 再交给 `listStaleRuns(staleBefore, ...)`. 本轮补强 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/recovery/runtime-recovery-service.test.ts`, 验证传给 store 的 `staleBefore` 落在 `now - threshold` 边界, 而不是 `now + threshold`.  | 回写真implementation状与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2472 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts:487` | verifyWriteAuthority >= 比较 -- 旧 leader 持当前 token 仍可写入 | 已解决 | Root Cause不是 async coordinator 仍以 `>=` 放行当前 token, 而是文档和旧testing停留在修复前语义; 现行implementation已经改为严格 `>` 比较, 要求 presented token 必须大于当前cached token.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts` 的 `verifyWriteAuthority()` 已明确return `presentedFencingToken > this.cachedFencingToken`. 本轮补强 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.test.ts`, explicitly验证“当前 token 100 被reject, only 101 via”.  | 回写真implementation状与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2473 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts:503` | purgeOldFailoverDecisions hardcodedreturn 0 -- failover 历史nevercleanup | 已解决 | Root Cause不是 async service 现在还hardcodedreturn `0`, 而是审计和旧testing没有跟进subsequentimplementation: 现行代码已经把cleanup职责下放给 repo, 并在 repo 不可用时才保守fallback.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.ts` 已call `await this.repo.purgeOldFailoverDecisions(olderThanDays)`; 本轮补强 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/ha-coordinator-service-async.test.ts`, 为 mock repo 增加真实cleanupimplementation, 并验证expiry failover decision 会被删除, returncleanup计数 `1`.  | 回写真implementation状与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2474 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/leader-election-service.ts:176` | HA_1 单节点无续约定时器 -- 租约expiry后不auto续期 | 已解决 | Root Cause不是当前 HA_1 模式仍停在“只创建单节点 lease, 之后不续约”的旧implementation, 而是 reaudit 与一条旧testing标题都停留在修复前; 现行 `start()` 已在单节点branchexplicitly启动 renewal loop.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/leader-election-service.ts` 在 `haLevel === "HA_1"` branch里会construction单节点 lease, 启动 heartbeat, 并在 `leaseRenewalIntervalMs <= 0` 时fallback到 `5_000ms` 续约定时器, 周期性call `renewLeadership()`. 本轮补强 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/leader-election-service.test.ts`, via `renewLeadershipCalls` 计数验证 HA_1 启动后会实际发生续约call.  | 回写真implementation状与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2475 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/stuck-run-sweeper-service.ts:559` | killRun 先设 status="killed" 再调回调 -- 回调failure时state已pollute | 已解决 | Root Cause不是当前 `killRun()` 仍然先pollutestate再调回调, 而是旧testing和 reaudit 结论没有跟进subsequent修复; 现行implementation已经先等待 kill callback success, failure时directlyreturn `false`, 不再把 run 标成 `killed`.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/stuck-run-sweeper-service.ts` 已在 `onKillExecution` returnfailure时提前退出, 只有 callback success后才execute `run.status = "killed"`. 本轮修正 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/stuck-run-sweeper-service.test.ts` 的过时assertion, explicitly验证 kill callback return `false` 时 run 仍保持 `warning` 且 `killedAt === null`.  | 回写真implementation状并补齐定向testing证据.  |
| 2476 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/recovery-orchestrator-service.ts:27` | recovery worker serial for-of await -- 无parallel度, 大量待恢复项延迟高 | 已解决 | Root Cause不是现行 orchestrator 仍然individual `for-of await` worker, 而是 reaudit 条目停留在旧implementation快照; 当前代码早已先按优先级sort, 再把每个 worker 包成 promise, 用 `Promise.all(...)` concurrentexecute, 只是仓内missing少directly证明“确实parallel”的单测.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/recovery-orchestrator-service.ts` 已construction `const workerPromises = orderedWorkers.map(async ...)`, 随后统一 `await Promise.all(workerPromises)`, 不是serial等待.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/recovery-orchestrator-service.test.ts` 的 `RecoveryOrchestratorService runs recovery workers in parallel once sorted`, directlyassertion两个 worker 在同一 cycle 内concurrentoverlapexecute, `maxConcurrentWorkers >= 2`.  |
| 2477 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/dispatcher/execution-dispatch-service.ts:401` | 嵌套transaction -- SQLite 不支持 SAVEPOINT 嵌套可silentlyfailure | 已解决 | Root Cause不是 dispatch 主path真的跑在“不支持嵌套transaction”的 SQLite 上, 而是审计和一处旧comment都误把标准 SQLite limitdirectly套到了本项目自定义transactionwrapper器上; 实际uses的 `SqliteDatabase.transaction()` 明确implementation了 `SAVEPOINT/RELEASE/ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT`, 正是为 `dispatch -> acquireLease` 这种嵌套transaction链准备的.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/sqlite/sqlite-database.ts` 的 `runInTransaction()` 在 root write transaction 用 `BEGIN IMMEDIATE`, 嵌套层uses `SAVEPOINT aa_tx_n` / `RELEASE SAVEPOINT` / `ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT`; `src/platform/five-plane-execution/dispatcher/execution-dispatch-service.ts` 主派发path继续在外层 `this.db.transaction(...)` 中call `this.leases.acquireLease(...)`, 而这条嵌套链现在有真实 savepoint 保护. 本轮还synchronous修正了 emergency lane 旁边那条已经过时的mislead性comment.  | 本轮复跑并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/sqlite-database.test.ts` 的 `sqlite database nested transactions roll back only the inner savepoint`, directly证明内层transactionfailure只rollback savepoint, 不会把外层transaction一并pollute.  |
| 2478 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.ts:247` | releaseLeaseSync 不check lease.status -- 已expiry租约可被再次释放 | 已解决 | Root Cause不是当前 async 版 `releaseLeaseSync()` 仍漏掉 status check, 而是 reaudit 与一条旧单测都停留在漏洞时期描述; 现行implementation已经和 sync 版一致, 在释放前先拦截 `lease.status !== "active"`.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async.ts` 的 `releaseLeaseSync()` 已在 worker validation后立即execute `if (lease.status !== "active") return { outcome: "blocked", reasonCode: "lease_not_active" }`. 仓内 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service-async-r9.test.ts` 早已coverage“already released / expired lease 均return `lease_not_active`”; 本轮进一步修正 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/lease-service.test.ts` 的过时assertion, 使基线与现行implementation一致.  | 回写真implementation状并补齐定向testing/testing基线证据.  |
| 2479 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/tool-parallel-executor.ts:407` | results array含 undefined 空洞 -- returntypeassertion T[] 致下游 NPE | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧parallelexecute器在 tool failurebranch只record `errors.push(...)`, 没有给 `results[originalIndex]` 明确赋值, 导致结果array留下 sparse hole; 下游把它当致密 `T[]` 消费时, 既拿不到placeholder也更容易出现index位误判.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/tool-parallel-executor.ts` 在parallel和 exclusive failurepath都会explicitly写入 `results[index] = undefined`, 不再留下 hole; 本轮扩展 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/tool-parallel-executor.test.ts`, 新增用例验证failure槽位 `1 in result.results === true` 且return `["ok-0", undefined, "ok-2"]`.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2480 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P1 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-executor.ts:162` | activeProcessCount static 无lock -- 高concurrent可超限 | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧implementation先经过多段异步validation再递增 `activeProcessCount`, concurrentrequest会同时观察到“尚未超限”并一起穿过阈值check, static计数器等于没形成真正的保留位. 现行implementation已把check和placeholder收敛成synchronous临界区, 并在所有退出path释放槽位.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-executor.ts` 在 `execute()` 开头先execute `if (activeProcessCount >= MAX...) return blocked`, 随后synchronous `activeProcessCount++`, 并via `releaseSlot()` + 双层 `finally` 保证释放; 本轮扩展 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-executor.test.ts`, 新增用例验证“达到upper limit时return `tool.process_limit_exceeded`, 释放后同一 executor 可恢复executesuccess”.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小定向testing证据.  |
| 2481 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-executor.ts:99` | Windows/Unix uses相同 SIGTERM -- Windows 上无效 | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧implementation把 Unix 的“process组 SIGTERM”语义directly套到了 Windows, 后者既不支持负 PID process组 kill, 也不能dependency同一套回收path; 现行implementation已经把 Unix / Windows branch拆开, 但此前missing少跨平台branch级回归.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-executor.ts` 的 `killProcessTree()` 在 `process.platform !== "win32"` 时对 `-pid` 发送 `SIGTERM/SIGKILL`, 而在 `win32` 时改为directlycall `child.kill("SIGTERM")` / `child.kill("SIGKILL")`, 不再复用 Unix process组语义.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-executor.test.ts` 的 `command executor timeout uses process-group kill on Unix platforms` 与 `command executor timeout uses child.kill on win32 instead of process-group SIGTERM`, 分别验证两条branch.  |
| 2482 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-security.ts:259` | 过度拦截脚本参数 -- python --verbose 等合法用法被reject | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧解释器signaturevalidationdefault把 `args[0]` 当脚本path, 导致 `python --verbose script.py` 这类“前置解释器 flag + 真正脚本path在后面”的合法call被误判成missing脚本或危险 flag. 现行implementation已改为寻找第一个非 flag 参数作为脚本path.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-security.ts` 的 `validateCommandSignature()` 已via `args.findIndex((arg) => !arg.startsWith("-"))` 查找真实脚本path, 并only在“全是 flag / 根本没有脚本path”时return `tool.command_interpreter_flag_denied`.  | 已复跑并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/tool-executor/command-security.test.ts` 的 `CommandSafetyClassifier allows interpreter pre-flags when a real script path follows`, 同时补齐 `CommandSafetyClassifier allows interpreter arguments after the script path`, confirmation合法脚本参数不再被误拦截.  |
| 2483 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service.ts:797` | getLatestFencingToken fallback return 0 -- 任何 token validation均via | 已解决 (源码复核并补定向testing)  | 审计命中的是真missing陷的旧形态: 早期写validationpath确实dependency helper fallback, helper missing时可能把 authoritative token 误判成 `0`. 现行 `validateWriteAccess()` 已不再从该 helper 取validation基准, 而是directly读取最新 lease record, 因此 helper fallback 不会让arbitrary token via.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service.ts` 的 `validateWriteAccess()` 先call `getLatestExecutionLease()` 得到 `latestLease`, 随后以 `latestLease.fencingToken` 作为 `authoritativeFencingToken`, 并对 active lease 的 `fencingToken` 做严格相等validation; 该validationpath没有再call底部的 `getLatestFencingToken()` helper.  | 本轮新增并via `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/lease/execution-lease-service.test.ts` 的 `validateWriteAccess rejects stale tokens even when worker store omits getLatestFencingToken helper`, 在故意删除 helper 的情况下仍验证 stale token 会被reject, authoritative token 保持为最新 lease 的 `7`.  |
| 2484 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §209 HA / Lease / Recovery / Worker-Pool / Dispatcher 深层missing陷 | P2 | `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.ts:406` | getStaleNodes hardcodedreturn空array -- 心跳timeout节点never检测 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 `LeaseReclaimerService` 只handle“已落到 lease expiry表象”的节点, 没有任何 heartbeat 维度的 stale-node 扫描; 即便仓内 `HaRepository` 早就有 stale querycontract, reclaimer 本体仍directly `return []`, 导致timeout节点永远进不了回收/故障转移链.  | 本轮为 `LeaseReclaimerConfig` 补入 `staleNodeThresholdMs`, 并在 `src/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.ts` 中按 `lastHeartbeatAt` filter `listNodes("active")`, 将timeout节点纳入 reclaim cycle. `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-execution/ha/lease-reclaimer-service.test.ts` 已新增 “stale node detection reclaims leader node that missed heartbeats” 用例, 验证 stale leader 会被识别并计入 `reclaimedCount`.  | 已改生产代码与最小定向testing.  |
| 2485 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/tauri-macos/src-tauri/src/lib.rs:12` | run_shell arbitrary字符串无validation -- 远程代码execute | 已解决 | Root cause: 早期 Tauri macOS 壳层把 renderer 传入的 `command` 当作可信输入directlyexecute, 没有任何命令 allowlist 或 fail-closed 拦截; 当前implementation已把 `run_shell` 收敛成fixed诊断命令白名单, 但 reaudit 文档没synchronous.  | 当前 `ui/apps/tauri-macos/src-tauri/src/lib.rs` 已声明 `ALLOWED_COMMANDS = ["status", "health", "version"]`, 并在 `run_shell()` 中先execute `if !is_command_allowed(&command) { return Err(...) }`; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/tauri-shell-security.test.ts` 已验证 macOS 壳层源码中exists该 allowlist 与rejectbranch.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小壳层安全回归证据.  |
| 2486 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/tauri-linux/src-tauri/src/lib.rs:12` | 同上 Linux 端无输入filter | 已解决 | Root Cause与 macOS 条目相同: 旧 Linux Tauri shell 同样把arbitrary `command` 字符串当作可execute输入, 没有validation或白名单; 现行implementation已收敛为fixed命令 allowlist.  | 当前 `ui/apps/tauri-linux/src-tauri/src/lib.rs` 已声明同样的 `ALLOWED_COMMANDS = ["status", "health", "version"]`, 并在 `run_shell()` 中reject非 allowlist 命令; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/tauri-shell-security.test.ts` 已验证 Linux 壳层源码中同样exists allowlist 与rejectbranch.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小壳层安全回归证据.  |
| 2487 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/electron-win/src/preload.ts:33` | directly赋值 window.**AA_ELECTRON** bypass contextBridge -- 安全模式失效 | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧 preload 暴露链把 bridge directly挂到 `window`, renderer 可bypass `contextIsolation` 拿到原始对象; subsequent代码已切到 `contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld(...)`, 但 reaudit 文档与回归基线一直停留在旧漏洞描述.  | 当前 `ui/apps/electron-win/src/preload.ts` 已via `resolveContextBridge()?.exposeInMainWorld("AA_ELECTRON", bridge)` 暴露桥接, 不再directly写入 `window`; 本轮 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/electron-win/preload.test.ts` 已验证会call `exposeInMainWorld`, 且 `targetWindow` 上不existsdirectly属性injection.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小壳层安全回归证据.  |
| 2488 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/electron-win/index.html:1` | missing CSP meta 标签 -- violates§6.5.4 安全基线 | 已解决 | Root Cause不是 Electron shell 仍missing浏览器安全基线, 而是历史审计命中了未补 CSP 的早期 HTML 模板; 当前 `index.html` 已带 CSP / `X-Content-Type-Options` / `X-Frame-Options`, 只是 reaudit 没synchronous.  | 当前 `ui/apps/electron-win/index.html` 已声明 `Content-Security-Policy` 且contains `default-src 'self'`, `frame-ancestors 'none'`; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/security-configs.test.ts` 已验证 Electron shell HTML 中exists该 CSP 基线.  | 回写现行源码与最小staticconfigure回归basis.  |
| 2489 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/tauri-macos/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json:1` | missing security 段/CSP/allowlist -- default开放全部 IPC | 已解决 | Root cause: 审计based on旧的 Tauri macOS 壳层configure快照; 当前configure已经explicitly声明 `security.csp`, 并保持 `dangerousDisableAssetCspModification=false`, 不再是“default开放全部 IPC”的bareconfigure.  | 当前 `ui/apps/tauri-macos/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` 已contains `security.csp` 与 `dangerousDisableAssetCspModification: false`; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/security-configs.test.ts` 已验证该安全段真实exists.  | 回写真implementation状与最小configure回归basis.  |
| 2490 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P0 | `ui/apps/tauri-linux/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json:1` | 同上 Linux Tauri configuremissing security | 已解决 | Root Cause与 macOS 条目相同: reaudit 仍沿用未补安全段的旧 Linux Tauri configure描述, 而现行 `tauri.conf.json` 已明确写入 `security.csp` 和资产 CSP 保护开关.  | 当前 `ui/apps/tauri-linux/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` 已contains `security.csp` 与 `dangerousDisableAssetCspModification: false`; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/security-configs.test.ts` 已验证 Linux configure同样具备该安全段.  | 回写真implementation状与最小configure回归basis.  |
| 2491 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P1 | `ui/packages/features/hitl/src/hooks/index.ts:5` | HITL missing Patch+Override 能力 -- onlyimplementation Inspect/Takeover/Resume (3/5) | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧 HITL VM 虽然已有 patch/override 表单, 但 `patch()` / `override()` 只有 `console.info` stub, 没有default client injection, 也没有把修改request提交到现有审批 decision API, 因此动作一直停在 UI 层.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/hitl/src/hooks/index.ts` 已default接入 shared-state 的 `useRestClient()/useWsClient()`, 并在 `patch()` / `override()` 中call shared API helper `submitApprovalTextInput(...)`; `ui/packages/shared/api-client/src/endpoints.ts` 也新增了该 helper, 并via现有 `/approvals/:approvalId/decision` entry以 `decisionType: "text_input"` + `inputText` 提交 patch/override payload, 不再只是locallog.  | 本轮复跑并via `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/hitl/hooks.test.tsx` (`--environment jsdom`) 中的 `submits patch actions through the approval decision API and removes the item` 与 `submits override actions through the approval decision API and removes the item`.  |

| 2501 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/features/workflow-cockpit/src/hooks/index.ts:30` | useWorkflowsQuery + useState 双持 -- cached一致性偏差 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 hook 把 `useWorkflowsQuery().data` 整份复制进local `useState(workflows)`, 随后动作流再改local副本, 导致 React Query cached与 VM 影子state双持; 一旦后端刷新或其他组件写cached, cockpit 视graph就可能继续展示expiry副本.  | 本轮已把 `queryWorkflows` 恢复为唯一主data源: `ui/packages/features/workflow-cockpit/src/hooks/index.ts` 现在只保留按 workflowId 粒度的 `workflowOverrides` optimistic overlay, 并在动作success后 `invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["workflows"] })` 回收权威state. `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/workflow-cockpit/hooks.test.tsx` 已验证动作后会触发 query invalidation, 且上游 query datachanges会directly反映到 `listItems`, 不再dependency整份local镜像.  | 已改生产代码与最小 hook 回归testing.  |

| 2503 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/features/approval/src/hooks/index.ts:80` | approve/reject onlylocalremoval -- 未call后端 POST decisions | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧 `useApprovalCenterVm()` 的动作流只maintained前端 queue state, 没有把 approve/reject 真正发到 approval API; subsequentimplementation已补接 `approveApproval()/rejectApproval()`, 但文档还停留在旧描述.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/approval/src/hooks/index.ts` 的 `approve()`/`reject()` 已分别call `approveApproval(client, approvalId)` 与 `rejectApproval(client, approvalId)`, 之后才更新local state; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/approval/hooks.test.tsx` 已验证这两个动作都会命中 API helper.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小 hook 回归证据.  |
| 2504 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P2 | `ui/apps/electron-win/src/main.ts:15` | IPC shell:run/shell:spawn 无命令白名单 | 已解决 | Root Cause不是“onlymissing一个白名单判断”, 而是旧 Electron shell directly把 `shell:run/shell:spawn` 当 renderer 可达 IPC 能力暴露出去; 现行安全基线已经改为从 channel allowlist 中彻底removal这两条危险 IPC, 只保留 `shell:openExternal`, 但 reaudit 文档与旧testing仍停留在漏洞时期.  | 当前 `ui/apps/electron-win/src/main.ts` 的 `electronMainBaseline.channels` 已不contains `shell:run/shell:spawn`, `electronBridgeCapabilities` 也不再宣称 `shell/process` bridge 可用; `ui/apps/electron-win/src/preload.ts` 的 `electronPreloadApi.shell` 只保留 `openExternal`. 本轮 `ui/tests/unit/ui/apps/electron-win/main.test.ts` 与 `preload.test.ts` 已验证危险 IPC 不再暴露.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小壳层安全回归证据.  |
| 2505 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §210 UI Apps (Electron/Tauri/Mobile) + Features (HITL/Approval/Cockpit) missing陷 | P2 | `ui/packages/features/approval/src/mobile/index.ts:4` | 移动端审批无交互 -- 规格要求notification栏快捷操作 | 已解决 | Root cause: 早期 mobile approval cards 只有static标题和描述, 没有把 approve/reject 绑定到真实快捷操作; 移动端notification卡片可展示但不可execute审批.  | 当前 `ui/packages/features/approval/src/mobile/index.ts` 的 `createApprovalMobileCards()` 已为 approve/reject 卡片injection `onApprove/onReject`, 并directlycall `approveApproval()/rejectApproval()`; 本轮新增 `ui/tests/unit/ui/packages/features/approval/mobile.test.ts` 已验证快捷操作会触发 API helper, 且只保留前 5 个 source approvals.  | 回写真实Root Cause, 源码basis与最小 UI 回归证据.  |

| 2509 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §211 Contracts-Implementation 交叉验证 (OAPEFLIR / EventBus / NL-Gateway / Goal-Decomposer)  | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts:358` | dead-letter onlyin-memory Map 非independent DLQ 表 -- violates"Event 不allows物理删除" | 已解决 | Root cause: 早期implementation只在 ack state层面标记failure, independent `event_dead_letters` 存储和 bus 侧persistencepath后来补上了, 但 reaudit 条目仍沿用“onlyin-memory Map”旧描述.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` 在 dead-letter branch里同transactionexecute `markEventDeadLettered()` 与 `insertEventDeadLetter()`; `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/truth/sqlite/sqlite-migration-runtime-part3.ts` 已创建 `event_dead_letters` 表. 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/review-contract-regressions.test.ts` 已验证failure事件会落入independent DLQ 表.  | 回写真implementation状与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2510 | Round 42 — 深度审计 (compliance / HA-execution / UI-apps / contracts-implementation 交叉验证)  / §211 Contracts-Implementation 交叉验证 (OAPEFLIR / EventBus / NL-Gateway / Goal-Decomposer)  | P0 | `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts:178` | publish() 未maintained run 内monotonic递增 sequence -- violates§14.3 第 3 条 | 已解决 | Root cause: 审计basis停留在 `publish()` 尚未auto分配 run-local sequence 的旧版本; 当前 bus 已为同一 `runId` 建立monotonic递增 sequence 分配, 但 reaudit 文档未synchronous.  | 当前 `src/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/durable-event-bus.ts` 的 `publish()`/`publishBatch()` 都会在提供 `runId` 且未explicitly传 `sequence` 时call `getNextRunSequence()`; 本轮新增 `tests/unit/platform/five-plane-state-evidence/events/review-contract-regressions.test.ts` 已验证同一 `runId` 连续发布得到 `sequence = 1/2`.  | 回写为已解决, 并注明剩余更强的多实例序列协调不属于本条原始missing陷描述.  |

| 2571 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §215 Interaction 层深层missing陷 (Autonomy / Dashboard / UX / Proactive-Agent)  | P1 | `src/interaction/autonomy/index.ts:172` | module内 AUTONOMY_LEVEL_ORDER 不含 frozen, level-manager 含 -- 三处sort互相矛盾 | 已解决 | 旧问题来自multiple places autonomy sort语义不synchronous; 现行implementation已把 `frozen` 视为“非正常晋升序列成员”, 同时在需要比较整体结果时仍保持其最低自治等级语义.  | 当前 `src/interaction/autonomy/index.ts` 中 `demoteOneLevel()` 对 `frozen` fail-closed return自身, `lowestLevel([...])` 在含 `frozen` 时仍会把它排为最低整体结果; 定向验证见 `tests/unit/interaction/autonomy/index.test.ts` 新增 “any capability remains frozen -> overall level frozen”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |

| 2573 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §215 Interaction 层深层missing陷 (Autonomy / Dashboard / UX / Proactive-Agent)  | P1 | `src/interaction/autonomy/promotion-engine/index.ts:16` | incidents>0 全部阻止晋升 -- 未distinguish P2/P3 低级别 incident | 已解决 | 旧strategy确实按 `incidents > 0` 粗暴阻断; 现行 promotion engine 已把 P0/P1 与 P2/P3 分层handle.  | 当前 `src/interaction/autonomy/promotion-engine/index.ts` 对 `P0` 给出冻结/降级阻断, 对 `P1` 生成 one-level demotion guidance, 而 `P2/P3` 不再单独阻断晋升; 定向验证见 `tests/unit/interaction/autonomy/promotion-engine/index.test.ts` 新增的 `P3` 晋升放行与 `P1` 单级降级用例.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2574 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §215 Interaction 层深层missing陷 (Autonomy / Dashboard / UX / Proactive-Agent)  | P1 | `src/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-server.ts:106` | WS registerClient 无认证/鉴权 -- violates§11.7 要求 authenticated principal | 已解决 | 旧审计对应的是早期 `registerClient()` 只收 channel 列表的阶段; 现行entry已经把 principal/tenant 和authorizationrangevalidation接进注册链.  | 当前 `src/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-server.ts` 的 `registerClient()` 会call `validateCredentials()` 与 `validateSubscriptions()`, 并要求 `principal`, `tenantId`, `allowedChannels/allowedTenantIds/allowedTaskIds` 一致; 定向验证见 `tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-replay-and-authorization.test.ts`.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2575 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §215 Interaction 层深层missing陷 (Autonomy / Dashboard / UX / Proactive-Agent)  | P1 | `src/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-server.ts:208` | pushDelta 按 metric 匹配但 subscriber 按 dashboardId 注册 -- 永远匹配不到 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  metric 路由此前只有读链: `findAffectedClientIds()` 会消费 `metricSubscribers`, 但 `registerClient()/updateSubscriptions()` 从不注册 metric, 且 metric branch还会被 channel 匹配再次拦掉, 导致 metric-only 订阅永远收不到 delta.  | 本轮在 `src/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-server.ts` 新增了 `subscribedMetrics`, `registerMetricSubscriptions()`, `unregisterMetricSubscriptions()` 与 `updateMetricSubscriptions()`, 并让 metric 路由usesonlycheck tenant visibility 的path, 不再要求额外 channel 命中; 定向验证见 `tests/unit/interaction/dashboard/dashboard-websocket-replay-and-authorization.test.ts` 新增的 metric subscription 用例.  | 已改生产代码与定向testing.  |

| 2585 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P0 | `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.ts:267` | addWorkspaceMembership 未验证call者permissions -- arbitraryuser可向arbitrary workspace 添加成员 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 此前所谓“鉴权”根本没把发起人identity带进来, 只是回读 `workspace.ownerId` 对应 membership 是否exists; 这无法把authorization决策绑定到真实 caller, 因此属于伪修复.  | 本轮为 `AddWorkspaceMembershipInput` 增加了 `callerUserId`, 并在 `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.ts` 中按真实 caller 的 workspace membership 角色(`owner/admin`) 做authorization; `src/sdk/cli/tenant-platform.ts` 与 CLI env loader 已synchronous透传 caller. 定向验证见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.test.ts` 与 `tests/integration/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform-integration.test.ts` 的authorizationsuccess/reject用例.  | 已改生产代码, CLI 边界与定向testing.  |
| 2586 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P0 | `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.ts:342` | addOrganizationMembership 无鉴权 -- arbitraryuser可自添 admin 角色, permissions提升 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root Cause有两层: 旧implementation既没有 `callerUserId`/principal 输入, 又errordependency并不exists的 `organization.ownerId` 语义, 所以既无法识别真实call者, 也没有权威的组织 owner/admin 模型.  | 本轮将 `CreateOrganizationInput` 补为explicitly `ownerId`, `createOrganization()` 会同时写入 owner membership 作为权威起点; `addOrganizationMembership()` 改为based on `callerUserId` 查找组织 membership 并validation `owner/admin`, 且只有 owner 能再授予 owner. `src/sdk/cli/tenant-platform.ts`, `remaining-cli-env-loaders.ts`, `remaining-cli-env-support.ts` 已synchronous接线; 验证见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.test.ts`, `tests/integration/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform-integration.test.ts` 与 `tests/integration/platform/security/data-plane-flow-boundary.test.ts` 所在的定向testing批次.  | 已改生产代码, CLI/configure边界与定向testing.  |
| 2587 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P0 | `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/data-plane-flow-service.ts:611` | scope tenantId/orgId=null 时skip边界check -- 可bypasstenant隔离 | 已解决 | 旧implementation把 null scope 当成“无约束”; 现行边界check已经把 null/non-null 不对称本身视为out of bounds.  | 当前 `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/data-plane-flow-service.ts` 的 `assertScopeCompatibility()` 会对 tenant/org/workspace 三层 scope 都explicitlyhandle `null !== non-null` 场景并throws边界error; 定向验证见 `tests/integration/platform/security/data-plane-flow-boundary.test.ts`.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2588 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/pack-security-service.ts:202` | runStaticAnalysis onlyregex扫描 sourceUri 字符串 -- 实际源代码未扫描 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧implementation把 `sourceUri` 当成源码textdirectly做regex匹配, `inline:` 之外的 `file:` / `data:` / localpath根本没有读取真实源码, 远端不can read URI 还会被当成“扫描过”.  | 本轮新增真实源码解析branch: `inline:` 取内联源码, `file:`/localpath读取file, `data:` decode后再扫描; 对拿不到源码content的 URI 改为 fail-closed, directly产出 `PKG003` 阻断via, 不再把 URI 字符串误当源码. basis见 `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/pack-security-service.ts` 与 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/pack-security-service.test.ts` 中“scans actual source content from file URIs / fails closed when source content is unavailable for static analysis” 两条定向用例.  | 已改生产代码与定向testing.  |
| 2589 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/pack-security-service.ts:238` | 危险 capability ≤3 不告警 -- 检测阈值过高 | 已解决 | 旧逻辑把危险 capability 的告警阈值设成 `> 3`, 导致只申请 1-3 个高risk能力时完全不出告警, 实际risk被silently吞掉.  | 当前 `checkCapabilitySafety()` 已改为只要exists危险 capability 就产出 `CAP001`; 定向basis除现行源码外, 还包括 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/pack-security-service.test.ts` 新增的 “flags a single dangerous capability”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |

| 2591 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/sla-engine/sla-operations-service.ts:111` | preemptionCapApplied 条件恒 true -- 标志无法正确判断 | 已解决 | 旧 bug 的Root cause: 用 `selectedPriority <= maxPriority` 这种恒宽松条件判断, 导致低优先级 tier 也被标成“已应用 preemption cap”; 现行implementation已改成只有exists更高优先级 tier 可供抢占时才置真.  | 当前 `src/scale-ecosystem/sla-engine/sla-operations-service.ts` uses `selectedTier.preemptionPriority < maxPriority` 计算 `preemptionCapApplied`.  | 回写现行源码basis.  |
| 2592 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/cdc-replication-service.ts:98` | checkpoint/queue 纯in-memory -- 重启后复制进度loss, violates RPO | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause: 旧 `CDCReplicationService` 只把 checkpoint 和待复制 batch 放在process内 `Map` 里, process重启后既丢进度也丢待重试队列; 更隐蔽的一层是重启后即便恢复 source events, 也会因为只看旧 checkpoint 而重新切出已排队 batch.  | 本轮为 CDC 服务新增可persistencestatefile装载/落盘能力, 并在 coordinator default接到 `data/runtime/multi-region/cdc-replication-state.json`; 同时 `prepareBatch()` 改为同时避开“已persistence checkpoint”和“已排队但未confirmation的最高 sequence”, 不再重启后duplicate切批. basis见 `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/cdc-replication-service.ts` 与 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/cdc-replication-service.test.ts` 中 “persists checkpoints across service restart” 和 “persists pending queues ... across restart”.  | 已改生产代码与定向testing.  |
| 2593 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator/index.ts:170` | eventId = Date.now()+Math.random() -- 高concurrent ID conflict | 已解决 | 旧implementation把毫秒级时间戳与 `Math.random()` 拼接成 eventId, 本质上既无globally唯一性保证, 也没有concurrentconflict边界.  | 当前 `recordEvent()` 已改用 `crypto.randomUUID()` 生成 eventId; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator/index.test.ts` 中 “generates unique event IDs under rapid writes”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2594 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator/index.ts:244` | flush checkpoint sequence 为局部计数器 -- 重启归零致duplicate消费 | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧 checkpoint 更新只写本次 flush 内的局部 `lastSequence`, 没有把它叠加到既有持久 sequence 上, subsequent flush 会从局部 0 重新起算.  | 当前 `flush()` 已改为以 `existingCheckpoint.sequenceNumber` 为 base, 再叠加本次confirmation的 `lastSequence`; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/data-replicator/index.test.ts` 中 “keeps checkpoint sequence cumulative across flushes”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2595 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/cdc-replication-service.ts:209` | recordFailure only记log无 retry 入队 -- failure batch silently丢弃 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | 旧implementationfailurepath只有log, 没有把 batch 保持在可重试队列里; 本轮复核时还发现如果directly再次 `enqueue` 会制造duplicate batch, 所以需要同时修复“无重试”和“duplicate入队”两个层面.  | 当前 `recordFailure()` 已改为 `requeueBatch()`: failure batch 若已在队列中则移动到尾部继续等待重试, 若不exists才补入队, 并随persistencestate一并落盘; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/cdc-replication-service.test.ts` 中 “persists pending queues and keeps failed batch retryable across restart”.  | 已改生产代码与定向testing.  |
| 2596 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/region-health-check-service.ts:347` | degraded 不reset consecutiveFailures -- 恢复后仍累积旧计数触发误 failover | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧state更新逻辑只在完全 healthy 时清零 failure count, 导致从 `unhealthy` 恢复到 `degraded` 的 region 仍背着旧failure计数, subsequent会被误判为需要 failover.  | 当前 `updateHealthState()` 已在 `healthy` 和 `degraded` 两种恢复态下都reset `consecutiveFailures`; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/region-health-check-service.test.ts` 中 “resets stale failures when region recovers to degraded”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2597 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.ts:312` | createOrganization validation条件恒 false -- validation被bypass | 已解决 | 旧 bug 确实来自error地把待创建组织 ID 与 tenant 自身组织 ID via fallback 混成同一个值比较, 导致条件恒真.  | 当前 `src/scale-ecosystem/tenant-platform/tenant-platform-service.ts` 在 `createOrganization()` 中uses单独的 `newOrgId` 与 `tenant.organizationId` 比较, 已不再是恒 false/恒真式bypass.  | 回写现行源码basis.  |
| 2598 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P1 | `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/marketplace-governance-service.ts:501` | reviewRequired=0 的 internal 包也必须有 review -- 与文档矛盾 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root Cause有两层: 最早的发布门禁把所有包都绑死到 review; subsequent虽加了 `requiresReview`, 但代码仍default `reviewRecord/reviewId` 一定exists, 导致 internal + `reviewRequired=0` 的真实无评审发布path在runtime仍会因空 review crashed.  | 当前 `publishPackage()` 已改为: 只有 `trustLevel !== "internal" || reviewRequired === 1` 才force评审; 对免评审 internal 包会生成system级 review exemption record, 既满足文档语义, 也保持 publication 的 `reviewId` references完整. 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/marketplace-governance-service.test.ts` 中 “publishPackage publishes internal package without signature”.  | 已改生产代码与定向testing.  |
| 2599 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P2 | `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/marketplace-governance-service.ts:590` | revokePublication 未check当前 status -- 已 revoked 可duplicate revoke | 已解决 | Root cause: 旧implementation撤销时只按 `publicationId` 查record, 不validation当前state机位置, 导致已失效 publication 可duplicateexecute revoke.  | 当前 `revokePublication()` 已explicitly拦截 `revoked/deprecated/retired` state并return `marketplace.publication_already_inactive`; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/marketplace-governance-service.test.ts` 中 “revokePublication rejects already inactive publication”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2600 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P2 | `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/certification/index.ts:12` | 不check approvedAt exists -- status=approved 但 approvedAt=null 视为已认证 | 已解决 (源码修复并补定向testing)  | Root cause:  agent certification branch已经补了 `approvedAt` 约束, 但 pack certification branch仍只看 `status`, 导致 pack 侧exists同类认证穿透.  | 当前 `CertificationGate.checkPackCertification()` 已在 `status === "approved"` 且 `approvedAt == null` 时阻断并打上 `certification_invalid`; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/certification/certification.test.ts` 中 “blocks approved pack without approvedAt”.  | 已改生产代码与定向testing.  |
| 2601 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P2 | `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/publisher/index.ts:16` | reputationScore>=0.4 hardcoded -- sandboxed publisher 也可发布 | 已解决 | 旧implementation把发布准入error收敛成 reputation 阈值, 完全没有把 `sandboxed` 当作硬阻断 trust state.  | 当前 `canPublisherReleaseArtifact()` 已改为onlyallows `verified/enterprise` 且 artifact type 在白名单内; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/publisher/index.test.ts` 中关于 sandboxed publisher 在 `0.4` 与 `0.41` 两个边界值都被reject的用例.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2602 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P2 | `src/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/catalog/index.ts:63` | validateListingDependencies 无循环检测 -- 循环dependency致安装无限递归 | 已解决 | 旧问题的Root cause:  dependency validation 只做missing项/compatibility性check, 不把传递dependencygraph作为graph结构handle, 自然也不会把循环dependency纳入 invalid 条件.  | 当前 `validateListingDependencies()` 已做 DFS 递归栈检测, 并把 `cyclicDependencies.length > 0` 纳入 `valid` 判定; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/marketplace/catalog/catalog.test.ts` 中 “validateListingDependencies rejects cyclic dependencies”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2603 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P2 | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/region-health-check-service.ts:240` | checkAllRegions serial await -- 大量 region 延迟线性增长 | 已解决 | 旧implementation逐 region serial `await checkRegion()`, 总体耗时与 region 数量线性相乘; region 越多, 巡检window越长.  | 当前 `checkAllRegions()` 已改为 `Promise.all([...configs.keys()].map(checkRegion))` parallelexecute; 定向basis见 `tests/unit/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/region-health-check-service.test.ts` 中 “checkAllRegions runs checks in parallel”.  | 回写现行源码与定向testingbasis.  |
| 2604 | Round 43 — 深度审计 (org-governance / state-evidence / interaction-autonomy / scale-ecosystem)  / §216 Scale-Ecosystem 深层missing陷 (Tenant / Marketplace / SLA / Multi-Region)  | P2 | `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/failover-controller/index.ts:36` | failover 取 candidateRegionIds[0] -- 未考虑健康state和复制 lag | 已解决 (当前implementation采取 fail-closed)  | 旧implementation的确exists盲选首候选的问题; 现行控制器没有健康/lag sort器时不再退回到 `candidateRegionIds[0]`, 而是只acceptsexplicitly `preferredRegionId`, 否则directlyreject failover.  | 当前 `src/scale-ecosystem/multi-region/failover-controller/index.ts` 在无合法 `preferredRegionId` 时return `targetRegionId: null` / `multi_region.no_candidate_available`, 已经消除了 blind pick.  | 回写现行源码basis, 并明确当前是保守 fail-closed 而非智能选优.  |
